BUNG 12

MIRE RAM A MISSION THAWK TAWH LEH THAWK MEKTE

Bangladesh ram zau zawng hi 1,43,998 Sq Kms (55,598 Miles) a ni a. Chutah chuan Chittagong Hill Tract-ah hian Hill District pathum – Bandarban, Rangamati leh Khakrachhuri te a awma. Heng District pathumah hian Bandarban District-ah chauh hian Miria te hi an awm a. Bandarban District zau zawng hi 4502 Sq Kms a ni a. He District a Miria Population dinhmun chu hetiang a tarlan hi a ni:

KUM

MIHRING ZAT

TAR LANGTU

1872

2,378

B.H.Suharuairdi

1901

10,540

Chittagong Hill Tracts Destric Census

1956

17,000

National Encyclopedia of Bangladesh, Asiatic Society of Bangladesh

1959

16,121

B.H.Suharuairdi

1981

20,000

National Encyclopedia of Bangladesh, Asiatic Society of Bangladesh

1991

22,129

Banglasesh Sorkar Census

1995

59,748

Mro Social Council

2001

29,383

Banglasesh Sorkar Census

2005

67,376

Mro Social Council

2011

38,021

Banglasesh Sorkar Census

Mire nun leh hnam dan phek 38. Ziaktu : Singiawng Mro

Bangladesh-ah hian tlangmi hnam sawm leh pakhat (11) 1. Chakma. 2. Marma (Mawk) 3. Tripura (Tuikuk) 4. Miria. 5. Tawngchawngia. 6. Bawm. 7. Khumi (Matu) 8. Khiang. 9. Pang. 10. Lushai. 11. Chak te an awm a, Heng Bangladesh a tlangmi hnam infin khawm Population Census 2011 in a tarlan dan chuan mi 3,88,335 (Mire nun leh hnam dan phek 14. Ziaktu : Singiawng Mro) heng zingah chuan kan unau Miria te hi hnam hnufual ber an ni.

Miriate hi khaw khatah in tlem te te in an awm a, khaw khatah hian a tlangpuiin hnam khat chauh an awm a. Entir nan: Mizoramah hian Fanai chu a hlangin khua siam tasela, chutiang bawk chuan Sailo leh hnam dangte pawh anmahni hnam hlangin awm zel ta ang se.

16Bangladesh map

Miriate hian anmahni awmdan hi ṭha tawk an inti em em mai a, hnam dang nen pawh an inpawh tehchiam lova, hnam dang nun dan pawh an zir duh lo hle a vangin an changkang thei lo a ni. Kristian an la tlem em em mai bawk a. Bangladesh sorkar leh NGO te pawhin ṭanpui chu an tum ṭhin na in khaw khatah tlem te te a an awm a vang leh inkal pawhna kawng a ṭhat loh em a vangte in ṭanpui ngaihna an hre vak lo ni in a lang. Hmun ṭhenkhatah chuan Sorkar-in School in ṭha takin a sak sak a, mahse chung Mire khua-ahte chuan khawpui a tangin zirtirtu tumah an awm thei silova, bâkah Miriate hian zirna ngaihsan nachang an la hriat loh em bawk a vangin chung School Building-te chu bawng in leh vawk inah a chang leh ṭhin a ni.

17Bandarban Distric map

Ka kalna apiangah School kal a ṭhat zia theih tawpin ka sawi ṭhin a, mahse, “Kan pi pute a ṭangin keini chu kawlawm in ei kan zawng ngai lo, chempui-in kan ei tur chu kan thawk chhuak ve tho,” an ti tlat mai a. Mahse Kum sanghnih hnu lam a ṭang chuan zirna ngaihsan nachang an lo hre ṭan ve ta. Nu leh Pa te’n an fate zirna tur zawngin an buai ve tawh khawp mai, mahse an fate zirna a vanga insenso erawh an la harsat rih khawp mai. A free a an fate sikul kal tirna an zawn ṭhin a vangin Mission ṭhenkhat tan chuan Kristian a siam a awlsam phah in Kristian tawhsate pawh ṭhenkhat chu an fa te zirna a free theihna tur a nih chuan Mission hrang hrangah an zuan lawr phah bawk a ni. Chutih lai chuan ṭhenkhat chu fate zirna avang a insengso ngam pawh an awm ve ṭan tawh.

Kum sanghnih hnu lam a ṭang chuan Mire ramah Bangladesh a hnam dang Kristiante a ṭangin Mission hrang hrang an lo lut a. Kan unau Miriate hi an la changkan loh em a vangin lo changkang deuh tawh hnam dang Kristian ṭhenkhat te’n sum siam nan tak a hmangte pawh an awm a, thil hrang hrang tawktarhin Kristian ni turin an thlem a, chutia Kristian a an lâkte chu enkawl ṭha leh mang silovin Kristian hming ti chhe zawnga lo awm tawk lah bo lo. Mission ṭhenkhatte lah an thawktu rawihte Pathian lam hawi lo fe fe an lo awm bawk.

Mission ṭhenkhat-te chuan an thawktute hlawh tlem te te in an pe a, a chang phei chuan hlawh pawh pe mumal lova thawktute harsa tak a dahtu-te pawh an awm bawk. An thawktu te’n thlawhhmate nei in ei zawng pah a an thawh a ngaih avang leh Mire ho hnenah pawisa pukte an ngaih zawk avangin leibate an nei erh urh a, an thawhna hmun ami te’n an ngaihsan theih tur a awm aiin hmusit awm a an awm zawk thin a vangte in chutiang a rawngbawl chuan Miria te ringtu puitling a siam chu thil har tak tur a ni. Chuvangin Mire ramah Lalpa ram a zau hleithei lo mai nilovin achang chuan Kristian-te kan hming a chhiat em em changte pawh a awm ṭhin a ni.

Mire ram a thawktu ṭhenkhat chu Krista hming ti chhetu an a ni a, chutih laiin ṭhenkhat chu ṭhahnemngai tak a thawktu pawh an awm bawk. Tunah chuan Miriate hi Kristian Mission te hian kan ti chawmawlh zo tawh emawni tih mai tur a ni. “Kristian a kan awm chuan enge min pek ang, pawisa engzat nge min pek ang?” ti te in min lo zawt phawng phawngte pawh an awm ṭhin a ni. Chung rilru lam a piangsual tak tawhte Krista hnen a hruai a Kristian puitling leh Kristian ṭha tak a siam chu mihring tak a ngaihtuah chuan a huphurh awm thin khawp mai.

Khawimaw laiah chuan Miriate zingah Kristian sawichhia a Missionary te ânchhia min lawh bawrh bawrh changte pawh kan tawn chang a awm ṭhin. Bangladesh a kan Bawm unau, za a za Kristian ni tawhte chuan, “Miria te hi Lalpa’n a hawisan tawh a ni, an zinga rawngbawlin awmzia a nei tawh lo,” an ti a, mahse a mission ang zawng chuan Mizo Kristian te’n India ram a kan thawh ang chanve, chanve leh tal pawh thawk se chuan Mire ram a an thawhna hian awmzia chu a neih ngei ka ring tlat a ni. Lalpa’n Miria te Chhandamna kulhpui chhunga hruai lut turin min ti miau si. Kan unau Miria te hi Krista hnen a hruai thlen theih loh khawp a Lalpa hawisan hnam chu nise an thlarau bo hruai chhuak tur hian Mire hnam zingah Lalpa’n min tir lo tawp ang tih hi ka ngaih dan chu a ni.

Mitam tak an sakhua a nun hahchawlhna hmu zo lo, Kristian a hahchawlhna beisei a min rawn beltute pawh an awm ve bawk a. Kan unau Miriate hian an thlarau boral tur hruai kir a, Kristian puitling a siam turin belh tlak Mission, thawktu Lalpa mitirh ngei an va mamawh tak em. Krista hnen a an nun hahchawlh beisei, mahse anmahni hmangaih tak leh ṭhahnemngai tak a enkawltu tur an hmuh si loh avang a nun tuihal tam takte hi an va lainat awm teh lul em.

Kan unau Miria te hi thlarau lama puitling tur chuan; tuna kan Kristian-te pawh achung a kan sawi takte ang khian naupang, puitling tura kan enkawl ṭhin angin Miria te Ktistian puitling a siam tur chuan thil namai a ni lova, Field-ah ram lâk tawngpawng duham ngawt hleih theih a nih loh a vangin kei chuan kan enkawl phak loh leh kan vil sen loh khawp a bial zauh hi thil ṭha ber niin ka hre lo a ni. Tuna ringtu kan neihte hi ringtu puitling ni tur a theihtawp a kan beih a ngai takmeuh a ni.

Taksa leh thlarauvah chhanchhuah an ngaih zia han hmuh meuh chuan ka lainat ngawih ngawih a. Mire ramah hian Lalpa rawngbawl hna thawh ava han ṭul bawrh bawrh tak em, Lalpa ram a lo zau thuai thuai a, taksa leh thlarauah hma an sawn thuai thuai ka duh a, mahse Office ah hna thawh tur ka lo ngah ve bawk si nen, ka indaih ngang lo a ni. Kan unau (Mizo hnahthlak) Miriate hian keini Mizo te nen hian hnam inunau kan ni tih an hre tawh a, tin, tunah rih chuan Mizo te hi min la ngaisang rih bawk.

Tin, Mizo te hi Mire ram a rawng lo bawl hmasatu-te kan ni a, tun hun hnuhnungah pawh hian kan unau Miria-te taksa leh thlarau a chhanchhuah hna thawk turin Lalpa’n Mizo te hnenah mawhphurhna min pe niin ka hria a. Engtik niah emaw tal chuan chu kan mawhphurhna chu kan hlen ngei chu a la ngai dawn a ni. Miriate hian taksa leh thlarauvah hmangaih taka enkawltu an mamawh em em a ni.

Mire ram a Mission thawk tawhte leh thawk mekte hi ka theih ang angin han tar lang ila, mahse Record mumal a lo awm loh a vangin an chanchin chipchiar tak leh kimchang tak chuan ka ziak thei dawn lova pawi ka ti khawp mai. Heng ka ziak lante pawh hi Pastor Chownglowk-a hnen a ṭanga ka hriat leh keimah in ka chhuina aṭanga ka ziak a ni a, tihsual palhte a awm a nih chuan ngaihhnathiamna nen a adik zawk min lo hrilh hre turin chhiartu duhtak ka ngen che a ni.

Mire rama Mission thawk tawhte leh thawk mekte chu

hengte hi an ni:

Mission Hming. Thawhtan kum

  1. North East India General (N.E.I.G) Mission. 1919
  2. Voluntary Missionary-te. 1965 – 1978
  3. Evangelical Chirstian Church (E.C.C) 1980
  4. Christian Fellowship of Bangladesh (C.F.B) 1989
  5. Bangladesh Tribal Association Baptist Church (B.T.A.B.C) 1960
  6. Bangladesh Baptist Sangha(B.B.S) 2000
  7. Presbyterian Church of Bangladesh (P.C.B) 1991
  8. Bangladesh Baptist Fellowship (B.B.F) 1989
  9. Youth With A Mission (YWAM) 1992
  10. Baptist Church of Mizoram (B.C.M) 2000
  11. Evangelical Reform Presbyterian Church (E.R.P.C) 2007
  12. Evangelical Apostolic Church (E.A.C) 1998
  13. Lairam Isua Krista Baptist Kohhran (L.I.K.B.K) 2007
  14. Independent Baptist Church (I.B.C) 2007
  15. Bandarban Hill Churches of Christ (B.H.C.O.C) 2007
  16. Christian Mission Church (C.M.C) 2017
  17. Believers Church (B.C) 1997

Heng Mission kan rawn tarlan zinga ṭhenkhat hi chuan Mire ram a an rawngbawlna an chawlhsan tawh a, tun a la thawk mek pawh an la awm a ni. Miria te Lalpa hmangaihna a ṭanga hmangaihna nen a thawk tawh leh thawk mek zawng zawngte, Krista tana in ṭhahnem ngaihna leh in thawhrimna zawng zawngah Miria te aiawhin inchungah lawmthu ka sawi takmeuh a ni. Chung Mission leh thawktu zawng zawngte chanchin ziak lan vek ka duh em em lain Docoment ṭha leh Record ṭha kan neih loh avangin ka ziak lang vek thei lova pawi ka ti khawp mai.

  1. North East India General (NEIG) Mission chanchin : N.E.I.G Mission hi Pastor Chownglowka’n Mire ram a an thawh dan leh an thawh hun chhung a lo chhinchhiah dan chuan kum 1920 – 1944 chhungin Mire ramah an lo thawk a. Ahnu a ka hmuhchhuah dan chuan kum 1919 atang daih tawh khan Mire hnam zingah Mizo Missionary-te an lo lut tawh a ni. Chutih hun lai a an Head Quarter chu Churochanpur India-ah a ni a, chutih hunlai chuan Mire ram a an Missionary te chu Mizo vek an ni. An Missionary te chuan kan unau Miriate thlarau bo seng khawmna kawngah ṭhahnem an ngai in hreawm tam tak an lo tuar a, Miria te’n taksa leh thlarauva an lo puitlin theih nan thil hlu tak tak an lo hnuchhiah a ni. Chung an hnathawh leh an thiltihte chu kan la sawi zel ang. Mahse kan sawi kim vek thei dawn lo a ni tih erawh min hriatpui ka beisei.

Chutih hun lai a Mire ram a Missionary te hming leh an chanchin kan tarlan theih ang ang kan tarlang a nga, kan chhinchhiahna in a atarlan loh Mire ram a awmchilh a Missionary hna lo thawk si, kan tarlan hmaih emaw kan tihsual palhte a awm a nih chuan chhiartu duhtak, khawngaihin a dik zawk min hrilh turin ka ngen a che. Heng kan han tarlante pawh hi an awm hun chhung engmah record fel kan hmuh loh a vangin kan tarlang thei lo a ni. Chungte chu hengte hi an ni:

  1. Pastor H.Dala.
  2. Pi Rozami, W/o Pastor H.Dala.
  3. Pastor Patlaia.
  4. Pi Buangi, W/o Pastor Patlaia.
  5. Pastor Rohmingliana.
  6. Pi Siamtawii, W/o Pastor Rohmingliana.
  7. Evan Chalmawii D/o Pastor Rohmingliana.
  8. Evan Saikunga.
  9. Evan Liandanga.
  10. Pi Lalfuali, W/o Evan Liandanga.
  11. Evan Kawha. (Sapkunga)
  12. Pi Biakcha ni W/o Evan Kawha.
  13. EvanTleikawnga.
  14. Pi Dengzingi, W/o Evan Tleikawnga.
  15. Evan Thangkunga.
  16. Pi Chemtawii, W/o Evan Thangkunga.
  17. Evan Thanghnuaia.
  18. Pi Zazawni W/o Evan Thanghnuaia.
  19. Evan Zakhuma.
  20. Pi Siamkungi W/o Evan Zakhuma.
  21. Evan Darkanga.

18NEIG Missionary-te sulhnu la awmchhun, an thing thei phun, Theihai leh Te’ngtere kungte

Hengte hi Mire ramthim lo su hmasatu-te an ni a. Khatih hun lai khan awmchilh lem lova rawngbawl a lo tlawh kual ṭhin mi engemawzat an awm pawh a rinawm. Hengmite hian an Lalpa tan an nun hlan chungin Mire ram thim chhah tak mai chu an lo su tawh a, mi sawm (9) lai in Mire ramah lu an lo phum tawh nghe nghe a ni. Khatih hun lai khan inkalpawhna kawng mumal a awm lova, Miria te pawh an la mawl chhah zual em em a, Pathian thu ngaihthlak pawh an duh lova.

Lalpa rawngbawltute kha Pathian thu hril a an zin in thlenna pawh an hnawn chang a tam ṭhin a, khawlaiah Bible kengin Pathian thu an tlangau pui ṭhin a, Miria te lah chuan lo ngaihthlak a lo pawm a hnek in, “Lusei ui â ho saw lehkhabu kengin ui â ang mai in khawlaiah an bauh an bauh mai,” an lo ti ṭhin a ni.

Missionary te chuan Miria te entawn a tan thei te an phun ṭhin a, chung an thei phunte chu, “Hei hi Lusei thei phun a nih hi,” ti in an sat chhe ṭhin a. Mahse, Missionary te chuan beidawng duh lovin an zirtir lui zel a, tunah pawh khatih hun lai a an awmna ‘Mission veng’ an tih, Tun a Ngaringchah khaw bulah chuan an thing phun, Theihai leh Te’ngtere kungte chu upa tawh tak hmuh tur a la awm a ni.

Chutianga Missionary te’n dodalna kâr a chhel tak a an lo zirtir chu Mire Kristian hnasa te’n Pathian thu bakah huan thlai neih dante an lo inzirtir chhawng ve zel a, tunah chuan Mire hnam pumpuiin huan thlai neih nachang an lo hre ve ta a ni. Tunah chuan ṭhenkhat chuan huan thlaite chu hausakpui tak tak pawh an lo awm ta a ni. Thlarau lamah pawh Miria te’n malsawmna tam tak an lo dawn phah a, Bible Johana bu mal leh hla 75 Mire ṭawngin an lehlin sak a, Mizo a aw b bu chu zirtir ve in chung Johana bu mal leh Hla bu te pawh chu Mizo a aw b hmangin an lo chhut sak a. Thil hlu tak an lo hnuchhiah sak a ni.

Chutih hun lai a an awmna ‘Mission veng’ an tih a ṭang chuan an in sem darh a, Mire ram hmun tinah chanchinṭha an hril darh ta a, mahse Miria te chuan chanchinṭha chu an lo do tlat avangin ram an la thei lo em em mai a, mahse Mire hnam Kristian a awm chhunte chu lehkha an zir tir in Churochanpur-ah lehkha zir leh Pathian thu zir in an lo tir a, chung zing a ṭhenkhat te chu an ṭangkai khawp mai.

Mire hnam zing a Kristian hmasa berte chu Klawnglai leh Menkrawi te unau an ni. Chumi hnu chuan Angka leh a nau Chownglowk te, Laikowi, Singtai, Menpiaw leh Tumsek-i te Kristian-ah an rawn inpe ve leh a ni. Hengte hian lehkha an zir nghal vek a, ṭhenkhat chu sikul kal kher lova Missionary te in a zir mai te pawh an awm.

Ṭhenkhat chu Mire ram a Mission sikul-ah an kal a, Mire ram a Mission sikul a awm tawh loh hnuah Bawm ram Pankhiang khuaah leh Lunginkhar-ahte sikul an kal a, chuta ṭang chuan Churachanpur ahte an kal a ni. N.E.I.G Missionary te chu Miria te’n an do em a vang leh Kristian na in hma a sawn theih loh em a vangin Bawm ramah an insawn ta vek a, “Israel te’n an hawl a an paih hnu kha Van Lal Reng ro pialral lunghlu ka char ta,” ti a hla siamtu in a lo siam ang khan kan unau Bawm hnam te’n Chahchinṭha chu an lo dinchhuah pui ta hlauh zawk a ni.

Chutih hun lai a Missionary te chanchin leh an awmna kan hriat thei ang ang han târ lang leh ila :

N.E.I.G. Missioonary te chanchin.

Mire ram a Missionary hmasate chanchin hi North Easth India Genaral (NEIG) Mission, tunhma a lo thawk tawhte chanchin bik a ni a; mahse kimchang tak a ziak erawh chu a har hle a, achhan chu; an awm hun chhung leh Mire ram a an rawngbawl dan chanchin ziakna leh an hnuhma hmuh tur a awm mumal loh vangte leh khang hun lai a an chanchin hre chiangtu, an chanchin han zawh tur an awm tawh loh vangte a ni a, heng tuna ka han târ lante hi Mire Pastor Chownglowk-a hnen aṭang a ka lâk leh Pu Zakhuma (Mire ram Missionary) fapa Pu C.Sangliana ziak a ṭangte, Upa T.Lalzara Tlabung hnen aṭangte a ka lâk khawmte a ni. Ka ziak sual palhte a awm a nih chuan chhiartu te’n in mi hriatthiamna ka ngen che u a ni.

19Pastor H.Dala thlanlung Hmunnuam khua a mi

  1. Pastor H.Dala (Haudala) : A ni hi Evan Zakhuma nen Dt, 9 March 1931 Tlabung bul Sirte aṭangin an rawn kal a, Pastor, H.Dala chu Chawngbawt (Chingbawk) khua, ‘Mission veng’ an tihah chuan a awm a, chutah chuan kum hnih a awm hnu in Miza Ngarua khuaah a insawn leh a, kum 1933 – 1941 thlengin chutah chuan a awm a, chuta a awm lai chuan Bible Johana bu mal leh Mire hla 75-te an siam a, chutih lai a amah ṭanpuitu te chu Evan Zakhuma leh Evangelist Teacher Menkrawi(Miria) te an ni a. School pawh an hawng nghal a ni.

20Zirliana thlanlung

Kum 1941-ah Bawm ram Pankhiang khuaah a insawn a, chutah chuan Bawm hnam tan hna ṭha tam tak a thawh hnu in T.B natna in a thi ta a ni. Chumi hnu chuan a nupui Pi, Rozami pawh chu chumi khua vekah chuan a thi ta a ni.

  1. Evan Zakhuma : A ni hi Pastor H.Dala rualin Mire ramah kum 1931-ah a lo kal ve a, Mission khua an tihah chuan kum hnih an awm a, chumi hnu in Ngaringchah khuaah an awm leh a, heta an awm lai hian a fapa pahnihna Zirliana athi a, Zirliana hi Mire ram a Lalpa rawngbawlna a vanga lu phum hmasa ber a ni. Chumi hnuin kum 1941-ah Evan Zakhuma nupui Pi Lalsiamkungi pi (a pa nu), Pi Thanghmuni a thi leh a, Zirliana thlan bulah an phum ve a ni. Hetih lai a an awmna hi tunah chuan kawngpuiin a pal tlang a ni.

He khua-ah hian engemaw chang chuan tuihri te a leng ṭhin a, tuihri vei an khua a an awm tawh chuan ramhnuaiah an tlanbo vek ṭhin a, chung hri an vei ṭhin nachhan chu an khua zin kawng in a paltlang vangah ngai in an khua a ṭanga km 2 a hla, tlâk lamah khaw thar an siam leh a, chu an khaw thar siamah chuan Evan Zakhuma pawh hian in a sa ve a, mahse; ram a buai avangin May 1.1943-ah Bawm ram Mualpui khuaah an awm ta zawk a. Mire ramah hian kum 12 an awm a ni.

21Pi Thanghmuni thlanlung Ngaringchah a mi

Kum 1944 Janary thla chuan an lo awm tawhna Upper Ngaringchah khuaah chuan an hmangaih leh an ngaih em em Miria te kan tur leh an hnen a Pathian thu sawi leh turin Evan Zakhuma chuan a fate pahnih la naupang tak (Afate hian an Pa, an awmna khaw hlui lama kal tur an ngen tlat a vangin) Sangliana leh Rinliana hruai in a zu kal leh a, an khaw mite chuan an lo lawm em em a, Evan, Zakhuma chuan Mire ho chu duhsak tak leh duhthawh takin ni hnih chhung Pathian thu a hrilh a, a fate erawh chu an ṭhiante nen an tual chai in dâi velahte an lo tlâ a.

A ni thum ni chuan khaw dangte fang zel a Pathian thu sawi zel a tum lai-in Evan Zakhuma chu a khua a sik a, khawsikpui alo ni a, a khawsik chu a zual zel a, a fapa naupangte, Sangliana hnenah chuan, “Ka ek a chhuak, min hruai teh,” a ti a, daipawnah a va dailen chuan a ek chu a tui hle mai a, chu chu Mire hovin an hmuh chuan, “Tuihri a vei,” an ti a, ramhnuaiah an tlanbo san ta vek mai a, tlanche ve thei lo tar ho chauh chu inah chuan an awma, nakinah chuan Evan Zakhuma chuan afa pa Sangliana chu a ko va, “Pathian in min kir tir leh thut a nih loh chuan ka kalsan dawn che u a ni, i nu ka va ngai ve le! Ka kalsan che u a nih pawh in i pute lo bel ang che u,” ti in a fapa chu a chah a, chawhnu lam chuan a fapa Sangliana hnenah chuan, “Sangpui, min tung rawh, ka thaw a tawp dawn ta,” a ti a.

A fapa in a han tun chuan a chat thla chu a ni ta der mai a, chumi khua a putarte chuan, “A pang a daih hma in pawnah ṭhangteah (Thil phona) a ruang hi dah a ngai ang, chuti lo chu inchawi a ngai ang,” an ti a. Pathian Pasalṭha ruang chu bawisawmtu pawh awm mumal lovin pawn a ṭhangteah chuan an zalh ta a. An lo khawsak tawhna khua mah ni se, hmun danga an pem tawh si a vangin mikhual an nih tawh miau si a.

Krista pasalṭha chuan a ruang zalh nan in chhung lum a luah phak lo a ni (Mire hnam da nin khual khua a mi in a a thih chuan vawk chawi a ngai a, a fate naupang pawnto rual lek chuan vawk chawi tur an nei dawn si lo.). Tar ho leh a fa naupangte Lalsangliana te unau chuan Krista pasalṭha zalhna tur thlan chu kawngh thleng vel lekin an lai a, chumi ni chuan Evan Zakhuma lei taksa chu a rawng a bawl sakna hmun ngeiah chuan ropui lo takin a fate; (pate khualzin tur ngen a ṭap rual lekte) pahnih leh Mire Putar tlemte te’n Lalpa’n ropui taka a kaihthawh hun nghâk turin mangang leh thlabar a mittui tla chungin an thah liam ta. A hrai leng naupang chumchiap pahnih te’n an Pa tel lova an chhungte hnen an thlen hun chuan Lalpa hliahkhuhna an va han mamawh dawn tehlul em.

Kum 1944 kum tawp lamah chuan Saichalah (Bawrkawlh chhak lamah) Evan, Zakhuma nupui leh a fate chu an pem chhova, chutah chuan kum thum an awm hnuin Chhota Horina Bazar-ah an Pu, Dânga Dahrawk, Evan Challianthanga nau hnenah kum khat an awm leh a, chumi hnu kum 1948 chuan an pianna ram Mizoramah an haw chho ta a ni.

Evan Zakhuma hi Mire ram a rawng a bawl lai hian ṭhahnem a ngai thei hle ṭhin a, Mire ho rilru sak zia leh luhlul zia a hmuhin Evan Zakhuma chuan nun leh chetzia in Kristian nun chu en tir a tum tlat a, Miria te hian tlawmngaih hi an pianpui ve lo emaw tih turin an tlawmngai lo em em mai a, damlo enkawl ngai leh mithi sawngbawlah pawh a theih tawpin hma a hruai zel ṭhin a. Mire hovin lo an neih ngam loh ramhuai awmna ni a an ngaihna hmun a piang mai chu “Leipui hmun a tan,” ti in a vât zel a. Damlo na tak an awmin lo thi ta se Lal Isua ring a thih an duh leh duh loh a zawt zel a, thih dawn ṭepah pawh chhandamna an chang thei a ni tih a hrilh zel a, tual meilum ainaahte, a remchan dan angin Pathian thu a sawi zel ṭhin.

Kum 1941 khan an awmna Ngaringchah khuaah hian sante’npui hri aleng vak mai a, pa valai ngawt pawh chawlhkar khat chhungin mi 7 ngawt an thi a, damchhuak zo lo tura inngai ho khan Lal Isua rin an tum tawh thu sawi in, “Ka hming Kristianah min ziak lut ve rawh,” ti a ngen an awm nual a, chung zing a pakhat; Battua phei chuan, Changlenpa, (Sanglian Pa)dam leh pawh ni ila, lo thi pawh ni ila Lal Isua i tih hi ka ring tho tho ang,” a ti a, mahse a dam chhuak zo ta lo a ni.

22Pastor Rohmingliana

  1. Pastor Rohmingliana : A ni hi Serkawrah Primary School Head Master a ni a, chumi hnuin Ma nipurah Pastor in a awm leh a, chumi hnu in kum 1929-ah Mire ramah a lo kal a, Mire ramah chuan Chawngbawt Mission vengah a awm a, chumi hnu chuan Matamohori lui ruam lamah Ingsa khuaah School din in Evangelist Teacher hna a thawk a, Menkrawi (Miria) nen an thawk dun a, Ingsa khua-ah hian engtia rei chiah nge a awm tih leh Mire ram a a thawh hun chhung chiah hi kan hre chiang thei lo a ni. He khua a ṭang hian a ni awm e Mizoram a ahaw chhoh leh tak ni.
  2. Evan, Saikunga : Kum 1922 – 1928 thleng Mire ramah rawng a bawl a. A ni hi Mire ram a awm hmasa pawl a ni a, a awm lai hian Mire Kristian pathum chiah an la awm a, A awmna hmun chu Chimbawk khuaah a ni, heta an awm lai hian khawsikpui in a na vak mai a, dam chhuak dawn a a inhriat loh a vangin a nupui Pi, Zapuii chu a kova, a nupui hnenah chuan, “Mire ramah ka lu ka phum dawn a, he ka lu phum hi Chanchinṭha lungphum tur a ni. Mire ram a ka lu ka phum a vang hian Mire thangthar lo la awm zel tur te’n Chanchinṭha an la rawn hria ang,” a ti a, Krista Pasalṭha Evan Saikunga chu a khum bulah ṭhingṭhi in a Lalpa hnenah a thlarau a kawl tir a, a ṭawngṭai zawhin a nupui chu chibai a buk a, a hmangaih em em Miriate leh a nupui duh takte chu chatuan ram a intawk leh turin a kalsan ta a ni.

Evan Saikunga hi Mire ram a an awmna Chingbawk khuaah an vui liam ta a, a thlan awmna lai hi tunah chuan motor kawng in a palthang a vangin a thlan lung pawh motor kawng laitu te’n an ti bo tawh a, tunah chuan khawi lai chiah nge a thlan a hriat chian theih tawh lo a ni. A nupui Pi Puii chuan lungleng tak leh khawhar tak chungin an nupa a ṭhahnemngai tak leh duhthawh taka an Lalpa tan rawng an lo bawl ṭhin-na Mire ram chu chhuahsan in Mizoram lamah a haw chhoh a lo ngai leh ta a ni.

23Pi Lalfuali thlan hmun

  1. Evan, Liandanga: Kum 1924 – 1928: A ni hi Mizoram Muallianpui khua a ṭangin Mire ramah an chhungkua in an rawn kal a, a tir chuan ‘Mission veng’ an tih Chimbawk-ah kum khat an awm a, chuta an awm lai chuan Sap nupa NEIG Mission a Missionary Incharge Rev Rosted leh Mrs Ella Rosted te an rawn kal a, NEIG Missinary te chuan an Missionary te chu hmun hran hran a awm tur in an ti a, Evan Liandanga leh a nupui Pi Lalfuali te hi Empu khua a awm tur in an ti a, anni nupa chu Empu khuaah chuan an awm a, heta an awm lai hian Evan Liandanga nupui Pi Lalfuali chu khawsik natna a vangin a thi a, tun a kan thlanmualah hian Krista tan a huaisen tak a hreawm tam tak tuartu chu an vui liam leh ta a, a thlan lung pawh an phun hman lova, a pasal leh a fate chu Mizoramah an haw chho ta a ni. Pi Lalfuali hi nu taima leh lainatna ngah tak mi a ni a, Chownglowk nu nen phei chuan an inkawm ngeih em em a ni. Chownglowka nu chuan, “Hmangaihi nu chu a tlawmngai em em a ni,” ti in afa pa Chownglowka a hrilh ṭhin a ni.
  2. Evan Kawha (Sapkunga) : A ni hi Mahmuam khua Bangladesh Chittagong Hill Tracts a piang a ni a, atleirawl lai in Kristian-ah a inpe a, Kristian a a inpek hnu hian Pathian thu hriltu Siamlianpuia a zui ve ṭhin a. Kum 19 mi a nih in Vangchhe khua a North East India General Mission khawmpuiah a kal ve a, Pastor Dohnuna’n ramthim rawngbawlna atul zia leh a hmanhmawh thlak zia a sermon a, “Kawlkil thleng a buh awmte chu lakkhawm a hun ta e,” tih hla an sak zawh chuan ramthim a kal tura sawmna a siam a, chutia sawmna a han siam a, “Buh seng tur a tam hle si a, tunge sengkhawm turin kal ang?” ahan tih chuan Kawha chu chungmi zozai zingah chuan thlarau bo seng khawm tur chuan sawmna chhangin a ding chhuak ta a, Kawha’n ramthim a vei zia leh kalchhuah a chak zia a han sawi chuan Pastor Dohnuna chuan, “Kha naupang thusawi kha Lalpa’n malsawm sela, achungah Lalpa thatna chu ni angin lo eng rawhse,” ati a. Mipui chuan, “Amen,” an lo ti dual a.

Chumi hnu lawk; kum 1926-ah kum 20 a nih in Mire ramah a kal a, kum 1928-ah Empu khua-ah a rawn awm ve leh a, Empu khuaah hian hun engemaw chen a awm hnu in a hriselna a that loh a vangin a rawngbawlpuite awmna Chimbuk khuaah a awm leh ta zawk a, Empu khua a an awm chhung hian fapa pakhat an nei hman a, chu an fapa hming chu T.Lalhnema a ni a, afapa chuan Mizoramah Componder hna kum 17 a thaw tawh hnu in B.A a zova Ofecer-ah a kai sanga Training tam tak a paltlang hnuah Doble Promoson in Heald Aducation-ah a kai a, chuta ṭangin State Mass Aducation and Madia Ofecer cum DY Director hnaah 1998 ah a panson a, a penson hnuah pawh Sorkar in kum khat an la ruai zui bawk a ni. Tunah hian Aizawl Khatla South ah anupui fanaute nen an cheng a, Apostolic Indian Mission rawngbawlnaah akhaipa zinga mi a ni. Mizoram a zaithiam leh hmelṭha tak mai Feli Thangluah hi a tunu a ni. Evan Kawha nupui chu Pi Biakcha ni a ni.

Mire ram a ṭanga Mizoram a achhoh leh hnu kum 1940-ah Bru leh Chakma zingahte Missionary in ZBM (tun a BCM nita) hnuaiah a thawk leh a, Tiante khuaah a awm a, athawhna apiangah athawhna hnam te’n an ngaina em em ṭhin a, hetia Bru leh Chakma zing a rawng abawl lai hian abial fanna a tangin natna charin a rawng a bawl sak thin a Lalpa hnen a chawl hlen tawh turin ni 22 May 1945 khan alei taksa chu a chhuahsan ta a ni.

Evan Kawha hnukchah lai tak hian Tiante khaw Lalnu Pi Lalziki leh mi tam takin van sang tak a Angel zairi mawi tak an hria a, chung van a zai rimawi hretute chuan, “Kan Tirhkoh chu Angel te’n van kawngkaah an lo hmuak ngei a nih hi,” an ti. (Chanchin tha ramthimah By Upa T.Lalzara Tlabung)

  1. Evan Tleikawnga (Lallawma Pa) : Kum 1926-ah Mizoram Rualalung a ṭangin Mire ramah a rawn kal a, Miza Ngarua khuaah Pastor H.Dala nen an awm a, chuta an awm lai chuan a nupui duh tak Pi Dengzingi leh a hmangaih em em a fapa Sawnluaia te’n an thih san a, chumi hnu chuan Saichal lamah an insawn a, Saichalah chuan hun engemaw chen an awm hnu in Mizoram lamah a haw chho ve leh ta a ni.
  2. Evan Thanghnuaia : A ni hi Champhai lam mi a ni a, Mire ramah Lalpa tan a thlarau bo seng khawm hna thawk turin a kal a, Mire tlang a Mission hmun Chingbawk-ah a awm a, chumi hnu in Matamohori luiruamah hun rei tak a Lalpa tana thlarau bo seng khawm hna a thawk a, mahse; Indopui II buai nasa tak a vang leh ei leh barah harsatna namen lo a tawh a vangin lohtheihloh na in Mire ram chhuahsan in Mizoram lamah a haw chho ve leh ta a ni. A awm kum leh a awm hun chhung chiah hi kan hre thei lo a ni.

24Evan Darkanga thlan

  1. Evan Darkanga : A ni hi Mizoram Ngopa khua aṭangin Miriate thlarau Lalpa zem a seng khawm turin Mire ramah a rawn kal a, Matamohori lui ruamah kum khat Evangelist Teacher in a awm a, Mizoramah chhuti a a kal zawk laiin khawsikpui natna in a thi ta a ni. Amah hi mi huaisen tak leh viak ṭha tak a ni in a aw pawh a ṭha hle a, a thil tih a piang hlim tak leh phur tak a ti ṭhin mi a ni.

25Evan Thangkunga thlanlung Empu khua-ah

  1. Evan Thangkunga : A ni hi Mizoram a ṭangin Mire ramah Lalpa’n a rawngbawlna tura tlang a ruat sakah a hmangaih Lalpa rawngbawl hna thawk turin a rawn kal a, Mire ram a NEIG Mission hmun Chimbawkah hun engemaw chen a awm hnu in an chhungkua in Marking khuaah an awm leh a, he khuaah hian hun engemaw chen an awm a, heta an awm lai hian a nupui duh tak Pi Chemtawii leh a hmangaih em em a fanu Roziki te’n an thih san a.

A nupui leh a fanu te’n an boral san a vangin kum khat chhung chu Evan Zakhuma (Sangliana Pa) te inah an awm a, chuta ṭang chuan Empu khuaah an rawn awm ta a, Empu khua-ah hian kum 1938 – 1940 thleng an awm a, chumi hnuin Mizoram ah chhovin Thuampui khua-ah a awm a. Pi Zaii Lunglei Theiriat khua a mi nen innei leh a ni. Evan Thangkunga hian fanu pathum a nei a, chungte chu Biakhnuni, Roziki leh Lalrokhumi te an ni a, Mire ram a boral ta hi an milai niin kan hria. Amah hi Mire ram a rawn kal leh in, Empu khua ah ni 29 September 1940-ah Empu khuaah a thi a, a thlan pawh tunah Empu khaw thlanmualah a awm.

  1. Evan Neihlaia : A ni hi kum 1939 khan Reng ram Tlangsang khua a ṭangin Mire ramah a rawn kal a, Mire ram a lo kal lai hian a chhungte hruai lovin a rawn kal a, a kum leh 1940 chuan a nupui fanaute rawn hruai in Mire ram Matamohori lui ruamah Singkhung khua-ah an chhungkua in an awm a, chutah chuan hun engemaw chen an awm hnu chuan Mire ramah ṭam a tla a, Indopui II buai a lo nih bawk avangin Mizoramah an chhova, Mizoram aṭang chuan Bawm ram Arthah khua-ah an rawn kal leh a, chutah chuan kum khat a Lalpa tan ṭhahnemngai takin a thawk leh a, heta an awm lai hian a ni pawh chu thawhlehna ṭha lehzual a ropui taka a Lalpa’n a kaithawh leh hun nghâkin a lei taksa chu thlah liam a ni ve leh ta.
  2. Pastor Patlaia :

Zosapthara (Edwin Rowlands) rawngbawlna hnung zui thin tu. An rawngbawl dunna atanga Hla tha tak, Kr.Hlabu No.314 (“Thlalera vak ka lo nih hi”)tih lo pian chhuahna. Zofate zing a Chanchin Tha buh chi Zoram pel a fehchhuahpui hmasatute zinga mi, Pastor Patlaia hi a chanchin ziak turin ka hriatchian ngai mi a ni lo a. A hun hnuhnung lama Lunglei Damdawiin (Civil Hospital)a inentir tura a kal ka hmuh chu a hmel ka hmuh chhun a ni mai a: Chutih laiin BCM Chawngte Kohhran Cente’nary Souvenir buatsaihtu te’n min ngenna zahawm tak erawh theih ang anga tihpuitlin ka han tum a. A tu leh fate leh Upa thenkhatte rawnin kimchang lo takin ka han buatsaih a, Duhthu a sam zo lo ang tih ka ring. Tin, hun rei deuh tawh leh Chhinchhiahna mumal awm lo a ni a, hriat dan a inang lo maithei. Hei hi ka chhui theih chin aṭanga ka hriat dan a ni.

Pastor Patlaia hi kum 1893 khan S.Bungtlangah a pianga. Chhakchhuak hnam a ni a. A pa chu Chalchhuaka a ni a, Chalchhuaka pa hi Khuangkhaia a ni a, Khuangkhaia pa chu Lianlula a ni a. A nupui chu Chuaubuangi a ni a. Nula hmelṭha tak, pangti senno chek mai, a nih avanga ‘Senbuangi’ ti a koh lar zawk mah a ni. Kum 1917 Indopui I naah Tangrual Sipai a ṭangin France ramah ral runin a kal a. Indopui a lo reh chuan a lo hawng ve leh a, hei hi 1918 a ni.

Kum 1906-a Pastor Zathanga leh a thiante’n Khasi ram harhna an rawn puakchhuah zar zoin Piantharna a chang ve a. Chuta ṭang chuan Bawm leh Pang leh Mire ram hi a vei em em a. Kum 1919 vel khan NEIG Kohhran chuan Mire hnam zinga thawk turin Tirhkoh atan a ruai ta a ni. Hetah hian amah mai niloin Kuaichika te, Zachhawna te nen an thawkho a. Kum 1921 Zotlang Presbytery Inkhawmpui lian chhimin a thiante nen NEIG Kohhran aṭangin an rawn chhim nghe nghe a ni (India, Burma Bangladesh Mizo kohhrante Chanchin p152 By B. Lalthangliana)

Chawngbawt tlang (E. Pakistan, tuna Bangladesh ram ni ta tunah chuan Chimbuk tlang an ti) khuaah bul ṭa nin awmhmun a bengbel a.(Chimbuk tlangah hian engtia rei nge a awm kan hre lo) Chuta ṭang chuan Pangkhiang khuaah a insawn a. Chuta a awm lai chuan a fapa ‘Bawmtawna’ chu a thi a. A thawhna ram mite chuan, “Vawk i talh loh chuan, thlan kan laih sak lovang che,” an tih avangin vawkpui a talh ta a. Chuti chung pawh chuan amahin a bula ṭan hma chuan an lai duh lo va. Amahin bul a ṭan hnuah chuan an pui ve duh chauh a ni. Chumi hnu lawkah chuan Tharte khuaah Biakin hawngin a kal a.

An Biakin hawn lai chuan, ram aṭangin Sakhi hi an rawn phur hawng a. Fiamthuin, Biakin hawnna ruai sa atan i hmang mai ang u hming a lo ti a,” Chu chu ngaithiam lovin, Chem-sen lek a sah an rawn tum ta mai a. An inkara remna zawnga banphar tute zarah buaina lian tham a thleng ta em lo a ni. A thawhna hmuna chengte thlarau hi a thim hmel hle mai. Tuikuk (Bru) zinga ka thawh laiin, an rawngbawltu pakhat chuan ti hian a sawi. “ Keimahni Tuikuk khua chu thim em mai, Tirhkoh Paula meuh pawh kha lo kal se la, Meichher eng tak chhit loh chuan lo kal thleng thei bik lovang maw le,” a tihte pawh min hriatchhuah tir e. Pastor Ruala a chawlh tak avangin a hmunah Patlaia chu Pastor puitlinga hlankai niin Full Superinte’ndent-ah a awm hnuin Saichal Area chhung Lunginkhar-ah an sawn a. Lunginkhar hi Headquarter a hmangin, Middle School te an din a.

He School-ah hian, chunglai hmuna awm Bawm mai ni loin Tlabung aṭangte, Sirte aṭangte, Mauzam aṭangte leh Chawngte Area aṭangte, Mire hnam aṭangtein mi tam takin lehkha an rawn zir nghe nghe a ni. Kum 1960 aṭang chuan Kohhra nin an chhawr thei ta lova. Saichal-ah insawnin, a kum leh (1961) ah Kanghmunah a pem leh a. 1962-ah Chawngte-ah pem lehin, 1963-ah Tlabung khuaah a pem leh ta a ni.

Tlabung khua a a awm lai hian natna khirh tak Cancer-in a tlakbuak a. Lunglei Civil Hospitalah hun rei tak enkawl a nih hnuin 20.2.1968-ah kum 75 mi niin Thih leh nat awm tawh lohna ramah Lalpa tana a lo thawhrimna chu a chawlhsan ta a. A tupa Pu C. Zasiama’n a ruang lain Serkawn thlanmualah ropui taka vuiliam a ni ta. A hriatrengna Lungphun thlanmual hluiah hmuh theihin a la awm.

Pastor Patlaia hian tu leh fate engemawzat a nei a. Chung zingah chuan, Sawrkar hna pawimawh tak tak thawkte, Kohhran leh Khawtlang tana mi ṭangkai tak takte engemawzat an awm a. Dr. Remsangpuia Ph.D tuna China rama an nupa a missionary a awm mek te hi a tute zinga mi a ni nghe nghe. Rawngbawltute thawhrimna chu an tu leh fateah malsawmna tam takin a lang chhuak thin.

Chawngte a Upa thenkhat sawi dan chuan, kum 1908-1910 vel khan, S. Lungrang khuaah a awm a. Mual a Pathian thu sawi turin an tir a a sawi ngam lo va. Pu Chuauzika (Kuaichika ti a an hriat lar zawk) khan a sawi ta zawk a. Lungrang Lal chuan a vaw ta hrep a, tih te. Kum 1911-12 vel khan Chawngteah an chhungkuain an awm tih te an sawi.

(Pastor Patlaia ropui zia tilang chiang zualtu chu Pu Buanga nena lehkha an inthawnna thu Kristian Tlangau 1922 December thla ami hi a niin ka hria ka han tarlang tel e)

Pu Duh tak,

He ka thu zawh duh che hi thu sei deuh tur a ni a, tun hnua Lalpa Sipai huaisen lo la chhuak turte pawhin an hriat duh ve ka rin avangin, ka zawhna che leh i mi chhanna thu hi a rem chuan Kristian Tlangau-ah chhuah nise.

Lalpa tirhin Sap ho hi tuifinriat ral atangin ram hla taka awm keini Mizo fate hnam âtzia leh naupangchhia ang a, thil ṭha duhna chang pawh hre ngai lo chu Puitling rilru min rawn puttir a. Finna tui fim, hmangaihna thli vawt chhandamna kim, Mamsawmna hlu Lal Isua thilthlawn pek chu min lo hmuhtir ta a. Tin, Lusei hnam chauh ni loin khawmualpui hmun tinreng amite, mi that, sa kap a pialral kai tum hnam leh mihring sate hmeh ṭha ber a ngai ṭhin hnam ngei chu Krista Chanchin Ṭhain a lo khat zo ta a. Tunah chuan Gospel thlan chhuahna Pathian Tirhkoh ṭha tak tak lo chhuahna hmun chu a lo ni ta zawk.

Hei vang hian Pathian leh Missionary zawng zawng chungah leh kan Lusei ram ngei a lo chhuak chhim leh hmar a mite hnenah lawmthu hril chungin he Bawm hnam kan Lusei hnam aimah a â (fing lo) tih theih ho enkawl dan tur hi ka zawt che a ni.

Bawm ho hi an chanchin tam tak chu i hnenah ka ngeiin ka hrilh tawh che a. Amaherawhchu, keini mi rilru tè te tan chuan thil engkim hi Pathian tih theih a ni tih hre mah ila heng an nungchang hlui ngainatna Roman Catholic dan ang a, an pi leh pute thu rochhiah an vawn ngheh zia hian rilru a tibeidawng dawn dawn thin a ni.

  1. Pawn lamah mihring thuawih angin lang mahsela, an rilru chuan Rûn ral a la chhun.
  2. An Dawizepna hian thil ṭha a hliah vek.
  3. An zu hehna hi finna kawng khartu a ni.

Heng pathum ka rawn tarlan hian an rilru awmdan a huam vek a ni ber mai.

Sawrkar lo awp lohna hian nu leh pa thu awih lo fahrah Fa a ti ang deuh a ni. Ka rilru a hmanhmawh avang ni e. An zingah hian chamchi–in hnathawh a harsa hrih hle. Chuvangin zawi zawiin naupangte tal hi zirtir ila hriatna bul a lo ni thei ang chu, tiin ka awm tirh atang khan zan men lai chhung chauh sikul ka neihpui hram a. Chhunlamah chuan hnathawh an duh a, “kan zir hman lo,” an ti a. Chawlhni pawhin kan zir thei lo a ni.

Zu zuk an ching êm èm mai a, zan sikulah takngial pawh chuan, naupang ho chu an zu in duhin bân min dil min dil thin a ni. Tin, ven sen an ni lova, Lalpa hnen a hming pe ti a kan lawmna berte pawh chuan, kan khawilo nih hlan te hian upa te’n an lo sawithaih ṭhin avangin zu an lo in leh a, “Ka u kan chhuak leh mai ang e, keini Bawm fa zawng kan chhiat kan that ni hian zu hi kan engkim tihna a ni a, kan do thei lovang, kan thiante’n min pek chuan, hnial zia a awm lo,” an ti hulhual thin. “Kan lehkha zir pawh hi Miria, Mirang, Kawr ho leh nangni angin kan thiam ve lovang,” ti hian an inngaihtuah beidawng a, Sikul bân leh hi min dil min dil ṭhin a ni. Kawng ṭhenkhatah chuan, “Kan lehkha zir hi kan bân leh vek chuan Sap ho hi an hrilh ang a min tantir vek mai ang,” tih te an hlau ṭhin. Tin, an upa ho chuan, “Lehkhathiam chu KANDIA (Mahadmagandi) dovin an kalpui vek ang che u, an lo ti ṭhin a,” an mangang letling phian thin a ni.

Han vin deuh ila, duh loh mai mai hi an hmang a, han thlemin nelawm tak hmel pu ila, min pawisa si lo va. Hetih avang hian, mihring lak theih loh van thiltihtheihna ko thla theitu tawngtai sakna leh tunhma lama hnam mawl in lo kilkawi dan thenkhat tal kan hre duh a, unau tinrengte tawngtai sakna kan ngai em em a ni.

He Ram hi kawng engkimah a vanduaiin a khawngaihthlak a ni. Thih te hi an hlau bik mang e, tih turin an awm Damlohna hri bawlhhlawhin a khat a, an hri veite:- (1) Thek, (2)Phar (3) Pheitumlian, (4) Thawchham (5) Kapkâr nâ. Heng pangate hi chhak lama leng ngai lo zawng a ni. Tin, khang lama hri leng ang kha chu a awm ve vek tho. Heng hrite hi an Dangpuithu leh Nghathu dang reng reng an eiluat niin ka hria. Tin, Luite tui kang chat phuan var biah buah te hi an chawhmeh zawng hian kal an ching em em a. Hengah hian Phar leh Thek leh Uithak an chhar ber niin ka hria.

Nimahsela, heng natna zawng zawng hi an lo tuarin, Ramhuai tihnatah vek an ruat a, “In thil ei that loh leh in thil khawih that loh vang a ni,” tiin han hrilh mah ila, awih àwm takin an awm a, an rilru hian an awih lo êm èm a ni. An vela hnam ṭhenkhat te’n, damdawi han zuar sela, “Kan lei ngam lo, inthawina a dâl, a hriin a hua ang,” an ti mai ṭhin. Heti êm a âtna leh sual thuneihna hi Lal Isua thuneihna leh Hmangaih finna hian rawn làn thuai thuai turin in mi tawngtaipuina kan ngen em em a ni. He Bawm ramah hian sualna te lo tlawmin ṭhatna lo sang deuh deuh rawh se.

I khawngngaih, Patlaia

m

PU BUANGA CHHANNA:

Patlaia

Ka nau duh tak,

I thu min zawh chu ka hriat ang angin ka han chhang ang .

Bawm ho awm dan hi i sawi angin Mizoram kan lo luh tirh ang deuh tak khan ka lo hria a. Anmahni vei a i rilru mangan ziate pawh keimah ang kha i ni bawkin ka hria a ni. Zorama kan luh tirh chuan pa te hian Kristian nihna lam hi an ngâisâng lo em em a,. An dan pangngai an la ngaina em em a ni. Kristian ni tur hian an lang lo ve. Tunlai thangtharte hian hmanlai Zo hnam mawlzia hi an hrechiang lo va, tunlai hian Isua Krista hming avangin awihlote hnenah pawh awmdan danglam daih a ni tawh.

Hmanlai Zo hnam awmzia kha ulh tak leh la thianghlim lo tak chu Lalpa Isua hmingin Thlarau Thianghlim tanpuinain, beidawng hauh lovin ka beisei ṭhin a ni. Tin, Sap kan ni a, hnamdang Zoram amite rilru putzia leh awmdan hi kan hre lo hle si a. Tin kan awmrenga rei tak pawh Pathian hnena mite hruai thei mai loin kan awm a, a chang chuan beidawn thlak hle mai, beidawnna rilrute kan lo pu bawk ṭhin. Mihring ngaih mai chuan kan lo chhuah tirh lai Zo hnam hi Pathian thu hrilh hi a sak a, sawt lo angin a lang a ni.

Paulan, “Thil ṭha tih i ning lovang u khai, kan inthlahdah loh zawngin a hun takah chuan kan seng dawn si a,” a tih angin, hmangasihna a beidawng lovin kan bei kan bei zel a. Tichuan Krista thu nung kan theh chu mite rilru thuk lamah chuan a lo dah ta zawk a ni. Paula chuan, “Nau vei angin ka vei che u,” a ti. Nuin nau a vei a, a chângin an chhiat a, a piangsual thei bawk a, nimahsela, lawmna lam hi a ngah zawk fo thin.

Chutichuan, nang pawhin tunah hian Bawm ho hi na takin i vei tih ka hriatpui che a. A changin keini ang bawk chuan tih rual loh beidawn thlak takin i hria ang. Nimahsela, keini Sap ai hian Zo hnahthlak hian heng in vel amite rilru put zia hi in hmu awl thei a, an thlek zia in hre thuai thei. Keini Sapte ai chuan awlsam takin mite Pathian lamah in hruai thei zawk a ni. Theihtawpin Lalpa Isua Krista tan mi tam tak in lo ngam thei ngei ang tih ka ring a ni.

In tan lawmawm ka tih chu mitthite hian thlarau nung an neih tih an hriat hi a ni. Taksa thi mahse, thlarau a nung reng tih an rin hi a ni. An hnenah Krista ram thu thlen a remchangin, in tan a lawmna pakhata ni. A dang chu an Kristianna an ban dawnin nangmahni an dil che u hi; nu leh pa angin an ngai che u a, a lawmawm a ni . Chuti ni lo sela an mahni thuin an bang mai ang.

He Bawm ram hi theihtawpin Krista hmangaihna kengin beidawng lo va bei zui zel a ṭul ni berin ka hria. Rei lo deuh chinah chuan Krista chuan mi tam tak a hnenah a la pakaitir ang.

Zoram a kan thawh dan hetiang hi a ni. A tirin lo vât vât ang kan ni a, chumi hnuah chuan buh chi theh theh lehin chuan, Pathian in a Thlarau Thianghlim ruahpui a rawn surtir a, buh chi theh chu nasa takin a lo tiak a, a lo pung a, a lo hlawk ta a ni. Chutiangin rei fe atan engmah hmu mang lovin thlarau Thianghlim ring ringawtin kan thawk a. Pathian lehkhabu taima takin kan zirtir a, nakinah Lalpa Pathian remtih hun a lo thleng ta a. Kan rin ai a nasain a Thlarau chuan a tifing zo ta.

Chutiangin, nangmahni pawh, lo vât chu inla ni rih a. Thlai chi tuhin Pathian lehkhabu thu hi lo zirtir fo ula. Zoram angin nakinah hrilhfiahtu Thlarau chuan a la rawn thawk leh ang tih ka ring a ni.

Aizawl a kan awm tirh chuan, Isua khenbeh thla hi mite ka entir a, an nuih an nuih mai a. Ka entir duh leh ta ngai lova. Tunah erawh chuan, chumi thla chu mi tam takin tih tak zet a an ngaihhlut a lo ni ta zawk. Chuti angin, tunah engmah lo angin lang mahsela, in chi tuh chu Thlarau vin a to-tir ang. In hnathawh zawng zawng te hretu Isua Krista chuan thihna hlim kawr a mi ên zel turin ṭanpui che u rawh se.

I pu,

Pu Buanga

Serkawn

Upa T.Lalzara

Tlabung

Pastor Patlaia chanchin Upa T.Lalzara Tlabung ziak hi a ma ziak angin ka dah a ni, ama zarah Pastor Patlaia chanchin leh Mire ram a Missionary nitur a a luh kumte kan hriat phah a, Bawm hnam Kristian an nih hma nun leh Kristian an lo nih tan dante kan hriat phah bawk a, Upa T. Lalzara chungah ka lawm takmeuh a ni. Upa T.Lalzara Lalpa’n malsawmin vengin kaihruai zel a a dam khua lo sei zel turin duhsakna ka hlan e.

Bangladesh a kan unau Bawm hnamte hian hmelma pa setana bawih a, thim zinga chanchinṭha hre lova an awm chu kum 1919 khan Mizo Krista pasalṭha Pastor Patlaia te’n Pathian aṭanga thinlung taka hmangaih a veiin harsatna leh hreawm tam tak tuarin chanchinṭha an lo hrilh a, Mizo Krista pasalṭha Missionary-te thawhrimna leh an tawrhnate chu Lalpa’n mal a sawm a, Bawm hnamte chu za-a za Kristian an lo ni ta a ni.

Pathian malsawmna pawh an dawng nasa hle nghe nghe a. Mahse an ni chuan chu chu hre duh lovin sap pa Edwin Rowlands Mizoram a ṭanga Burma kal turin 1918 khan akal kawng a Bawm khaw pakhat-ah ariak a, chu chu Bawm ho chuan an hnen a chanchin ṭha thlentu hmasa ber (Missionary hmasa ber) a puangin sailungvarin a limte an siam a, kum 2018 khan ropui takin Gospel Sentenary an lawm nghe nghe a ni. An Gospel Sentenary a tel turin sap pawh an sawm nual a, kei pawh a bul a ṭanga a tawp thlengin ka awm ve a, anmahni thim ata êng a hruaichhuaktu, Mizo Missionary-te hming reng an lam ri lova. Bandarban a Pu Thanzama’n (Mizo) Bawm hnam thim ata eng a hruaichhuaktu leh mi engemaw zat te’n chanchinṭha a vanga Bawm ram a an lu an lo phum tawh ziate a sawi hnuah Rev, Paksim (Bawm) in an Mizo Missionary te chanchin tlemte arawn sawi bâk chu an mahni thim ata êng a hruai chhuaktu an Missionary Mizo chanchin sawi chhuaktu reng an awm lo kha a mak ka ti in ka rilru a lo na ngawih ngawih a, Pathian rilru phei chu engang takin na ang maw. Khang Missionary-te kha Lalpa ngaiha milian an ni si a.

Bangladesh a Bawm hnam hian an Missionary, anmahni thim ata êng a hruai chhuaktu Mizote chawimawi leh hriat reng ai chuan hman a an Missionary Pastor H.Dala’n Pathian thu zirna alo din tawh, ama hming chawi a Haudal Baible Seminary tia an lo dah tawh pawh a tu leh faten ahming ama ziakdan anga ‘Haudala’ ti a dah tur a an ngen avangin ahming pum tibo in anmahni hmangaih em emtu an Missionary Pastor Haudala hming chu an thai bo leh ta ni.

Bawm ṭhalaite mi thenkhat chu India-ah Pathian thu an zir a, an ram a an rawn haw chuan sap te dawrin Kohhran thar an din a, tunah hian Bangladesh a Bawm khua chu Biakin in a khat a ni ringawt mai, inkhawm tur mihring awm mumal silovin. Ring lo te pawh in Bawm hnam tlemte zing a Kohhran pawl hrang (Biakin) tam lutuk chu mak an ti hial a ni. Hnam tlemte zingah Kohhran pawl hrang atam em a vangin a eng kohhran mah chak lovin sum pathianna bawih-ah an tang zota. Eng tikah tak Bangladesh a kan unau Bawm hnamte hi harh chhuak ang maw?

Hetia kan unau Bawm chanchin ka ziak duah nachhan chu an ni hi Mizo hnahthlak an ni a, Mizo Missionary hmasate a ṭanga chanchin ṭha êng a lo awm a Kristian lo ni ta an nih a vang leh Bawm ram a Missionary hmasa Pastor Patlaia chanchin kan ziak ta sa sa a, chuvangin thil nih phung leh awm dan ka han ziak lang a ni e.

Mire ram a, Krista Pasalṭha lu lo phum tawhte :

  1. Evan Saikunga.
  2. Evan Zakhuma
  3. Pi Lalhmunthangi. (Evan Zakhuma nupui Pi Lalsiamkungi Pi ‘a pa nu’)
  4. Evan Thangkunga
  5. Roziki (d/o. Thangkunga)
  6. Pi Lalfuali.(W/o.Liandanga)
  7. Pi Dengzingi. (W/o.Tleikawnga)
  8. Sawnluaia. (S/o.Tleikawnga)
  9. Pi Thanveli (W/o. Menkrowi)
  10. Evan darkanga hi Mire ram a a thawh mek lai in Mizo ram a a chhoh zawk laiin Mizo ramah a thi a ni.

Mizo Krista pasalṭha kal hmasate khan kan unau Miriate thlarau boral tur chhanchhuak turin hreawm tamtak tuarin mi heti zawngte hian Mire ramah Lalpa tan an nunna hlu tak an lo hlan tawh a, Field mal khaiah chuan Mire Field hi Mizo; Lalpa tan a rammute luphum tamna ber a ni hial awm e.

26Empu khua Biakin

Evan Saikunga’n a lo sawi ang ngei in tunah chuan Mire thangtharte chuan Lalpa an lo ringin Mire ram hmun hrang hrangah Biakin a ding tawh in Empu khua ngeiah pawh Biak in mawi leh ropui tak a ding luah tawh bawk a ni. Zaipawl hial pawh kan lo nei ta. Krista Pasalṭha te’n lu an lo phum tawh avang leh Chanchinṭha a vanga an tawrhna leh an thihna chuan Mire ramah rah ṭha chu a chhuah ngei a ni tih mit ngei a hmutu ka ni e.

Keini thangthar, Lalpa tan a aṭul hun a pianga thawk tura inpeihsate hian engemawti zawng tal pawhin kan mihuaisen kal hmasate’n hma min chhawp hi kan chhunzawm dawn lawm ni. Kan mi huaisen kal hmasate hmabâk, Mire ramah thawh tur a la tam hle si a. “Mire ramah lo kai la min pui rawh,” ti in min la au reng a ni.

MIRE RAM MISSIONARY HMASA TE’N RAWNG AN BAWLNA A HARSATNA AN TAWH THENKHATTE

  1. Kan Pi Pu te kha mi lulâk ching an lo nih kha a lo thang thui viau mai a, kan unau Miria te hian a ṭha lo zawngin min lo hmelhriat daih tawh mai a, chuvang chuan kan Missionary hmasate khan Mire ram an zuk thlen thlak khan Mire hote chuan an lo nel lo hle mai a, an rawngbawlnaah nasa takin harsatna an tawh phah a ni.
  2. Inkal pawhna (Communication) a ṭha lo hle bawk a, chu vang chuan harsatna tam tak an tawk a ni.
  3. An hlawh a tlem hle hlawm a, ṭhenkhat chuan khatih hun lai a pawisa Rs 8/10 te an hlawh a, engemaw changin ṭamte a tla in, inkal pawhna a ṭhat loh em a vangin hlawh pawh ahun takah an hmuh theih loh chang a tam ang tih a rin theih a ni.
  4. Ram a la changkan loh em avangin natna leh hri leng a tam a, damdawi hmang a inenkawlna (treatrmant) ṭha an tlakchham em avangin Missionaryte an inhloh tam phah ni in a lang.
  5. Miria te hi khaw khatah in tlem te te in an awm ṭhin a,. Hemi a vanga harsatna hi chu tun thleng hian kei ni pawhin kan la tawk a ni.
  6. Miria te hi hnam luhlul tak leh lungrual lo tak an ni a, midang/hnamdang tihdan zir duh lo hnam an ni bawk. Chuvangin hetih hun lai a Missionary te tan ram lâk a harsat tur zia chu Pastor Chownglowka (Miria) chuan “Missionary hmasa te’n Mire ram a rawng an bawl lai kha chuan mite an luhlul in an sak em em a, lung bang sut aimah in harsa zawk hial ang,” a ti a ni. An luhlul leh an mawl a vanga thlahthlam chu Lalpa hmaah chhuanlam a tling si lo.

Mahse Krista Pasalṭha te’n Mire ram a Chanchinṭha meichher an lo chhit tawh chu kan Pathian thu in, “Maichamah mei a nung reng anga, a mit tur a ni lo.” a lo tih tawh angin tun thleng hian Chanchinṭha mei chu mit lovin a alh zual zel a, tunah chuan hmun tam tak a kâng kâi tawh a, Mire hnam sing ruk velah Kristian mi sangkua leh zahnih velh lai chu an awm ve tawh a ni. Empu khua-ah phei chuan Biakin ropui tak a ding luah tawh a ni. Chanchinṭha meichher chhi eng zau zel tur chuan Mire ramah thawh tur a la tam hle a ni.

Mire hnam zing a lehkha zir hmasa ber chu Klownglai-a a ni a. A ni hi NEIG Mission hnuaiah Evangelist in a thawk a, NEIG Mission a awm tawh loh hnuah pawh Malumghat Baptist Mission hnuaiah Evangelist hna hi a la thawh chhunzawm zel a ni. Adawttu chu Menkrawi a ni a. A ni hi NEIG Mission sikulah ztitirtu in an hmang nghal a ni. Chutih hun lai a an Sikul awmna chu Miza Ruaza Para-ah a ni a, Bandarban aṭanga Mire ram lam a kal in mei 16, tun a C.M.B Banglow tlak lam a awm a ni, tunah chuan chumi hmunah chuan khua a awm tawh lo. Mire ram a NEIG Mission in chumi hmun a Sikul an siam chu kum 1939 bawr vel kha a ni. Chu Mission School ah chuan Missionary fate pawh an kal nual a, chung Missionary fa, chu mi hmun a sikul kalte chu hengte hi an ni.

  1. Pastor H.Dala fate : 1. Kamlia ni. 2. Thangliana.

3. Remlala.

  1. Evan Zakhuma fate : 1. Sangliana. 2. Rinliana.
  2. Evan Tleikawnga fate: 1. Lallawma. 2. Thantlaii.

3. Singmen.

  1. Evan Thangkunga fa : Biakhnuni.
  2. Chuta Mire naupang lehkha zir ve te:

27Mire Kristian hmasa ber Klownglai thlan Empu-ah

  1. Chownglowk. 2. Laikowi. 3. Khamlai, 4. Klownglai Dawlapow, 5. Menkrawi Dawlapow, 6. Angka Kolodain Atuang, 7. Menpiaw Kuaichah, 7. Tumsek Simlung (Hmeichhia) te an ni a, heng mite bâkah pawh hian duh chang chang a sikul kal ve ṭhinte pawh an awm nual bawk. NEIG Mission hun lai a Miaria lehkha zirte an chanchin han chhui leh deuh bik ila.
  1. Klownglai Dawlahpow A ni hi Mire ram a sikul a kal hnu in Tlabung bul Sirte khua-ah pawl ruk thleng a kal a, a nau Menkrawi Kristian-ah a siam a, Menkrawi chu Mire ram a sikul a kal hnu in Churochanpur-ah sikul a kal tir leh nghal a. Klownglai chu NEIG Mission hnuai a Tirhkoh hna a thawh hnu in Malumghat Baptist Mission hnuaiah Tihrkoh hna a thawh chhunzawm leh nghal a ni. A ni hian fapa 2 anei a, chung afapa pahnih chu Mangchowng leh Mangling te an ni a, anni hi tunah hian Dingte khua a kan Kohhran ban pawimawh tak an ni.

28Menkrawi nupui Pi Thanveli thlanlung Empu khua ami

  1. Menkrawi Dawlapow : Churochanpur-ah sikul a kal zawh hnuin Mire ramah NEIG Mission hnuaiah Evangelist Teacher hna a thawk a. Pastor H. Dala nupui Pi Rozami nau Pi Thanveli nupuiah a nei a, Pi Thanveli hi a naupan lai aṭanga Mire ram a awm a ni a. A ni nen hian fa 3 an nei a. An fa upa ber chu Kamdingliana a ni a,’ Dingte’ tiin an kova. Chutih lai a an awmna chu Boli Bazar leh Thanchi inkaraah a ni a, Chu khua chu tun thleng hiang ‘Dingte’ khua an la ti a. He khuaah hian kan Kohhran (BCM) Pastor Quarter ṭha tak awm a, Thanchi Aria Field Supervisor Pastor Lawmtliha’n a ṭhut chilh a ni.

Menkrawi hi Kristian hmasa niin Evangelist Teacher hial nimahse, rinna kawngah a chak lo hle a, a hun tawp lamah phei chuan Kristian a chhiar ngam loh khawpin a tlachhia a, Afate pawh pakhatmah Kristian-ah a siam thei lova, tunhnu a kei nin an khua kan awp tak hnu hian a fa naupang ber tih loh chu atu te nen Kristianah an awm vek tawh a ni. Afa naupang ber Khamlai-a chu Budish a la ni.

  1. Angka Kolodain Atuang : A ni hi Churochanpur-ah pawl hnih thleng lehkha azir a, Mire ramah a rawn kir leh a, a nau Chownglowk Kristian-ah siam a, lehkha a zirtir nghal bawk. A ni Angka hi chuan Pathian rawng a bawl thu kan hre lo.
  2. Menpiaw Kuaichah : A ni hi Churochanpur-ah pawl thum thleng lehkha a zir a, Mire ram a a rawn haw leh hnuin Pathian rawng a bawl duh lova, a hun tawp lamah phei chuan a hnu ngai, ramhuai biakna lamah a kir leh a, a thih thleng in Lalpa lam a hawi lehtawh lo.
  3. Laikowi Saula : Churochanpurah pawl hnih thleng lehkha a zir hnu in Bawm ram a NEIG sikul ah pawl thum a zo leh a. A ni hian achipui Miriate zingah a phak ang tawkin a chhandamtu Lalpa rawngbawl hna a thawk a, Bawm khua-ah awmin a tu leh fate pawh Kristian an ni vek.
  4. Tumsek Simlung (Hmeichhia) : A ni hi a nu nen a hmeithai an ni a, a ke a zen avangin Missionary te’n an inah lehkha an zirtir ṭhin a, Chumi hnuin NEIG sikul Churochanpur-ah pawl khat thleng lehkha a zir ve a. Mire ram a a rawn kir leh hnu chuan a ke a zen avangin Lalpa rawngbawl hna a thawk thei lova, mahse Bible a ngaina em em a, a thih dawn thleng in Bible chhiar a thlah lo a ni.
  5. Chownglowk Kolodain Atuang : Apa hming chu Nüdowi a ni a, ‘Nüdowi’ tih awmzia chu, ‘midang engahmah ngai lo’ tih na a ni. Nudowi fapa Chownglowk hming awmzia chu “Amah chiah hi mi a tling” tih na a ni. An pafa hming hi a dangdai em avangin ka han tar lang ve hrim hrim a ni.

29Pastor Chownglowk

Apa Nüdowi hi an khua Kharbari a ni a, a ni Chownglowk hi an unau sawm leh pakhat zinga a sawmna a ni a. Kum 1928 January thla-ah apiang a, kum 11-mi a nihin Mire ram NEIG sikulah lehkha a zir a, kum 1942-ah Ma nipur State a NEIG Mission sikulah lehkha a zir leh a. Heta lehkha a zir lai hian Pachhunga nen an inkawmna aṭangin Thlarau lam a piantharna a chang a.

A lehkha zir lai hian Kristian a nih a vangin a chhungte’n an ngaihsak duh lova, hreawm a ti viau na in Kristian a nih tawh avangin a chhungte ngaihsak lohna pawh chu chhel takin a tuar zel a. Lalpa ṭanpuina in a zirlaiah pawh atluang hle a ni.

British leh Japan indo buai a vangin kum 1943-ah Bawm ram Pankhiang khua-ah Primary a zir zawm a, Primary a zir zawh hnu in Churochanpur-ah Junior High School a kal chhunzawm leh a, chuta lehkha a zir lai chuan an zirtirtu Rev Lalthanliana’n an ram a haw leh a a chipuite hnen a Lalpa rawng a bawl theih nan a chipui, Miria te inchei dan a inchei chu ṭha zawk dawn in a hrilh a; bâkah, chutiang a Mire inchei a a inchei loh chuan nupui pawh a hmu thei dawn lo a ni tih a hre nghal bawk a. Chutia lehkha a la zir lai chuan a sam a zuah a, a chhipah a zial ngoh mai a ni.

Junior High School a zawh hnu chuan an ramah a haw leh a, nupui nei in a nun chu a lo inthlahdah deuh a ni ang, ringlomi ang main a tlusawp ta hle mai a, a nupuite ṭhen in nupui dangte a nei a, ramhuai puithiamah hialah a ṭang leh ta mai a. Mahse Lalpa mihriat, piangthar tawh leh a chipuite zinga Lanpa’n a rawngbawl tura a belruat a nih a vangin Lalpa’n a tlukna a ṭang chuan a kaitho leh a. Mire hnam zinga Lalpa rawngbawltu ṭangkai tak leh Kohhran ban pawimawh tak a lo ni leh ta a ni.

A u Angka ang main huan thlai siam lamah a tui em em mai a, huan thlai siam turin midangte pawh a zirtir in a ṭanpui nasa hle ṭhin a. Kohhran pawh an lo pung zel a. Chutih hun lai chuan NEIG Mission a awm tawh loh avangin Mission hrang hrang a bel kual a, mahse eng Mission mahin a duh angin Mire Kristiante chu an enkawl thei lova, chuvangin kum 1978 khan rinna a anmahni hringtu Mizo te bawk chu anmahni enkawl tura sawm turin Mizo ramah a kal a.

Chutih hun lai a Zoram Baptist Mission (Z.B.M) hruaitu Rev C.L. Hminga a rawn bia a, mahse chutih lai chu Mizoram chu rambuai a la nih a vang leh Mire ram chu Bangladesh a awm a nih a vangte, Chakma hel ho avangin ram buai an ni ve tho si a, kawng a la inhawng thei rih lova. Mahse, Miria te’n an mamawh em em; NEIG Mission hun lai a Mire ṭawnga an lo dah tawh Johana bu mal chu Z.B.M chuan emergency in J.B.Printing Press-ah Copy sangkhat lai an lo chhut sak a.

Aizawl lamah Pastor pakhat (he Pastor hi a hming kan hre lo) in copy sanghnih lai a lo siamsak ve bawk a, Chu chu Presbyterian Kohhran in Mire ram a phur thla turin Lunglei thleng an rawn dah bawk a. Hla Pastor H.Dala te lo lehlin, Evan Lalṭhuama’n a bu a a buatsaih pawh bu tam tak an chhut sak bawk a. An mamawh em em Chanchinṭha Johana bu mal leh hlabu; hla 75 awmna chu Lalpa’n Mizo te hmangin Miria te a pe leh ta. Lalpa chu fakin awm rawh se.

Pastor Chownglowka’n Beiseina sang tak nen a Miria te thlarau bo chhanchhuak tur leh thlarau lam a an puitlin ve theih nan a anmahni enkawl tura Mizo Kristian te a sawmna chu ahlawhtlin tak loh a vangin a beidawng em em a, a mah alo upa tawh bawk nen, chakna reng a nei tawh lova. chutih lai-in Mizo-te a auh aṭanga a kum 13-naah Lalpa’n kei achhiahhlawh tling lo tak mai hi Mire ramah chuan min tir thla a ni.

Pastor Chownglowka’n an hnam thlarau bo chhanchhuak a enkawl tura a lo bei sei em em Mizo min han hmu chu a hlim em em mai a, Kohhran angin Mizo te’n Mire ramah hma la thei rih lo mah ila a beiseina Lalpa’n ati hlawhtling ngei dawn in a hre tlat a ni. Kum sawm chhung tukhaw hriat lova mahni a ei inzawn chawp a ka awm hnu in kum 2000 Jun thla aṭang chuan Baptist Church of Mizoram (B.C.M) chuan Mire ram chu Field a neihin hma a rawn la ṭan ta a, Pastor Chownglowka’n a auh aṭang a kum 22-naah Lalpa’n kei, achhiahhlawh tling lo tak hmang hian a rawn hlawhtlin tir ta a ni. BCM-in Mire ram chu Field ang a hma an rawn lak tantirh lai hian Pastor Chownglowka chu kum 72 lai a upa ni tawh.

Pastor Chownglowka hian Mire Bible Thuthlung thar a letling a, Thuthlunghlui lehlin lai chuan kan thawk dun a, alo upa tawhin a hriselna a lo ṭha lo zel a, duh angin rawngbawlna lamah a inhmang hlei thei tawh lo hle mai a, natna khum a a awm lain min kova, ka hnenah chuan, “Ka fapa, ka hna chhunzawm zel tur leh Mire hnamte hmangaih tak a lo enkawl zel turin ka ring che a, nang i awm a vang in thlamuang takin ka kal thei dawn ta e. Ka Almera kha hawng la ka Certificate te leh ka lehkhabu pawimawh zawng zawng chu la vek la, ka Bible lehlin lai pawh la vek rawh, nangman i lo chhunzawm dawn nia,” min ti a.

Kei chuan a sawi ang chuan ka la vek a, a hnu lawk chuan kei chu Office thin tul pawimawh a vangin Mizoram-ah ka kal a, Mizoram a ka awm chhungin kum 84-mi niin, ni 13 April 2013 chuan a rawng a bawlsak ṭhin Lalpa hnenah chawl hlen tawh turin Lalpa’n a hruai haw ta a ni. Ka Pa Pastor Chownglowka thih thu Lunglei a ka awm lai in ka han hria chu; ka awm lohva min lo kalsan chu pawi ka ti em em mai a, a ni pawhin a thih dawn darker thlengin min lo lam lawm lawm chungin mual min lo liam san ta a ni.

Mahse, Lalpa’n Pastor Chownglowk hi chawimawi a lo duh zawk a ni. Pastor Chownglowk vuina inkhawm chu Lunglei a ka awmna Pu Lalhmangaiha (Mangaiha) te in, Lunglei Moria-ah kan nei a, BCM hruaitu lian mi engemaw zat leh Lunglei veng hrang hrang a Kohhran hruaitu te leh midang tam tak, Mangaiha te in lian ve angreng tak mai, a chhungah pawh leng lovin an kawt laiahte an la ṭhu hmur mai a. Chuti tak mai a ka Pa Pastor Chownglowk BCM Hruaitu te leh veng hrang hrang Kohhran hruaitu leh mipui tam tak in Lunglei khawpui aṭanga a ruang thlahna inkhawm kan han nei thei chu ropui ka ti lutuk leh ka lawm lutuk chu ka hnuk a ulh zawk a ni.

Mire ram a an in a a ruang thlahnaah pawh Mire Kristian tam takte an rawn kal khawm bâkah Bawm ram aṭangin Kohhran hruaitu leh Kohhran-mi tam takin a ruang chu ropui takin an thlah liam bawk a ni. Pastor Chownglowk hi Lalpa’n a va chawimawi nasa tehlul em. He lehkhabu a NEIG Mission chanchin leh Miriate khawvel ka ziaknaah pawh Pastor Chownglawk, mifing tak mai hnen aṭang hian a tam zawk chu thu chiang ka hriat phah in ka ziak theih phah a ni. Achungah ka lawm tak meuh a ni.

  1. VOLUNTARY MISSIONARY-TE CHANCHIN.

N.E.I.G. Mission awm tawh loh hnu chuan rambuaite a lo ni bawk nen, Mire ramah chuan Mission mumal awm lovin Lalpa rawngbawltute an reh ṭhuap mai a. Chutih lai chuan Mire Kristian tlemte lo awm tawhte pawh chu an thamral ta emaw tih mai turin chakna reng an nei tawh lova. Chutih lai chuan Mizoram pawh rambuai a lo ni ve leh zel bawk si a. Mizo mipuite chuan an unau Miria te thlarau bo chu an lainatin an vei em em reng a, mahse eng Mission mahin Miriate thlarau bo hruai chhuak turin hma an la thei bawk si lo.

Chuvangin an unau Miria te thlarau chu aboral mek a ni tih hre reng chung chuan mahni inlumah an thut reng theih loh a vangin Miria te thlarau boral mekte hruai chhuak turin mahni inchawm chawpin Voluntary Missionary mi engemaw zat Mizoram aṭangin an liam thla a, chung Voluntary Missionary te chu kan hriat thei chinte lo tar lang ila, tihsual palh leh kan tarlan hmaihte pawh an awm mai thei, kan tihsual palhte a awm a nih chuan khawngaih taka min hrilh turin chhiartu te ka ngen a che u. Mire ram a awmchilh a Voluntary Missionary te chu hengte hi an ni:

Hming Awm rei zawng

  1. Rev, H.Killuaia 1965 – 1966.
  2. Evan Zahmingthang 1974 – 1981.
  3. Pi Romawii, w/o Evan Zahmingthanga 1976 – 1981.
  4. Evan Tv, Raldokhuma 1976 – 1986.
  5. Evan, K.Lawmsanga 1977 – 1980.
  6. Pi, F.Lianzari, W/o Evan, K.Lawmsanga 1977 – 1980.
  7. Evan Tv, Lalthanmawia 1977 – 1978.
  8. Evan, Tv, Biakzama 1977 – 1978.
  9. Evan Tanmanga 1977 – 1978.
  10. Evan Nl, Machhini (Mapuii) 1977 – 1978.

Heng Mizoram a ṭanga Voluntary Missionary te’n Mire hnam zinga chanchinṭha an hril lai hi Mizoram buai lai a ni a, chutih lai chuan Mizo hnam sipai M.N.F te chuan Bangladesh Bawm ramah Headquarter nei in Bangladesh sipai te nen a inberem in Bangladesh sorkar chuan Mizo hnam sipai te chu Sangha (Songgo ti a lam rik tur) chhuah lam a awm turin an ti a, Sangha luiral tlak lamah chuan Mizo hnam sipaite chu kal lo tura tih an nih a vangin chung hun lai a Voluntary Missionary te tan pawh chuan Sangha luiral Mire ram a kal chu a him loh a vangin Bawm ram a Mire awm ho zingah chanchinṭha chu an hril ta a ni.

Pu Tanmanga leh Machhini (Mapuii) te chu Sangha luiral tlak lam Mire talangpui a Empu khua-ah kum khat an awm a, an awm chhung hian Pathian in a veng tlat a, engemaw ti a Mizoram a an chhuah hlan in Bangladesh Army te chuan Empu khua ah Mizo an awm tih an lo hria a, Empu khua Kharbari leh Pastor Chownglowk bâkah mi pathum, anvai in mi panga an man a, mahse Mizo hnam sipai MNF te’n an chhanchhuak leh ta a ni. Mapuii leh Pu Tanmanga pawh chu Mire ramah an rawn kir leh tawh lo.

Mizoram a ṭanga Voluntary Missionary te chu Mire ramah an luh thlak theih loh a, Bawm ram a Mire awm hote hnen a rawng an bawl lai chuan Bangladesh a Bawm ṭhenkhat te chuan Mire ramah Mission puitu pawh nei mumal lovin rawng an lo bawl ve bawk a. Mire tlangpui, Matamuhuri leh Marancha hungh velah anmahni kotu Lalpa rinchha nin ṭhahnemngai takin an Lalpa tan an lo thawk a. Lalpa hnenah Miria te thlarau bo tam tak hruaiin Biakin pawh engemaw zat an lo din hial nghe nghe a.

Mahse, Mission ṭanpuitu mumal an neih loh avang leh Miria te thlarau lam a an ṭhanlen theihna atan a an mamawh phuhruk saktu an neih loh a vangte in anni pawh chu an duh ang a thawk reng thei lovin, Mire ring thar, rinna kawng a ṭiak tir te te, la enkawl ngai em emte chu enkawl zui zel thei lovin an kir san leh vek ta mai a, chuvang chuan Mire Kristian te chu ṭhang thei lovin an awm a, tam tak chu hnim hlingnei zing a tla ang mai in an nun dan hlui chuan a chim ral leh ta a ni.

Chutih hun lai a Bawm ram a ṭanga Voluntary Missionary te chu:

  1. Evan Tluangkhup. 2. Evan Sangtel.

3. Evan Ngunzuam. 4. Evan Zingmuan.

5. Evan Ruatkual. 6. Evan Paknin.

7. Evan Pakthliar. 8. Evan Saitling.

9. Evan Phundo te an ni.

Heng ka han tarlan bâkah pawh hian Mire ram a Kohhran chawm nilova Bawm ram aṭang a Voluntary Missionary ka ziah hmaih palh an lo la awm a nih chuan, chhiartu duhtak, chung ka ziak lan hmaihte chu khawngaih taka min rawn hrilh turin ka ngen a che.

Heng kan han tar lan tak Voluntary Missionary te hi an awm hunchhung ka hriat theih loh a vangin an awm hunchhung kum ka rawn tar lang thei lo a ni. Tin, heng mite bâkah awmchilh lem lova Mire ram a rawngbawl a kal ṭhin, kan unau Bawm hnam zingah mi engemaw zat an awm ngei ang tih ka ring bawk a ni.

Heng Bawm ram a ṭanga Voluntary Missionary te hi Mire ṭawng thiam tak tak tepawh an awm nual a, chungte chuan hlate lo lehlin sakin a aw b te an lo zirtir ṭhin a, Mizo lengkhawm zai hla pawh Mire Kristian ṭhenkhatte chuan an lo thiam em em a ni.

Heng kan sawi takte, Lalpa tan a ṭhahnemngai tak leh rim tak a lo thawktu te’n harsatna tam tak a vanga an ram a an haw leh tak hnu a ṭanga kum engemawzat liam hnuin tun hun hnuhnung lamah hian Lalpa’n kei achhiahhlawh tling lo tak mai hi Miriate thlarau bo hruai chhuak leh chawm puitling turin Mire ramah min tira, keimah mai chuan thawh theih ka neih tlem em a vangin kum sanghnih hnu lam aṭang chuan Baptist Church of Mizoram leh Mission dang dang Lalpa’n a rawn tir bawk a ni.

Hmelma pa Setana, Diabawla ni bawk hian Miria te taksa leh thlarau boral tur chhanchhuak a Krista hnen a hruai thlenna dodal turin theihtawp a chhuah a, a dodal theih natur a nih phawt chuan eng hmanrua pawh a hmang duh a, a hmang mek zel bawk, Miriate thlarau bo chhanchhuah in an awm mek a ni tih a hriatin, “Tlangsamah ramhuai a pawng tal e,” an tih ang mai in kan hmelma pa hi a pawngtal mek a ni.

Engang pawhin hmelma pa hian min bei mahse Lalpa kan lamah aṭang a, Lalpa Kohhran te hian kan unau Miria, satana bawi a tâng mekte chhanchhuah hna hi beidawn san mai lovin, chhel leh huai takin i bei zel ang u. Indona chu Lalpa indona a ni a, huai tak leh chhel taka kan bei zel chuan hnehna kan chang ngei ang, hnehtu Pathian vangin.

3. Evangelical Christian Church (E.C.C) Mission:

Evangelical Christian Church (E.C.C) tunah rih chuan Bawm ram Kohhran hrang hrang zinga atam ber leh achangtlung ber an ni a. Tunhma, Voluntary Missionary te’n Mire ram a an thawh hun lai 1973 – 1974 bawr vel khan ECC kal tlang a Prenbyterian Fellowship of Bangladesh te Sponsorna in Mire ramah an thawk a, chutih hun lai a Mire ram a an thawktu te chu hengte hi an ni:

  1. Pastor Chownglowk (Miria)
  2. Pastor Nguntuar (Bawm)
  3. Evan Singrau (Miria)
  4. Evan Laikowi (Miria)
  5. Pastor Krawngtawng (Miria)
  6. Evan Ruatkual (Bawm)
  7. Evan Sangtel (Bawm) te an ni.

Heng kan han tarlante hi Mire hnam zinga an thawh hun chhung kan rawn tar lang thei lova, Prenbyterian Fellowship of Bangladesh te Sponsorna an thawh hunchhung hi a rei vaklo niin alang. Prenbyterian Fellowship of Bangladesh te Sponsorna atawp hnuah pawh tun thleng hian Mire hnam zingah hian tam vak lo chu thawktu an la indah a ni.

4. Christian Fellowship Of Bangladesh (C.F.B) chanchin.

C.F.B. Mission President chu Rev Rualthanmawia Chhakchhuak a ni a, a ni hi S.Koria leh America a ṭanga Sponsor nei a Mire ram leh hmun dang dang a Lalpa rawngbawlna hna thawktu a ni a, Mire ram bik hi kan ziah lan duh a nih a vangin Mire ram a thawh dan kan ziak dawn a ni.

Mire tlangpui, Pawpla Headman khuaah ni 7 February 1989 khan ruai ropui taka buatsaih in Mire Kristian te a ko khawm a, chutah chuan Mire Christian Church (M.C.C) a din pui a, MCC kaltlang chuan Mire ho zingah chuan Lalpa rawngbawl hna kum 1990 ah a thawk ṭan nghal a ni. Pu Rualthanmawia chuan Mire ram a Lalpa rawngbawl hna tihtakzet a a thawk dawn a an hriat a vangin Mission dang dang a awmte pawh chu Mission pakhat a awm chuan ṭha zawk dawn a an hriat a vangin MCC ah chuan an awm tlang ta dial a.

Chu Mire Kohhran thar MCC chu enkawl turin Dt 7 February 1989 chuan hruaitute an inthlang nghal a.

Chung an hruaitu (O.B) an thlante chu:

  1. Convener Rev, S.L. Pardo (Bawm)
  2. Senior Adv Pastor Chownglowk (Miria)
  3. Chairman Evan Vanlalruata (Miria)
  4. Secretary Evan Lalngura (Mizo)
  5. Tresurer Evan Chawngtai (Miria)

Committee Member’s:

1. Nawmprah (Miria). 2. Paleh (Miria) 3. Meniawng (Miria)

4. Menpiaw (Miria) te an ni.

He an Kohhran thar din, Mire Christian Church (MCC) hian Pu Rualthanmawia Kohhran din Christian Fellowship of Bangladesh (CFB) chu a zawm nghal a, chu Kohhran a thawktute hlawh pawh chu CFB chuan a peksak vek a ni. Mahse, MCC chu anmahni chhungkuaah buaina neuh neuh a awm a vangin heng an hruaitu thlante hian kum khat pawh an hruai hma in an ṭilh san leh ta deuh vek a, mahse chu an Kohhran thar din chu CFB hnuaiah a la kal ve zel a.

CFB chuan Mire ram a thawktu pawh a ruai tam hman hle a, mahse ṭhenkhat te chu reilote kum khat pawh tling lo an thawk a, an ban san leh a, ṭhenkhat chu hlawh a pe tlem em em a, a pek a te pawh regular tak a pek mumal a nei meuh lo. Ṭhenkhatte phei chu thlakhatah Tk 500 chauh pe a a rawihte pawh an awm.

Pu Rualthanmawia chuan Mire ram a ka awm thu a lo hriat chuan kum 1992 kumtir lamah Dhaka a a hnen a kal turin min chah a, a hnen a ka va kal chuan Pu Rualthanmawia chuan, “Lalpa rawngbawl in Empu khuah harsa takin i awm tih ka lo hria a, a remchan chuan ṭanpui che ka duh a ni,” a ti a. Kei chuan, “Pu Mawi, min ṭanpui i duh a ka lawm takmeuh a ni, mahse Mizoram a kan hotute ka biak ve phawt a ngai ang,” ka ti a, a ni pawh chuan a remti a, Mizoram a kalna tur Tk 500 min pe a, Mizoram a kan hotute hmu tur chuan ka kal ta nal nal a.

Mizoram ka han thlen a kan Team, Abassador for Christ Team Speaker Upa K.Lawmsanga chu thilawmzia ka han hrilh chuan a ni chuan, “Chutia CFB Mission in a lo ṭanpui theih che chuan a ṭha a lawm. Pathian remruat a nih dawn chu, keini lahin duhangin kan ṭanpui thei mang si lo che a, mahse keini lam pawhin ṭawngṭaina leh thilpekin kan theih ang tawk chuan kan ṭanpui ve reng thovang che, kan thlahthlam dawn chuang lo che a ni tih i hre reng dawn nia,” a ti a. Phur takin Bangladesh-ah chuan ka kir leh a Dhaka a Pu Rualthanmawia hnenah chuan va kal leh in thilawmzia chu ka va hrilh a, CFB Mission chuan ni 22 Feb 1992 aṭang chuan min ṭanpui a, thla khatah cheng 1200 min pe ve a, ka lawm khawp mai.

CFB Mission in Mire ram a a thawh tak tak hun chhung chu kum 1990 – 1999 a ni a, mahse kum 2000 hnu lam a la awmte hi CFB President Rev R.T. Mawia anmahni Sponsor leh tura an ngen avang a hlawh a pek leh te a ni. Mire ram rawngbawlna chawlhsan a tum hnuah mi tlemte in anmahni ṭanpui tura an ngen tlat a vangin hemi lehkhabu ka ziah lai thleng hian mi 2/3 te hlawh chu a la pe a ni.

Ahun lai kha chuan Mire ram a Mission thawkte zingah a thawk hlawk ber a ni. Chutih hun lai a thawktute chu hengte hi an ni:

  1. Pastor Chownglowk (Miria) 1990 - 1999.
  2. Pastor Ngungtuar (Bawm) 1993 - 1999.
  3. Evan Lalngura (Mizo) 1990.
  4. E/T. Sailuaia (Bawm) 1990.
  5. Evan Kapchhuana (Lai) 1990 - 2004.
  6. Evan Vanlalruata (Miria) 1990.
  7. Evan Rosanglura Fanai (Mizo) 1992 - 1999.
  8. E/T. Ruisi (Miria) 1990 - 1992.
  9. Village Doctor Tuarbil (Bawm) 1992.
  10. Evan Meniawng (Miria) 1990.
  11. Evan Mentui (Miria) 1990.
  12. Evan Lalrawngbawla (Mizo?) 1991 - 1992.
  13. E/T. Hranglianthanga (Pang) 1992 - 1993.
  14. E/T, V.L. Renga (Pang) 1993 - 1995.
  15. E/T. Ramtawnthang (Bawm) 1993 - 2002.
  16. Pastor Iowngrung (Miria) 1998 - 2002.
  17. E/T. Lalhuntiam (Bawm) 1998 - 2002.
  18. Evan Daikhu (Miria) 1990 - 1993.
  19. Evan Menlawng (Miria) 1995.
  20. Evan Patdi (Miria) 1997 - 2000.
  21. Evan Tlanguai (Miria) 1997 - 2000.
  22. Evan Kainguai (Miria) 1998 - 2002.

CFB Mission hian Mire ramah School te din in Mire hlabu ka buatsaih chu min chhut sak a, Mire a aw b bu ka siam pawh copy 50 lek chu min chhuah sak bawk. Mire Bible thuthlung thar Pastor Chownglowka lehlin chu a lettu lehlin dan ngai ngai leh Computer a chhutu chhut dan ngai ngai in vawikhat pawh lehlin sual leh chhut sual pal a awm leh awm loh ennawn lek lohvin a bu an siam thawr bawk a, awmlo ngawt ai chuan azia ve hrim hrim tho mai. Mahse, alehlin lai leh a chhut laiah ennawn loh ngang a nih a vangin hnam dang Bible hmang thei te chuan kan hmang duh lo.

5. Maruchah Chgristian Church (MCC) ṭhiat in Maruchah Christian Fellowship a lo piang chhuak leh ta.

Kum a lo in her zel a, kum danga kan tih ṭhin ang bawkin MCC Annual Conference chu Empu khua-ah ropui takin hman leh kan tum a, hemi ṭum hian kan hotu Rev RT Mawia te chhung pawh kan sawm ve a. Anni chhung hman remchan dan in MCC khawmpui chu ni 25 January 2000-ah kan sawn ta a. Chu kan hun ruatah chuan Pu Rualthanmawia te chhungkua leh Koria mi engemawzat an rawn tel ve a.

Kan hotu Pu Mawia te rawn kal chu nghakhlel tak a kan thlir lain an lo thlen har tak em a vangin kan lo inkhawm san a. Kan inkhawm ban dawn lamah chuan an lo thleng a. Chawhnu lam rorel kan neih hma chuan Pu Mawia chuan Biakinah min ko khawm vek a, “Pastor Chownglowk leh Pastor Iowngrung chauh hlawh ka la pe ang a, midang zawng chu hlawh ka pe thei tawh lovang, Mire ram a ka rawngbawlna hi chawlhsan ka tum tawh a ni,” ati a, chumi hnu rei lovah chuan an haw leh ta a.

Pu Mawia te haw hnu chuan MCC kawmpui rorel tur te chu Biakin chhungah chuan rorel turin kan lut khawm leh a, Pu Mawia thil sawi chu mak kan ti in angaihna kan hre lo tlang hle mai a. Chutih lai chu MCC Secretary ka nih lai a ni a. Chutia rorel tura kan han ṭhut khawm chuan, sawi tur kan van hlawm hle mai a. Pastor Chownglowk chuan, “Ṭhiante riltam a awm lai a puar leh fân a lo awm bik chu ka duh love, kei pawh hlawh ka la bik lovang,” a ti a. Chutiang bawk chuan Pastor Iowngrung pawh chuan a ti ve a.

Chutia Pu Ralthanmawia’n midang tumah hlawh a pe dawn tawh lova Pastor Chownglowka leh Pastor Iowngrung te pahnih pawhin Pu Rualthanmawia hnen aṭang a hlawh lâk an tum bik bawk silohah chuan buaina lian tak mai kan nei ta tlat mai a. MCC thawhlawm lah chu Pu Rualthanmawia’n CFB ah pek vek tur a tih a vangin kan lo pe vek zel bawk si a, pawisa kawl sa kan lo nei miah bawk silova.

Chuvang chuan chuti mai chuan thawklehkhatah mahni ke a ding tur chuan kan tlin dawn lo a ni tih inhria in CFB Precident Rev R.T. Mawia hnenah kan chunga aṭhatnate leh kan tan a thil tam tak min tih sak tawh a vanga lawm thu sawina leh zalen taka min ṭanpuitu tur kan zawn theih nan MCC in CFB Mission a thlahna lehkha pek chu kan sawi hovin ṭha kan ti tlang a.

Kei chuan MCC Secretary ka nihna in MCC in CFB a thlahna leh kum engemaw zat min lo ṭanpui tawh a vanga lawm thu sawina sei angreng deuhin ka ziak a, Mizoram a ka chhoh a ngaih thut a vangin chu ka lehkha ziak chu CFB President Rev R.T. Mawia lo pe turin Pastor Iowngrunga kutah ka dah a. A ni chuan ka chah ang ngei chuan a lo pe a. Mahse, Pu Rualthanmawia’n lehkha a han chhiar a MCC in CFB an thlah a ni tih a han hriat chuan a thin a rim ta em em mai a, lehkha chu amah petu Pastor Iowngrung kutah bawk chuan a lo pe kir leh a, Mizoram a ṭanga ka haw hnu chuan CFB President Rev R.T. Mawia tan a ka ziak chu keima kutah bawk a lo kir leh a, CFB President chuan chu lehkha apawm leh pawm loh thu ṭawngka in emaw, lehkha in emaw min rawn hrilh hran chuang lova. Apawm a ni ngei ang, Pastor Chownglowk leh Pastor Iowngrung te chu hlawh pawh a rawn pe zui ta bik lova.

Hun engemaw chen chu MCC chuan ṭanpuitu dilin kan tawngtai ṭhin a, mahse min ṭanpuitu tur Mission kan hmu thei lova, Lalpa’n kan ṭawngṭaina te min ngaihthlak sak lo ang mai hian a reh hian a reh vung vung mai a. Chutih lai karah Mission fahrah te te min ṭhenhran tum an lo lawr ve chhen bawk nen, kan mite lah chuan, “Engtinnge min kalpui dawn, eng Mission in nge min rawn ṭanpui dawn, Hei kan khua ah chumi Mission, kha mi Mission in, ‘Kan mission ah awm ula chumi chu, khami kha kan pe ang che u,’ min ti,” an rawn ti chhen bawk si nen.

Ka tihngaihna hre lo chuan, “Puitling in ni a, ṭha in tih tih naah awm mai teh u, engpawh an lo pe che u in an lo ṭanpui che u a nih chuan a dawn dan leh a hman dan in lo thiam chuan a ṭha vek e, Mission chuan thil chhia chu a rawn tihsak tawp lovang che u, an hnen a in awm chuan in chhiatna tur an ngaituah bawk hek lovang,” ka ti ta zel mai a.

Atawpah chuan Mire Kristian zawng zawng MCC a hmun khat a awm a lungrual tak awm ṭhin kha Mission dang dangah kan lo inṭhen darh ta vek mai a. Kan khua Empu chauh chu Lalpa chhànna la nghak awmchhun chu kan ni ta mai a. Mission hrang hrangah lo awm darh pawh ni se, kan mi lehsate an lo nih tawh ṭhin a vangin kan inngai thei hle ṭhin a. Engemaw chang a anmahni tlawh a ka kal changte hian min lo lawm thei hle ṭhin a. Mahse, bialnu hlui pasal nei tawhte in a len ang maiin a awptu dang an lo awm tawh avangin ṭawng kam fimkhur angai em em tawh mai a.

Hmun ṭhenkhatah phei chuan anmahni awptu Mission leh lo awmchilhtu hnam dang thawktu te’n min ngaithei lo a ni tih hriat fahran in Pathian thu an hnen a kan sawite chu min khap ṭhin a. Kan inngaih leh kan inthlakhlelh tehlul vei nen, a lungchhiat thlak thei ṭhin khawp mai. Engmah lah chu tihtheih kan nei tawh bawk si lo. Thlarau lamah pawh Mire Kristiante chuan tlakhniam lam an pan phah hle mai a.

Mire Kristiante chuan Mission hmun khat a kan awm ho lai kha kan ngai thei hle ṭhin a, chuvangin heti hian ka ngaihtuah a, “Abul lamah insuih khawm thei lo mah ila a ler lamah tal chuan kan insuih khawm a ngai a ni,” tiin Mire Kristian zawng zawng, hmun hla leh hnai a mi pawh ka ko khawm vek a, Mission hrang hrang, dan leh in enkawlna dan inang tawh lo tak takte kan han inhmu khawm leh chu kan hlim in nuam kan tih hle rualin venthawn tur a tam a, a nuam hreawm a ni ber mai.

Chung Mire Kristian hmun hrang hrang a ṭanga rawn kal khawmte chuan, “Mission khatah kan awmkhawm thei tawh lo a ni tih inhria in kan awmna Mission thlauhthla chuang si lovin Fellowship din chu ṭha kan ti tlang em?” tih ka zawt a, ṭha kan ti tlang vek a. Ni 12 November 2000 kum chuan lungrual takin Marucha Christian Fellowship (MCF) chu kan din ta a. Kan awmna Mission hotute lam pawh ṭha tak a hrilhfiah ṭheuh turin kan inti bawk a,. Chumi kum chuan hruaitu pawh temporary-in a ruat in kan inruat a. Chung kan hruaitu ruatte chu hengte hi an ni:

1. Chairman : Pastor Iowngrung.

2. Secretary : Evan Ramtawnthang.

3, Tresurer : Mr Menpungh.

Executive Committee Member’s :

1. Mr Meniawng. Kangku khua.

2. Evan Kainguai Naplaw khua.

3. Mr Bulu Mangtawng khua.

4. Mr Pale Kurang khua.

5. Evan Tuarthawn Kapru khua.

6. Evan Vanlalruata Sarawn khua.

7. Mr Menkaw Empu khua.

8. Mr Kuarnum Englai khua.

9. Evan Rambuaithang Namdui khua.

10. Evan Nawmpra Lama khua.

11. Evan Rosanglura Fanai Empu khua.

Senior Advisor-te :

1. Pastor Chownglowk Empu khua.

2. Pastor Chowngtai Malumghat.

3. Mr Singiawng Union Porisot Member.

Heng hruaitu a kan ruatte hian MCF khawmpui kan neih leh a hruaitu kan inthlan fel hma chu MCF hi an hruai rih ang a, khawmpui kan neih leh hmasa berah hruaitu kan inthlang ṭha leh a nga, kan hmalâk dantur pawh kan rel fel nghal ang, kan ti a.

Lalpa hruaina in ni 20 November 2001-ah kan khua Empu-ah bawk chuan MCF khawmpui chu kan nei leh a, hruaitu thar pawh kan inthlang leh a, chung kan hruaitu thlante chu:

1. Chaiman : Pastor Iowngrung B.C.M.

2. Vice Chairman : Evan Rosanglura Fanai B.C.M.

3. Secretary : Evan Peklian E.C.C.

4. Asst Secretary : E/T. Ramtawnthang B.C.M.

5. Tresurer : Mr Menpawi (Iusup) B.C.M.

6. Financial Secretary : Evan Kainguai B.C.M.

Executive Committee Member’s

1. Pastor Nguntuar. B.B.S.

2. Mr Saialh E.C.C

3. E/T. Vannunsang E.A.C.

4. Mr Singrau B.B.S.

5. E/T. Menngih B.T.A.B.C.

6. E/T. Zuamthliar B.B.F.

7. Evan Rengien B.C.M.
