8. Evan Paia C.F.F.

9. Mrs Lalbuki E.C.C.

10. Mr Mangling B.C.M.

11. Missionary Sanghmunga L.I.K.B.K.

Mire Christian Fellowship (MCF) khawmpuiah hian Mire ram a Mission hrang hrangte intibuai lova Lalpa rawng kan bawl ho dial dial theih nan leh Mission hrang hrangte Pathian thu sawi a inrawih pawlh a inpumkhatna ṭha zawk a rawng kan bawl ho theih dan turte kan rel a, MCF din chhan leh athiltum chu Mission hrang hrang a kan hotute/Head Office ah sap ṭawng, Bangla, Bawm ṭawng leh Mizo ṭawngte a ziak a pek vek turin kan rel bawk a. Mission hruaitu ṭhenkhat chuan ṭha min tihpui in kan khawmpuiah te min lo telpui ve ṭhin a, ṭhenkhat vethungte erawh chuan MCF a ding chu duh lovin min do tawk pawh an awm bawk.

MCF khawmpui vawi 2-naah chuan kumtin khawmpui neihte pawh kan rel a. Inkhawmpui kan neih chuan thupui kan thlang ṭhin a, Speaker pawh hmun dang a mite kan sawm ṭhin a, Pathian thu leh hlaahte inelnate kan nei a, infiam hunte pawh kan siam a, a nuam kan ti in kan hlim thei ṭhin khawp mai. Khawmpui kal pawh kan ṭhahnem thei ṭhin khawp mai. Mire Kristiante thlarau lam nun pawhin hma asawn phah hle niin ka hria. Kum hnih danah hruaitu kan inthlang ṭhin a.

Hetia Mire Kristian Mission hrang hrang MCF hmang a kan inthlun zawm leh a khawmpui kan neih hian thlarau lamah leh Pathian thu leh hla hriatna lamah kan hlawk in hma kan sawn phah em em a. MCF khawmpui lian kan neih hmasak ber chuan Tv Ramengmawia Mizoram a ṭanga Bawm ram a Pathian thu hril a awm mek chu Speaker atan kan sawm a, a nin kan sawmna chu ngaipawimawhin min rawn tih hlawhtlin sak a, chumi ṭum a kan Thupui chu, ‘Chhandamna’ tih a ni a, A ni chuan fel fai leh fiah takin min zirtir ṭhin a, khawmpui a rawn kal te’n kan hlimpui-in kan kham lo tlang hle a ni.

Kan khawmpui lian vawi hnihna-ah chuan Speaker atan Susil Tripura (Tuikuk) B.B.F Mission a an hotupa a ni a, a ni pawh hian Pathian thu Mire Kristian te hriat thiam phak tawk in min zirtir a, kan hlawkpui tlang khawp mai. Kapru khua a khawmpui kan neih leh tum chuan E.C.C. Mission Sinior Pastor Lalsanga Speaker a tan kan hmang a, chuta kan thupui chu ‘Thlarau thianghlim’ tih a ni a, keiphei chu ka zai nasa lutuk chu khawmpui tawp dawn chuan ka aw achhang lutuk a, ka zai ṭha hlei thei tawh lo. Ava han hlim awmin avahan nuam ṭhin tak em.

30Thutak puangtu Team-te Prenchü-ah

Kum 2004 a Empu khua a khawmpui kan neih tum chuan kan Field Director Rev Lalhmunsanga chu kan Speaker a ni a, chumi tum a kan thupui chu ‘Thiltih nei lo rinna chu a thi a ni’ tih a ni a, min zirtir dan athiam bawk a, khawmpui palai te’n kan hlawkpui tlang takzet a ni. Kum 2012 a Prenchu khua a khawmpui kan neih lai chuan Mizoram a Evangelist Team Thutak puangtute Team Speaker kan sawm a, mahse a ni chu a rawn kal hman loh a vangin An Team Director (J.Sanglawma, ka Nu nuṭa, ka Pu Mama) leh Team member ṭhenkhatte an rawn kal bakah Mire hla Music Vedio leh Audio a Cassettee pathum lai min lo zai saktu ka farnu Lalmuanpuii (Puitei) zaithiam rawn tel chuan mi a hip lehzual a. Kan khawmpui chu a hlungin kan hlim tlang takmeuh a ni.

Prenchu a MCF khawmpui kan neih ṭum hian kei chuan tunhma angin ṭhalaite hla ka zirtir hman tawh loh a vangin Mire Kristian-te chuan hla zirtirtu tur Mizo min dil nasa hle mai a, ahlawh pawh pek hial an inhuam hial a, chuti taka min ngen avang chuan ka nau Sangtea (J.Vanlalsanga, ka Nu chhang chiah ka Pu Lalduha fapa) Bualpui ‘H’ a zaipawl hruaitu; a aw a ṭha a, music a thiam in Solfa a thiam bawk a, a ni chu minpui turin ka sawm a, a ni chuan ka sawmna chu Lalpa kohna a ngai in Mire ṭhalaite hla leh Music zirtir turin a rawn kal a, a ni pawh chuan a haw san thei tawh bik loh a vangin Bangladesh a mi Pang nula nupui a neiin tun thleng hian a awm ve ta zel a ni.

[

31 Upa K.Dengdailova

Kum 12/13 chhung kum tin khawmpui kan neih khan kan khawmpui neihna hi a hautak ve em em a, Mission dangin sum leh pai-in min ṭanpui ngai meuh bawk si lova, kan Mission khawmpui lian Assembily kum tin neih ngei ngei kan ngai bawk si avangin kum 2013 lam aṭang chuan MCF khawmpui kan huaihawt thei tawh lova, keimahni BCM khawmpuiah Mission zawng zawng kan sawm ta zawk ṭhin a ni. Kum 2013 a kan Assembily-ah chuan Thutak puangtu Team Speaker Evan K.Dengdailova (Ka Nu u, ka Nu Kungi fapa) Speaker-ah kan sawm a, kan thupui chu ‘Thilpek’ tih a ni a, a sawi thiam em em mai bawk a, tun thleng hian Mire Kristian te’n kan la hlawkpui em em a ni. Abiktakin kei ni Empu BCM Kohhran te’n kan hlawkpui leh zual. Chumi tum chuan Mire ṭhalai hmun hrang hrang a ṭangin an rawn fuan khawm a, Pathian thu ngaithla leh Pathian fak leh chawimawi in kan tlaivar a, ṭhalaite an lam nasa in thlarauah harhna changin tam tak chu Lalpa tan a an lo inpek loh zia hriain an ṭap nasa mai a, khatiang tak a Pathian thu a vanga Miria te an ṭah leh an lam nasat kha ka hmuh vawi khatna a ni.

Mission hrang hrang aṭanga ṭhalai, Baptist Church of Maruchah (BCM) Assambly (khawmpui lian) rawn chhimtu te chuan Pathian thu ngaihthlak leh Lalpa fak a zai chu an la kham loh em a vangin ṭhalai ho te chuan, “Pastor, hetiang hian thlarau ruai min buatsai sak ṭhin rawh aw,” an ti a, ṭhenkhat chu min kuah ngawih ngawih mai a. Kum 2014 a khawmpui BCM Assambly kan neih leh chuan, Speaker atan Evan Upa K.Lawmsanga, Ambbasador For Christ Team Speaker ah kan sawm leh a, a ni chu a nupui Pi Zari nen an rawn kal a, chumi tum a kan thupui chu ‘Pathian thu awih’ tih a ni a. Kan Speaker chuan a sawi thiam in angaithlatu te’n kan hlawkpui takzet a ni.

Kum 2013 a Baptist Church of Maruchah (BCM) Assembly ah chuan Mission hrang hrang a ṭhalaite Inthlahrung hauh lova thlarau lam ruai an ṭheh theih nan All Christian Kürthummi Powchak (ACKP) din sak ila kan ti a. Kan din sakta a. ACKP ti a hun engemaw chen an kal hnu chuan Sorkar hnen a thil dilte a la ngaih dawn a vang leh hnam dang tan pawh hriatthiam a awlsam zawk theih nan tiin ‘Maruchah Christian Youth Association’ (MCYA) tiin an thlak a, tunah chuan kan puihna tel lovin anmahni in an in-functions thei tawh a.

32MCYA khawmpui 2020

An inkhawmpuina hnun thlanah pawh hian an duh uluk ve em em a, ring lo tamna hnun, an nungchang leh an thiltih te a vanga Pathian ram a zau theihna tur hmun an thlang deuh kher ṭhin a ni.

An khawmpui a Mire ṭhalai 600/700 rual zet Pathian thu an inzirtir leh Pathian chawimawiin an han fuan khawm chu ahmuhnawmin aropui tak zet a ni, an khawmpui chuan zaipawlte pawh an nei ve tawh a ni. Taksa chetna, harhna chang pawh an awm nual tawh bawk. Mire ramah, ka chhan ngeiah hetiang hi ka hmuh phak ka inrin loh tehlul nen. Ava ropui em. Lalpa chu fakin awm mawlh rawh se.

An Activety dang lehte chu Mire tlangpuiah hian Motor kawng a rawn awm atang hian Pathian ni hi bazar niah an hmang ṭhin a, chu chu Kristiante tan a buaithlak em em a, inkhawm lova an thlai zawrh turte bazar a zuar a ngaih ṭhin a vangin Pathian niah inkhawm an tlem phah a, chubakah, chutia Pathian ni apiang a Bazar a kal chu ngaiah neihin inkhawm loh pawh pawisak lohna a lo lian zel a; chu chu ṭha lo an tih a vangin Mire tlangpuiah chuan Pathian ni a bazar tawh lova Inrinni a bazaar zawk turin an ti a, chu chu Kristian lote pawhin an zawm ve ta vek a, vai sumdawng ho pawh thil zuar leh lei tura Pathian ni a rawn kal tawh lo turin an ti a. Chuta ṭang chuan Pathian ni a inkhawm pawh kan tam phah leh ta a ni. An ti ṭha khawp mai.

MCYA te chuan chanchin ṭha hril in an feh chhuak ṭhin a, an chipui Mire Kristian ziak leh chhiar la thiam lo te ziak leh chhiar an zirtir in zirtirtu te pawh an ruai ve bawk a, hei lo pawh hi MCYA hian Lalpa tan nasa takin an thawk bawk.

6. Baptist Church of Maruchah (B.C.M) lam vethung:

Mire Kristian-te hian Mizo Kristian-te hi taksa leh thlarau a anmahni chhanchhuak turin an beiseina hi a rei tawh hle a. Kum tam tak liam tawhah khan kan unau Miriate thlarau bo chhanchhuak turin Mire ramah hian Mizo tam tak an lo awm tawh in mi sawm (10) laiin Mire ramah hian an lu an lo phum tawh nghe nghe a.

33Rev. Sangvela leh Pastor. Chownglowk

Mizo-te leh Miria-te hi thlarau lam a ṭangin nge thisen aṭang zawk in? Chhungril lam a inzawmna thuk tak kan lo nei tlat ni hian a hriat a. Mizo Kristian te’n thlarau bo veina kan neih phat aṭang khan Miria te thlarau bo hi kan lo vei rum rut mai a ni. Kum 1919 - 1944 daih tawh khan NEIG Mission kaltlang leh 1965 – 1978 Voluntary Missionary te’n Miria te thlarau bo zawn hna hi hautak hle mahse kan lo thawk daih tawh a.

Ka hriat theih chinah chuan a Field malkhai a Mizo te’n chanchin ṭha a vanga ram pawnah chuan Field dang zawng zawng ai a kan luh hmasakna ber leh kan lu phum tamna ber a ni in ka hria. Miria te thlarau bo zawn hna leh enkawl hna hi Lalpa’n keini Mizote kovah a dah tlat a ni. Miriate thlarau boral mai tur chhanchhuah hna kan thawk lo a nih chuan an thisen mawh kan phur lovang tih tunge sawi thei ang le. Anni lah chuan keini Mizo-te min auhna leh min beiseina a rei tawh bawk si a. Mizo Kristian te hian, “Miria te chu ram dang awm an ni a,” ti in chhuanlam kan siam reng dawn em ni. Lalpa’n chu chu chhuanlam tlingah a ngai ve a ngem le?

Lalpa’n kei achhiahhlawh tling lo tak mai hi tun hun hnuhnung lamah hian ka phak tawk leh ka theih tawkte a Miria te thlarau bo hruai chhuak tur leh kan hruai chhuah tawhte enkawl turin Mire ramah min dah ve a, aṭul leh ka mamawh angin finna, thiamna leh hmanrua pawh min pe zel bawk a. Mizoram a ka chhoh chang a piangin Mire ram a rawngbawl aṭul zia leh Mizo-te hi Miria-te thlarau bo chhanchhuak a enkawl tura Lalpa’n kan kova mawhphurhna a nghah zia Kohhran zingahte, BCM Office-ah leh mimal hnenah pawh, ka theih dan ang angin ka tlangau pui ṭhin a.

Nakinah chuan Lalpa’n mite thinlungah leh kan hotute thinlungah thu sawi a, Mire ram rawngbawlna chuan ngaiven ahlawh ve ṭan ta a. Kum 1993, Rev B.Thangchina Associate General Secretary i/c Mission & Evangelism a nih lain Baptist Church of Mizoram (BCM) chuan Mire ram a thawh chu an rilruk a, chuvangin a ram, hmunhma leh a michengte en thlithlai turin mi pahnih; Pu Ngurliana leh Pu Zachhinga Thenhlum khuate chu an rawn tir a.

An ni pahnih rawn kal lai hian CFB President Rev R.T. Mawia leh American sap te nen Chittagong-ah Seminer kan neih lai a ni a. Kan Seminer zawh a ka rual a Mire ram a kal turin kan Seminer tawp thleng chuan an awm ve a. Pu Rualthanmawia chuan anni pahnih chu Mire ram a kal chu a rem ti zan lo a ni ang, an kal loh theihna tur in, “Ram a buai si a, ramdangmi in ni bawk si a, buaina in tawk palh ang, Mire ram lamah chuan kal lo mai rawh u,” a ti a. Mahse, Pu Ngurliana chu Bangla thiam tak, tunhma a Bangladesh a lo awm tawh ṭhin a nih avangin chu chu kal loh phah nan a chhuanlam tlingah a ngai lova, kal chu an tum thova.

Kan Seminer tawp dawn zan chuan vawilehkhatah thi in ka luak ta chiam mai a, ka ṭhiante chuan a zan aza nin damdawiinah min dah nghal a. Pu Ngura leh Pu Chhinga chu Mire ram lam a ka kalpui theih tak loh a vang chuan Pastor Nguntuara rual chuan Mire ramah chuan an kal ta a. Kei chu Seminer zawh tawh hnuah pawh chuan damdawiinah ka la awm a, ka ṭhian, ka rawngbawlpui E/T Ramtawn leh E/T VL Renga’n min awmpui a. Pu Rualthanmawia chuan ka in enkawl nan midang kut atangin Tk 500 min pe a, min hawsan tawh bawk a. Kan ṭhian thum chuan atu a mah chuan pawisa kan nei si lova, kan haw mai loh chuan Chittagong Hopital lianah Tk 500 chuan inenkawl ngaihna a awm si loh a vangin Doctor leh Nurs te phal lo chungin thisen chaw (Drip) min khai lai chu pawt phawiin Hospital aṭang chuan kan tlan chhuak ta a.

Nur’s ho chuan, “I thih pawhin amawh kan phur lovang,” min ti a. Kei chuan, “Thi hman ka la ni lo, Mire ramah hna ka la ngah lutuk tlat, ka thih dawn pawhin Lalpa’n ka thawh tur a a duh chin ka thawh zawh hunah a ni ang, Tunah chuan ka hna ka thawk tan dawn chauh a lawm,” ka ti a, kan chhuak lui ta a.

Chutih lai chuan ka nupui rai hram tawh tak chu Faruk a a pa te inah a lo awm a. Seminer a rawn kal ve Bawm ho lo haw hmasate chuan ka nupui hnenah chuan thi a ka luak tam zia leh ka damchhuah pawh an rin loh thute uar takin an lova sawi a, “Baltin khat deuh thaw thi in a luak,” ti te in an lova sawi a. Ka nupui Zopuii leh a chhungte chu an lo mangang em em mai a. Ka Pu hi ṭawngṭaimi a ni a, ka dam leh theih nan min lo ṭawngṭai sak char char a. An rin loh leh an beisei aia dam in Faruk khua chu ka va thleng a, ka chhungte chu an lawm hle mai a, Pathian hnenah lawmthute kan sawi a.

Chittagong a damdawi in a ka awm chhung khan thi in ka luak reng a, Doctor te’n en na chi hrang hrang a min en pawhin ka natna chu an hre thei si lova. Farukah chuan kan cham deuh reng a. Faruk a kan cham lai chuan Pu Rualthanmawia chu Farukah a lo kal a, Pu Mawia hnenah chuan, “Hetah chuan ka natna an hriat theih loh avangin Mizoram ah chho ila, Mizo Doctor hnenah inentir ila a ṭha inka hria, kan kal a nih chuan kan nauneih hun nen ain nan dawn avangin kan cham rei deuh ka ring,” ka ti a, Pu Mawia chuan, “Mizoram chu kan ram a nih avangin kan duh mai pawh a, hetah hian Doctor an thiam zawk a sin,” a ti a. Kei chuan, Keimah avangin i buai a, sum i seng tam tawh si, engzat nge la insen ngai dawn ka hre si lova, ka nu leh pa leh ka chhungte awmna Mizoram a kan kal mai chu a ṭha ang,” ka ti a, a ni pawh chuan min hnial zui ta lem lova.

Kan khua Empu-ah kan haw a, MCC Annual Conference te kan hmang leh te te a. MCC inkhawmpui chuan Miria te thlarau bo hruai chhuak a enkawl tur chuan Mizo Kristian te chu an la beisei reng mai a, chuvangin Mire ram a rawngbawl turin Baptist Church of Mizoram (BCM) sawm chu kan rel ta a. Inkhawmpui zawh chuan Mire Kristian te’n Mire ram a rawngbawl tura BCM an sawm na lehkha keng chuan ka nupui rai hram tawh tak nen chuan Mizoram lam pan in kan chhuak ta a.

Lalpa hruaina in Lunglei chu tluang takin kan han thleng a, kan thlen tuk chuan muang chang lovin Mire Kristian te’n an ram a BCM thawk tura kan sawmna lehkha chu kengin BCM Office chu ka pan ding nghal a. Chu ka lehkha pawimawh ken chu A.G.S i/c Mission & Evangelism Rev, B. Thangchina chu ka pe ta a. Mire ram a rawngbawl a ṭul zia ṭawngka in ka hrilh nual bawk a.

34Ka fanu Mazuali leh a hming phuahtu, a Pi Zawni

Hnahthial a kan awm lai ni 7 April 1994 Ninga ni zing tukṭhuan ei lai a ṭangin ka nupui Zopuii chuan nau a vei ṭan a, Hospital-ah kan tlan chho nghal a, tlai lam dar 5:04 chuan Lalpa’n ka fa tir a tan fanu duhawm leh hmelṭha tak min pe a. Achhartu Nurse chu Pi Biakchhungi a ni a. Ka fanu pian lai hian Hnahthial a ka nu leh ka Nu Zawni (Ka Pa Hminga nupui) an awm ve ve a. Ka nupui Zopuii chuan, “Kan fanu hming chu a Pi Zawni hian phuah rawh se, a ni hi a zaidam em em a, a hmel a ṭha bawk a, alo len hunah pawh a Pi Zawni achhun ngei theih nan,” a ti a. Dt 11 April 1994 Thawhṭan ni zingah ka Nu Zawni chuan ka fanu hming a tan Lalhmangaihzualzeli ti in a sa a. Ka nau te’n, “Ka nu, i hming sak hi a sei lutuk a ni, ‘zel’ tih hi paih mai rawh,” an ti a, ka nu chuan, “Paih love, Lalpa hi kan hmangaih zual zel tur a lawm,” a ti a, a phuah ang chuan a pu hlen ta a ni.

Hnahthial a kan awm lai hian kan fanu Lalhmangaihzualzeli (Mazuali) chu Pathian hnenah kan hlan nghal a, a hlantu Pastor Chalhmingliana a ni. Kan nauhlan lai a nau hlan ve hi an tam hle a, Gospel Cente’nary kum leh Mizo a aw b Cente’nary kum a ni bawk a, kan rual a nau hlan vete nau hmingah chuan Cente’nary a tel nawk hlawm mai.

Hetia Mizoram a kan cham chhung hian Mire hnamin an hnam thlarau bo chhanchhuak tura Mizoram an rawn auhna chuan mite thinlungah nasa takin hna a thawk a, BCM pawh chuan Lalpa kohnaah ngai in an ngaipawimawh em em a ni. BCM Assembly-ah hial lo sawi a, Mire ram a Lalpa rawngbawl chu ṭha an lo ti tlang a, Mire ram a thawh danturah CFB President Rev RT Mawia biak a, a ṭul chuan thawhho pawh pawi an ti lova, Pu Mawia chu rawn be turin kan haw thlak rualin Missionary Lalthawmliana rawn tirh chu an tum ta a ni.

Ka natna Aizawl Civil Hospital a ka inentir chuan TB te a lo intan tir hi a lo ni a. Lalpa zarah ka natna pawhin min kian san tawh a, Mizoramah thla kua zet kan cham hnu in min entu Doctor pawhin, “In haw thei tawh ang, mahse damdawi kha kum khat chhung chu i ei tlingtla ngei ngei tur a ni,” a ti a. Ka fanu chu thla ruk mi lek a nih lai in khaw lum em em lain, hmun lum lehzualah, Lalpa’n awm tura min ruatna hmun Bangladesh Mire ram lam pan chuan kan inpaw thla ve ta hnak hnak a. Kan rual hian BCM in Mire ram a thawh dan tur ah CFB President Rev RT Mawia rawn be tura an mi tirh, Missionary Lalthawmliana chu a rawn kal ve a.

Bangladesh a kal tur chuan Pukzing lamah Sajek a lut thla turin kan kal a, khua a lum em em mai a, kawng lah chu a hnim bawk si a, kan thuam phur Chakma pahnih lah chu kir leh hman an duh avangin an kal chak em em mai a, keini chuan kawng kan hriat siloh a vangin kan thuam phurte chu kan umphak loh chuan kawng kan bo mai kan hlau bawk si a. Chuvangin kan um hlawk hlawk reng mai a, kan chau em em mai a, Sajek New Lawngkawr kan thlen dawn chuan ruahpui vanawnin min nan hrep lehnghal a.

New Lawngkawr ah chuan U Tlangmawia teinah kan thleng a, an ni chuan min lo duat em em mai a, vawk lian zet mai hi min lo talh a, ni thum kan cham a, chutia kan cham chhung chuan kalkawng a khaw lum em em a hah tak a kan kal a vang leh ruappui vanawn in min nan a vangte pawh a ni ang; kan fanu chu thih ngamin a na ta mai a, New Lawngkawr chu Bangladesh thingtlang khaw chengker tak mai a nih a vangin damdawi han lei mai tur lah a awm bawk silova, kan thla aphang tak zet a ni. U Tlangmawia nau Nghakthanga chu tlawmngai in New Lawngkawr a ṭanga nikhat kal zet Tuisen bazar a mi damdawi min zu lei sak a, a ni chu keimahni a vangin a hmanhmawh em avangin a rawn lehlang hman a ni. Kan fanu a dam theihna turin Nghaka chu ava han hah dawn tehlul em.

Kan fanu pawh chu a zia ve leh ta a, Lalpa hruaina in tluang takin Rangamati chu kan zu thleng leh a, hetih lai hian BCM in an biak duh Pu Rualthanmawia chu Rangamati a a awm lai a lo ni hlauh mai a. BCM palai Thawma’n asawi duhte sawi in inkawm na hun ṭha chu an nei thei ta a. Mahse, CFB President chuan thu tawp a sawipui duh tatlat lo mai a, “Han haw leh la, in hotute Dhaka-ah ka hnenah rawn kal rawh se, an rawn kal thei dawn lo a nih chuan min rawn hrilh se la, Calcutta-ah kan inhmu mai dawn nia,” a ti a, Thawma pawh chu a haw chho ve leh ta mai a.

Thawma chuan BCM hotu te hnen a thil awmzia a han hrilh chuan, BCM hotu te –President Rev Raltawnga leh AGS Rev B.Thangchina te chu CFB President Rev RT Mawia hnen a Mire ram rawngbawl dan tur sawipui tur chuan Dhaka a rawn kal an tum a, mahse Culcatta an thlen hnu in engemaw rokhawlhna a awm a vangin Dhaka-ah chuan an kal thei ta lova, Culcatta a ṭang chuan engemaw rokhawlhna a awm avang a Dhaka a an kal theih loh thu leh a theih chuan amah chu rawn kal a Culcutta a in be mai turin Rev RT Mawia chu an phone a, mahse Rev RT Mawia chu Culcutta ah chuan a kal thei leh si lova, an inbe thei lo hlen ta a ni. Chutia an biak tur an biak theih tak lovah chuan BCM hotu te chu Mizoramah an haw leh a, Mire ram a thawhna tur kawng dapin BCM hotute chuan CFB President Rev RT Mawia chu vawi thum lai lehkha an thawn leh a, mahse BCM hotute chuan chhan na vawikhat pawh an hmuh loh avangin Mire ram a thawh dan kawng chu tihngaihna awm ta vak lo ni in a lang leh ta a ni.

Mire ram hi setana kulhpui a ni a, hmelmapa setana chuan a kulhpui ṭhiat a Pathian ram din tur chuan a phal lo em em a ni. Tunhma NEIG Mission hun lai a Mire ho an sak zia te, Voluntary Missionary hun lai a rawngbawlna a sak zia leh Mire ram tak a an zuk luh thlak hleihtheih loh dante leh kei ni AFC Mission Board ngei pawh beidawng a an lo ṭilh zia leh an mi tirhte pawh pakhat mai bâk chu an kir leh vek dante, tunhnu a Mire ram a Mission hrang hrang a awm hnuah pawh thawktu ṭhenkhat chu Pathian ram ti zautu ai a Pathian ram zauna kawng daltu an nih zawk zia zawng zawngte leh tumna tak tak tel lo chuan awlâi takin Mire ramah hian a luh mai theih dawn loh ziate kan hotute hnenah ka sawi ṭhin a.

Kan hotute pawh chuan a tihngaihna tak an hriat loh avangin Mire ram a thawh tumna pawh chu a reh leh ta vang vang rih a. Kum 2000 a lo inher chhuah chuan CFB Mission chuan Mire ram chu hnuchhawnin Bawm ram lam a hawi ta zawk a, Chutia CFB Mission in Mire ram a a rawngbawlna a chawlhsan tak hnu chuan thil ṭul avangin Mizoramah ka chhuak chho a, kan khua Hnahthial ka han thlen chuan kan Kohhran hruaitute chuan kan rawngbawl dante min zawt a, chutia kan ti ti naah chuan Mission ṭanpuitu kan neih tawh loh thute ka sawi a, chu chuan kan Kohhran hruaitute beng a verh hle mai a. Local Church Committee naahte an lo sawi a, a remchan chuan kan Local Church chuan min rawih an duh thute relin a remchan dawn leh dawn loh BCM Head Quarter ah phone in an lo zu zawt a.

BCM Head Quarter lam a hotute chuan anmahni kut a ka awm a ṭhat zawk tur thu leh kan Kohhran (Hnahthial Bazar Locak Church) Committee Resolution keng a Head Quarter Committee hma a keimah ngei kal a inlan turin an rawn hrilh a. Kan Head Quarter lam hotute duh dan ang chuan kan Kohhran Committee thurel keng chuan a thuk Dt 22 February 2000 Thawhleh ni chuan Lungleiah chuan ka chhuk ta a. BCM Head Quarter Working Committee hmaah chuan Mire ram report leh CFB Mission nen a kan inthlah dante sawi tura min duh leh an hriat duh min zawhnate chhangin ka sawi a. Ka lehkha pawimawh ken pawh chu ka pe nghal bawk a.

BCM in Mire ram a hma an rawn la dawn a nih chuan keimah chauh ni lovin Mire ram a ka rawngbawlpuite pawh la a Mire ram chu Field a la law law turin ka ngen a, keimah chauh a min lâk dawn ai chuan Mire ram a BCM in hma an lak loh law law a ṭhat zawk tur thute pawh ka sawi nghal bawk a. Achhan chu Mizoram aṭangin Field dang angin Missionary an in tir thla ve zung zung thei dawn lova, ka thawhpuite an la ve lo a nih chuan Mire ramah keimah chauh chuan engmah ka ni dawn chuang lova, BCM Mission hming a chhiat phah mai mai zawk dawn a ni tihte ka sawi ve nual bawk a. Min zawh duhte min zawh hnu leh ka sawi duhte ka sawi hnuah chuan kei chu ka chhuak leh ta a.

Atukah chuan Working Committee Member Pa Ngurzika (Lunglei Moria Kohhran Upa) chu nimin lam a an thu tluknate ka zawt a, a ni chuan, Mire ram a thawh an rel thluk thute, June thla ral hma ngei a anmahni ngei rawn kal an tum thute, chuta ṭanga aṭul anga hmalak chhoh zel an tum dante min han hrilh chuan ka thinlung hi lawmin akhat hi a ni ber mai. “Lalpa’n kan authawm hria in min lo ngaithla ngei mai,” ka ti a, ka thinlungin Lalpa hnenah lawmthu ka sawi nghal mawlh mawlh reng bawk a. Rev. Sangvela leh Rev. Ramdinmawia te pawh an rawn kal tawh bawk.

35Rev. Sangvela leh Rev. Ramdinmawia Empu khua-ah

Tichuan ngaihṭha takin Mire ram lam pan chuan ka haw thla leh ta vang vang a. Kan khua ka thlen chuan kan Kohhrante chu thil awmdan kimchang takin ka han hrilh a, ṭhenkhat an lawm hle laiin ṭhen khat chuan rin harsa an la ti hle bawk a. Keini chu, “Mizoram Baptist nen kan inzawm tawh dawn a vangin kan Kohhran hmingah pawh Baptist Church of ‘Maruchah’ “Miria” (BCM) kan intih atha ang,” ka ti a. An ni pawhin tha min tihpui a. Hun a kal zel a, Baptist Church of Mizoram (BCM) chuan an thutiam ang ngei in ni 31 May 2000 Nilaini chuan mi pathum : Promotor R.Zaichhuana, Pu R.Thianghlima Zotlang Mission Committee Member leh Pu Lalngurliana Thenhlum Kohhran Secretary te chu an rawn thleng a. Kan Kohhran chuan kan lo lawm hle mai a, anni pathum chuan rei deuh cham a Mire khaw dang pawh tlawh kual an tum a, mahse anzing a mi Pu R.Thianghlima chu a khua asik ta tlat mai a, hmun dangah pawh kal thei lovin kan khua Empu aṭang chuan an haw leh ta a ni.

Mizoram a ṭanga rawn kal, kan hotute an haw hnu chuan thil ṭul a vangin Mizoram-ah ka kal leh a, hemi ṭum a Mizoram a ka kal hian BCM Head Quarter ka tlawh a, Mire ram a rawngbawlna bulṭan nan kei, Bible Thuthlunghlui lettu, Pastor Chownglowk, Evangelist pahnih leh Evangelist Teacher pakhat te hlawh min rawn pe nghal a, kan lawm takmeuh a ni.

BCM Mission chuan chak zawkin Mire ram rawngbawlnaah hma a la chho zel a. Ni 9 February 2002 Inrinni chuan BCM Associate General Secretary i/c Mission & Evangelism Rev T.C. Laltlawmlova leh Promotor R.Zaichhuana leh Audio Visual – a thawktu Pu Ruata Kawlni te’n min rawn tlawh leh a. Chutah chuan a rammi thawktu min pek belh leh a, kan Hostel naupangte pawh engemawzat min chawm sak bawk a, Hostel cook hlawh pawh min lo pek sak bawk a ni. Heng kan thawktute hlawh min rawn pek sak bâkah pawh hian sum sen ngaihna a piangah a ṭul angin hma an rawn la ta zel a ni. A ṭul angin kan hotute chuan min rawn tlawh reng bawk.

Kum 2004 aṭang phei chuan Field Director fel tak, Bangla thiam em em, kan dinhmun min hrethiam em em tu ni bawk Rev Lalhmunsanga min rawn pe a, a ni chu Chittagongah a awm a, a awmna aṭang chuan min rawn tlawh reng ṭhin a. Mahse kan Field Director chuan Bangladesh a awmreng turin Visa a neih theih tawh loh avang in kum 2005 December thla khan Mizoram lamah min haw san leh a, kei chu Field Incharge in min dah ta a ni.

Kan Field Director Rev Lalhmunsanga chuan Baptist Church of Maruchah (BCM) te hmalam hun min thlirpui a, kan tlin vang nilovin, kan mamawh a vang leh kan inzir chhoh zel nan Baptist Church of Maruchah (BCM) chu Assembly te min siampui a, Kohhran inkaihhruaina bu-te min siampui bawk a, tun thleng hian kum tin BCM rorelna sang ber Assembly chu kan la nei ziah ṭhin a ni.

Kan Kohhran-te hian Pastor niturin min duh thu hi an sawi reng ṭhin a, vawi tam tak Pastor hna thawk turin min ngen ṭhin a, mahse kei chuan, “Pastor ka nih kher a ngai hleinem, ka thiamna pawhin a tlin lova,” ka ti a. Mahse kum 2002 a Mizoram a ṭanga kan hotu BCM AGS Rev T.C. Laltlawmlova te rawn kal khan helam (Mire Baptist Kohhran) a kan Kohhrante chuan kan hotu rawn kalte hnenah chuan keimah Pastor atan a min duh thu leh aṭul zia leh Pastor ka nih thei danturte an lo zawt in an lo sawipui a, kan Pu chuan, “Chutiang tak a in duh a in mamawh a nih chuan Pastor-ah lo la ula, ramthim in la ni a, keini pawh tunhmate chuan Tirhkoh aṭangin aṭul angin Pastor-ah kan in hlangkai zel mai a lawm, amârawh chu keini chuan kan nemnghet thei lovang a, in tih tih in lo ti ula, keinin kan lo hriatpui dawn che u nia,” an ti a.

362004-2005 a kan Field Director Rev. Lalhmunsanga te chhungkua

Chutia kan hotu berin a tih takah chuan, ka duh emaw, ka duh lo emaw ngaipawimawh tawh lovin, aṭulna avang zawkin kan Kohhran chuan ni 10 November 2003 Pathian ni a Baptist Church of Maruchah (BCM) khawmpui rorel chuan, “Evan Rosanglura Fanai hi kan Pastor tur a kan duh leh kan mamawh avangin Pastor a la nemngheh tur a tan Probatiobnary Pastorah kan ruat e,” ti in Pro Pastor nihna chu min pe ta a. Ka hnial thei lo na in ka hming bul a Pro-Pastor tih ka han dah ve tur chu ka inthlahrungin ka zak ru hle mai a. Bangladesh ah chuan a zia tak a la awm a, Mizoram a ka kal hunah Pastor atan a min hmuh tlin dawn loh tur ziate ka ngaihtuah in ka zam hle mai a.

Chutia keima lam in en a ka insit em em lai chuan kan Kohhramte chuan, “Kei nin Pastor atan kan duh che a, i duh leh i dil a vanga Kohhran in Pastor a tan ruat che kan nilova, Pastor a tan kan mamawh em vang zawk che a ruat che kan ni, khawi hmunah pawh Pastor i nihna hi zak lovin a ṭul chuan i sawi zel zawk tur a ni, i zah avang a i inzêp a nih chuan Pastor a tana ruattu che Kohhran leh Pathian i zahpui tihna a ni dawn a ni,” min ti a. An sawi ang chuan Pathian leh a Kohhran te’n min ruat ka nih a vangin Pro-Pastor ka nih thu chu a ṭul angin ka sawiin ka lehkhabu ziak leh ka Article ziakahte pawh Pro Pastor tih ka ziak ve ta kalh zel a.

Hun a lo kal zel a Head Quarter lam a kan hotute pawh an lo inthlak ve zel bawk a, kan hotu thenkhat chuan, “Nangchu kan milehsa i ni a, kan milehsate reng reng chu tunlaiah chuan B.D pass phawt loh chuan Pastor a nih ngawt theih loh, chuvangin Pro Pastor inti tawh lo la a ṭha ang, kan Missionary te chu a ṭul angin serh leh sang khawih theina kan pe ṭhin a, serh leh sang khawih theihna kan pe zawk dawn che nia,” min ti a.

Chutia kan hotu te’n min tih takah chuan lawm takin ka pawm a, kan hotute in a min tih dan chu kan Kohhranah ka sawi a, an ni pawh chuan a tihngaihna tak an hre bik chuang lova, “Kan tan chuan Mizoram a B.D sawm rual ai chuan i hlu fe zawk a sin mawle, mahse chutia hotu te’n an tih chuan an thu chu i ngai chang phawt ang u,” an ti a, kan hotute thu chu kan ngaichang ta a.

Athuhrimah ka dinhmun hi mihringte mithmuhah chuan a khawlhkham ve angreng khawp mai a, kan hotu te’n Pathian thu zir leh tur a min tih lahin Field chhuahsan a kum thum, kum li B.D. han zir leh tur chuan ka milehsate chutiang chen chen chhuahsan theih dinhmunah an ding si lova, ka awm loh hlan a min thlaktu tur lah an awm bawk si lo. Kan hotute hnenah chuan keiin a B.D. ka zir leh ai chuan nakinah ka milehsate aṭang a zir thei an awm hun a min sponsor sak zawk turin ka ngen a, ka ngenna pawh chu min pawm sak nghe nghe a ni.

Kei chu Lalpa’n arammi ni turin min dah a, mahse Pathian khawngaihna zarah BCM chuan an Missionary ah min ngai nghet tlat bawk si a. Khirh nalai tak pawh a awm a, mahse, a enga pawh chu ni se, kei mi tlinglo leh ṭhahnem lo tak mai hi khawngaihna a vanga Lalpa’n a rawngbawltu te zinga pakhat a min ruat ve a ni tih erawh tuma hnial rual loh in ka chiang a ni. Lalpa’n a rawngbawltu tlinglo tak hi min hre reng a, a mite thinlungah thu sawi in ka nih phak bâk leh ka phu loh nihna min pe in min chawimawi nasa hle a ni. Bangladesh ah kan Field Director chu a awm leh theih tak siloh avangin kum 2006 Baptist Church of Mizoram (BCM) Assembly vawi 110-na Assembly Executive Minute January 2006 page 67-71-ah Mire zing a rawngbawl dantur ruahmanna (Recmmentdation) 7-na ah chuan Mire Field Incharge a min ruat thu a lo chuang kalh mai a.

Hetia Field Incharge hial a BCM Assembly in min lo ruat ta mai hi ka mawhphurhna a sangin ka phu lo hle a. Mire ram a kan hma lâk zel dantur-ah leh Field a serh leh sang khawih theihna dan turah pawh AGS i/c Mission and Evangelism Rev Sangvela chuan min sawipui nghal bawk a, “Mire Kristian te’n an Pastor-a an duh che a an mamawh em em che lai in keini lam chuan Pastor-ah kan nemnghet thei silo che a, mahse tunah chuan Baptist Church of Maruchah (BCM) in Assembly in nei ve tawh a, In Assembly-ah lo in nemnghet mai rawh u, kei ni chuan kan lo hriatpui ve dawn che u nia,” a ti a.

37Pastor a min nemnghet lai

Kan AGS in thurawn min pek ang chuan Pro Pastor a kum thum ka awm hnu leh Baptist Church of Mizoram (BCM) in serh leh sang khawih theihna min pek tak si loh a vangte chuan kum 2006 Baptist Church of Maruchah (BCM) Assembly December ni 17 Pathian ni zing inkhawmah chuan Rev Chownglowka’n Pastor a tan min nemnghet ta a ni. Pastor atan a min nemngheh lai hian Pastor Ioungrung leh Upa Menkaw-a te’n an lo ṭawiawm bawk.

Mire ram a Mission thawktawh leh thawk mekte hi an zavai chuan an chanchin kan chhui kilkelh thei lova, a chhan chu Record ṭha kan neih loh bâkah Mission ṭhenktahte chu an la awm reng emaw kan tih lain an lo awm leh tawh lova, ṭhenkhatte chu chhui zui tlak vak lohte pawh an awm bawk vangte pawh a ni bawk. Chuvangin heti chin hi kan han tarlan theih chin chu a ni e.

BUNG 13

MIRE RAM RAWNGBAWLNA A KAN HMALAK DANTE

1. Thuhril leh Zirtir.

2. Literature lam a hmalakna.

3. Audio leh Vedio hmang a rawngbawlna.

4. School leh Hostel hmangin.

5. Damdawi hmanga tihdamna rawngbawlna in.

6. An eizawnna (Aconomy) lam.

7, Mire hnam ngei hruaitu puitling a chher chhuah.

8. Anmahni ke a ding thei tura buatsaih.

Mire ram a Missionnary rawngbawl hna thawk tura kei, mi tling lo leh thiamna lamah pawh rual ban zo lo tak mai Lalpa’n min han thlang ve tlat mai hi a mak ka ti in a ropui ka ti a. Engkim titheitu, engkim neitu leh pe theitu, a mamawhtute hnen a ui lo leh hau lova finna leh remhriatnate leh a ṭul anga hmanrua thlenga pe ṭhintu Lalpa chuan a thlarau-in min thuam a, ka thiamna in a phâk bâk thlengin thiamna, remhriatna leh finna min pe a. Dil nachang ka hriat lohte pawh ka mamawh apiang min pe zel bawk a ni.

1. Thuhril leh zirtir : Lalpa rawngbawlnaah hian khawi hmunah pawh Thuhril leh zirtir hi a pawimawh em em a. Mire ram a rawng kan bawlnaah pawh chu chu kan hna hmasa a ni a, tun thleng hian he hna hi kan la thlahthlam ngai lo a ni.

Mire ram a ka awm tirh khan kan unau Miria te chu taksa leh thlarauah an la hniam em em mai a, chuvangin an hnen a thuhril leh zirtirna pek chu ka huphurhin chu hna chu thawh thuai thuai ṭul ka ti em em mai bawk a, chuvang chuan an ṭawng chu theih tawpin ka zir a, Lalpa ṭanpuina in kum hnih ka awm chuan Mire ṭawngin Pathian thu ka sawi thei a, nuamti takin Mire ṭawngin ka ṭawngṭai thei bawk a ni. Kum li ka awm chuan an ṭawngin Zirṭan bu, Mire ṭawng Grammar bu, hlabu, leh Kristian vanram awngzawh bute ka siam in ka letlin thei a ni. Lalpa chu fakin awm rawh se.

Bangladesh-ah hian ka awmna Bandarban District-ah deuh chauh hian Miriate hi an awm a, Bandarban District zau zawng hi 4502 Sq Km’s a zau a ni a, Miriate chu a tlangpuiin chhim lam Mire tlangpui (Chimbuk range) Matamahuri, Marancha hung leh Bawm ram chhim lamahte an awm a, chungah chuan bial pawh nei hran lem lovin Chanchinṭha hril in ka vak chiam mai ṭhin a, Matamuhuri lam Burma ram ri thlengin biakinte pawh kan nei ve nual mai a.

Ka sawi tawh ang khan Miriate hi chu inkungkainna ngaipawimawh mi an ni a, Mizo ka nihna nilovin Pastor Chownglowka fapa (Miria) ka nihna chu ka hmang ṭangkai hle a, ka kalna khuate chu eng hnamte nge an nih ka hrechiang hmasa a, ka mi kawmate chu engtia koh tur nge ka hriat hmasak leh a ngai a. Ka papui, ka pate, ka pu, ka ni, ka ṭang (pate farnu ni-te pasal), leh ka u emaw unaupa (Miria te chu an inkungkaihnaah inkoh dan keini Mizote ai chuan an ngah fe zawk a ni) tiin emaw kovin, thlawhhma lamte leh an dam ṭhat leh ṭhat lohte zawt a sawi puiin zawi zawiin Pathian thu ka sawipui chauh ṭhin a, chuti chuan inpawh takin kan inkawm thei ṭhin a ni.

Miriate hi an la hnufual em a vangin hnam dang lak a ṭang hian an inlahrang em em a, chuvang chuan hnam dang thusawi chu han zawm tinah an tin ṭhin lo ti ila kan sawi sual tampui awm love. Chuvangin a nih ka ring, Mire ram ka zu thlen thleng khan an chhehvelah hnam dang changkang zawkte lo awmin kan unau Bawm phei chuan an hnenah chanchinṭha an lo hril thin a, Kristiante pawh engemawzat lo siam tawh mahse an incheina, an ṭawng zahmawh tak tak leh an khawsak phung an la thlak chuang meuh lo a ni.

Kei pawh ka incheina an mahni anga ka la inthlak hma leh an ṭawng ka la thiam chian hma chuan chanchinṭha hrila ka zin changte hian ṭhen khat chu nutling patlingte pawh min hmuh chuan an tlanchhiat dawr dawr chang leh keimah zawkin ka hlauh a ka tlanchhiat changte pawh a awm ṭhin a ni.

Pathian thu sawi a ka vah velnaah hian kan veng nula U, B.N-i (Lalbiaknii) ṭingṭangte min pek leh Arth & Culture Didector Pi Bawihchhingpuii Hand Mike (aurinnate) min pek chu mipui ka hipna atan a hmanraw ṭangkai tak mai a ni a, ka ṭingṭang ri leh aurinna ri an hriat chuan ka zai ngaithla tur leh ka ṭingṭang perh en tur chuan mi tam tak tak an rawn pungkhawm ṭhin a. Tin, milem Pathian thu sawina atan a remchangin lian pui pui a ka ziak hmangte chuan ka zir tir bawk ṭhin.

Hetia chanchinṭha hril a ka vah hlan hian ka nupui Zopuii chu a lo hah em em ṭhin a. Keima insak ve, lian leh ṭha tawk a ka sak chu kum khat pawh kan luah hma in CFB President Pu Rualthanmawia chuan Empu khaw chim chhuah lam a naupang za ngawt leng tura a sak Hostel lian leh seipui mai khaw pawna awmah chuan awm turin min ti a, chu Hostel lianpui mai piah lawkah chuan School atan a a tih Bawngin tia lek School in te tek te hi a awm bawk a. Chu a Hostel sakah chuan naupang awm tur an awm loh avangin a rawp angreng hle tawh a, chutah chuan kan awm ta a, thli atleh dawn a a lan chuan khawchhungah tlanchhiat zel a ngai bawk a.

Ka khualzin chhung chuan ka nupui duhtak leh ka hmangaih em em ka fanu kum khat pawh la tling lote chu kan awmna chu ramhnuai a nih avangin an lo awm ngam ṭhin si lova, chutih lai chuan Army te’n kawngpui an siam a vangin an teivâk reng mai bawk si a. Mire ho lah chhunah chuan an feh vekin tar leh naupang bâk inah an awm ngai bawk silo, bâkah an in chu thim in a ṭawp em a vangin Mire in bathlarah chuan nau paw chungin nileng ṭhak a lo din changte pawh a awm ṭhin a, zanah chuan kan khaw nula ṭhenkhatin an riahpui ṭhin a. chutih lai chuan Tk 1200 ka hlawh ve a, mahse hlawh hmuh loh thla a tam thei ṭhin khawp mai. Han hmuh chang pawhin hmuh loh thla kha chu hmuh loh thla a ni tawp zel mai bawk a.

Chuvangin kan ei leh in tur kan thawhchhuah ve angai a, lo leh huante ka siam bawk a, ka nupui u leh nau te’n min rawn pui ṭhin a vangin kei chu ka zin thei zawk chauh ṭhin a ni. Lalpa’n Bangladesh ami Bawm nupuiah min pe chu ka rilru tak hian ka lawm em em ṭhin a, a chhan tamtakte zinga pakhat chu chawhmeh ṭha han hmeh ve tur in a leina tur pawisa kan neih loh a vangin ramhnuai a hnim hnah; (eng hnah hnahte nge pawh ka hre lo) ka nupui chuan a rawn la a, chung a rawn lâkte chu chawhmeh antuiah a han siam a, tui ti takin kan ei thei zel a, chhuan chhama kan awm leh lek chang lah a tam, mahse ka bulah phun nawi miah lo leh lungawi takin a awm zel thei hi ka nupui chungah leh hetiang nupui ṭha min petu Lalpa chungah ka lawm em em thin a ni.

Ka zin chhuah loh chang pawhin ka nupui leh fanaute chu ka awp lum hman lo em em mai a, kan ei tur ka thawhchhuah angai a, kan khaw ṭhalaite chu hla ka zir tir a, ziak leh chhiar ka zir tir reng ṭhin bawk a, mite zirtir tur atan milem ka ziak in ka typewriter upa tawh tak chuan Mizo hla Mire ṭawng a lehlin leh lehkhabu dang dang Mire ṭawnga buatsaihin hun ka hmang reng ṭhin bawk a, kan in luah lah chu ramhnuai a nih bakah a chhuat chu lei a ni a, rul leh tit te an rawn lut renga, thosi leh vaihmite a tam bawk si, a chung rangva siling awmlo a nih avangin ṭhalah chuan a lum thei em em mai bawk a, fanu leh fapa kan neih ve diah duah tawh hnu pawh chuan kan ei-in tur inzawn chawp nen, chanchinṭha hril a vahchhuah reng ngai bawk si.

Chutiang khawp a amah ngaihsak hman lo leh hreawm a ka awmpui chung chuan ka nupui Zopuii chu a vui ngai lo reng reng a, hreawm ti hmel pawh a pu ngai bawk lo. Hreawm atih ber chu kan khuaah hian dawrte a awm ve a, fate chhang leh chhithlum han lei sakna fahran pawh kan nei lo chu hreawm a tih thu a sawi ve ṭhin.

Khaw hrang hrangah kalin Pathian thu ka sawi a, Kristiante an lo awm chuan ziak leh chhiar ka zirtir nghal zel bawk a, a thiam fal deuh bikte chu ka awmloh hlan a zirtirtu a tan ka ruat zel bawk a. Kan khaw nulate chu Action Songs te ka zirtir a, ṭhalai ho nen ahuhovin khaw dangah rawngbawlin kan chhuah chang pawh a awm ṭhin a, bung hmasa lam a kan sawi tawh ang khan, kan khua chu incheina lamah pawh hma kan sawn chak hle a, chu chu khaw dangah pawh a kangkai ve zel a ni.

Chu kan awmna Hostel ruak awngrawp tak daipawn a awmah chuan kum thum kan awm hnu chuan Hostel chu chhuahsan a khaw chhunga awm ve chu Pu Rualthanmawia chu kan dil a, mahse Pu Rualthanmawia chuan, “Nangni in in luah loh chuan a chhe mai anga sin,” atih tlat avang chuan khaw chhuga kan insawn chu a phal lova. Chu Hostel sak dan chu, a ban kha thingṭawl a zawm tur a tih a nih lain asatute’n a ban thing vek kha tan in an zawm leh a, chu an zawmna chu lei hrulah a awm si a, a zawmna laiah chuan tlumpiin a ei chhe zo tawh si a, thli a tleh chuan tlu rup mai thei a ni renga.

Pu Rualthanmawia chuan Bandarban-ah Seminer turin min kova, kan khaw pa ho pawh an kal ve nual a, chung kan khaw pa ho chuan khawchhug a in kan sak a kan awm ve theih nan Pu Rualthanmawia hnenah chuan min dil sak chiam avangin khaw chug a in kan sak a kan awm ve chu min phal sak ta hram a. Khaw chhungah chuan in te takte in kawngpui bulah, ka pa Pastor Chownglowk-a te in bulah, maurapin in ka sa ve a, kan in sawn chiah chu chu Hostel awngrawp tak mai pawh chu a tlu ve nghal ta a ni.

Miria te chu tlawmngaihnate zirtir in kan ṭhalai bember hlo thlo hlei thei lo, mi hlo thlawh zawh hun a zo ve thei lote chu kan pui bawk ṭhin a, kan pawisa thawh khawmte chu mi harsate leh ṭanpui ngaite ṭanpui nante kan hmang bawk ṭhin a ni. Kum 1992 khan kan unau Bawm ECC khawmpui, kan awmna aṭang a hla angreng tak Ruangsuri Mumthar khuaah kan khaw ṭhalai mi engemaw zat kan kal a, Actionsong’s hmanga rawngbawlna kan neih pawh mite’n an lawm tak meuh a ni.

Miria te hian ṭawng zahmawh buru tak tak sawi hi ahmei a pain an serh lovin an uar em em a, chumai nilovin an hmingah pawh hmeichhia chu hmeichhe zahmawh hming, mipa chu mipa zahmawh hming leh thil dang pawh hming chhe pui pui hminga in phuah/koh an uar em em a, chungte chu kan innêl a, kan inhmangaih tawh chinah chuan theih tawpin bansan aṭul ziate ka zirtir ṭhin a. An nula leh tlangval inrim dan khaw danga zan dar sawmpahnih hnu lam a an inrim dan leh an nungchang mawi lo leh inthlahdah em emte chu a ṭhat loh ziate leh thil dang tamtak zirtir an ngai a, ka theih ang tawk in ka zirtir ṭhin a, apawn a ṭang nilova achhung a ṭanga ka zirtir a vang leh ka hmangaih a, an ni pawhin min hmangaih bawk a vangin ka han hau deuh bawrh bawrh chang pawh chuan ka chungah an lungawi lo chuang lova, ziak leh chhiar ka zirtir lai phei chuan ka ṭhin a lo chhe ve bawk nen; ṭap zawih zawih a ka hau changte pawh a awm ṭhin a ni.

Khawi ram leh khawi hnam zingah pawh chanchinṭha hrilin zirtir ila chung kan hrilh leh kan zirtir a te hnam chu kan hmangaih em em tur a ni a, enganga hnam mawl pawhin hmangaihna chu an hre thiam in an tan pawh anmahni hmangaihtu lo hmangaih let ve chu thil har a ni lova, awlsam takin an lo hmangaih ve nghal mai thei a ni. Chutiang a inkungkaihna nghet leh ṭha a kan hrilh a kan zirtir a nih chuan a pawn a tangin kan zirtir a nilova, achhung a ṭangin kan zirtir tihna ni.

A biktakin hnam mawlte zingah chuan apawn a ṭanga zirtir chu an hrehiam har em em in an ṭi tlat ṭhin a, a chhung a ṭanga zirtir erawh chuan kan thu hrilh leh zirtirte chu awlsam takin an hrethiam a, harsa ti lo takin an lo pawm mai thei a ni tih keima tawng ngei a ṭangin ka hre chiang a ni.

38Church Leader Training ka pe lai

Seminer leh Treining pek : Akhat tawkin kan Mission a thawktu leh Kohhran hruaitute chauh nilovin Mire Kristian Kohhran hruaitu zawng zawngte ko khawm in Pathian thu zirna Seminer ka neihpui ṭhin a, ni khat, ni hnihte hun kan hmang ṭhin a, a nuam kan tiin kan hlawkpui thei ṭhin khawp mai. Keima tan tak pawh a ṭangkai khawp mai. Hetiang a Jubject hrang hrang zirtir tur hian kei pawh lehkha ka chhiar nasa in ka inbuatsaih nasat ṭhin em avang in.

Hetia Mire ṭawng vek a Subject hrang hrang zirtir tur a tan a ka buatsaih hi Kohhran hrang hrang leh Mire ram a Mire ṭawng a Lalpa rawngbawltu te’n anmahni Kohhran ṭheuhah an hman ṭangkai lehzual theih nan a bu pawhin ka siam bawk a ni.

2. Leterature lam a hmalakna : Kan unau Miria te taksa leh thlarau lama hma an lo sawn zel theih nan Literature lama hmalâk sak hi a ngai em em a, eng chen nge Lalpa’n Mire ramah min awmtir dawn ka hre si lova. Chuvangin Lalpa’n Mire ṭawng thiamna min pek hi ka awmloh hnu thleng pawh a Miria te’n an ṭangkai pui zel theih nan Leterature lam a hma lâk hi ṭha in ka hria a. Mire ram a ka awm mek lai pawhin mipakhat ve mai ka nih a vangin khawi kipah ka kalin ka awm thei si lova.

Mire tan lehkhabu ka buatsaih sak theih chuan ka kal theih loh leh ka awm lohna hmun amite hnenah pawh lehkhabu hmang chuan rawng ka bawl zel thei dawn tho a ni tihte ka ngaihtuah a, ṭha dawn hle in ka hria a. Lehkhabu siam tur chuan lehkha chhutna khawl leh lehkhabu siamna sum leh paite ka mamawh dawn a ni tih ka hria a, mahse chu chu ka tih theih loh thil a nih a vangin Lalpa mawhphurhah ka dah a.

Miriate chu ziak leh chhiar kan zirtir a, achhiar tur lehkhabu kan pek leh si loh chuan kan zirtir hahna chuan awmzia anei tlem dawn a ni tihte ka ngaihtuah bawk a. Chutia ka ngaihtuahna chu Lalpa’n a lo hria a ni ang, a mawhphurhna chu rang takin a rawn hlen ta mai a. Ka la hmelhriat ngai loh leh min hretu ni pawh a ka hriat loh, Malumghat Baptist Association Mission a an hotupa America sap Herold Abarson chuan lehkha min rawn thawn a, alehkha thawnah chuan Typewriter min rawn pek thu a lo inziak a, rei rial lovin kan tlangval Mensin chu Malumghat-ah chuan kan tir nghal a Typewriter ṭha tak German siam Pu Herold-a chuan min rawn pe nawlh mai a. Chu chuan ka lo suangtuah ṭhin hna chu ka thawk ṭan thei ta a ni. Lalpa chu fakin awm rawh se.

39Herold Abarson leh kei

Pu Herold an Typewriter min pek hian Mire tan lehkhabu engemaw zat ka chhu a, ka hman rim em avangin ka Typewriter pawh chu a tar in a hate (achhutna) a lo bal nual ta a, achhutna bal lai thir phekte a han chhut te chuan kut a na thei hle mai a, chuvangin Lalpa hnenah Computer ka dil ta a, “Lalpa, ka hnathawhna Typewriter min pek hi a tar tawh lutuk a, a chhutna lai pawh a bal nual tawh mai a, Computer min pe tawh mai teh, i rawng bawl lo tute zawk pawhin an nei a ni a, kei chuan i rawngbawl nan ka mamawh takmeuh a ni. Mahse, Computer khawih chu ka thiam lova, thiam turin ka zir bawk lo, min pe a nih chuan a thiamna nen min pe nghal dawn nia,” tiin ngenngawl tak in ka dil a.

Kum 2005 chuan kan Field Director Rev Lalhmunsanga chu Bangladesh ah a awm theih tak loh avangin a haw alo ngai a, a Computer kawl chu kan hotute’n Pu Sangtea hnenah chuan, “Computer kha chu Lura hman atan hnuchhiah mai rawh,” an ti a, Computer Desktop chu min hnuchhiah sak ta ruau mai a, kan khuaah Carrent a la awm loh a vangin Bandarban a ka Pi Lalzovi w/o Taia chuan, “Kan inah dah la i hnathawhna atan room pakhat ka pe ang che, hna i thawh chhung chu kan ei ang ang i ei in i in ve mai dawn nia,” a ti a.

Bandarban a ka Pi Lalzovi te inah chuan ka Computer chu ka dah a, an inah chuan hna chu ka thawk ṭhin a, achang chuan kâr khatte, kâr hnihte hnathawkin ka awm ṭhin a, ka awm chhung zawng chuan inthlahrung miah lovin ka Pi Lalzovi te hnenah chuan ka ei in ka in a, ka Pi hian min hmangaih em avangin a tu leh fate zawng zawng pawhin min hmangaih veka. Hnathawka Bandarban a ka cham chhung chuan tha ka âm thei em em a, zingah ka thova Breakfats ka ei zawh hnu aṭang chuan ka hna chu ka ṭan nghal char char a, chhunah chaw kan ei a, zan dar kua velah chaw kan ei leh a, zan dar sawmpahnih thleng hna ka thawk leh ṭhin a.

Chutiang a ka thawh rim em avang leh ka Pi te ei in (vai ei ang) chu ka pum in a lo mil vak lo nen; ka hriselna chuan kum khat pawh ka thawh hma chuan a tuar ta tlat mai a. Lalpa hnenah, “Lalpa, Computer Desktop min kawl tir reng chuan ka dam rei lo tawp ang, hna thawhtur lah ka ngah si a, Laptop min pe zawk mai rawh, Laptop chu kan in a ka Solar in ka hmang thei ang,” ka ti a.

Chumi kum chuan Mizoram ah ka han chho leh a, kan Field Director lo ni tawh, Pu Sangtea chu ka ngaih em avangin Lawngtlai bul Thingkah a a awm chu ka va tlawh a, Pu Sangte a chuan, “Hei, ka Laptop hi Amongphru in Bangkok aṭangin Secondhand min rawn lei sak a ni a, Secondhand mah ni se Japan siam a ni a, aṭha em em a, mahse achhiat palh chuan heta siam a buaithlak dawn a vangin i Dasktop kawl lai kha hotu te hnenah hralh dil la, a daih bâk chu Office ah pawisa dil la ka Laptop hi lei mai rawh,” a lo ti a.

Asawi ang chuan kan hotute chu ka dil a, kan hotute chuan min lo phal sak a, Pu Sangtea Laptop chu Lalpa’n min pe leh ta a ni. Lalpa hi chu amite tan thil ṭha hi a ui ngai lo tak tak a ni. Chu laptop chuan hna tam tak kan inchhungkhur aṭang ngei-in nuam takin ka thawk thei ta a. Kum 2007 khan Fuarlogth turin Mizoramah kan chhungkua in kan chho dawn a, kan chùan-na Jeep chu mi kan tam em avangin a chhungah ka leng ve lova a chungah ka ṭhu a, Bandarban thlen dawn chuan kawng kawiah motor a tlan chak lai tak in kan Bag chu a tla dawn a, kan bag dawm ka va tum chu (kawng kawi lai taka lo ni a) motor chung aṭang chuan kawngsir lei char laiah motor chuan min paih thla ṭhuai mai a, lei ka thlen lai pawh ka hre hman lo.

Ka nupui leh fanaute chuan motor chhung aṭang chuan, “Apa a tla,” an ti a, an râk chul mai a, motor chu a piah deuh daihah chuan a ding ta a. Keichu ka thova ka inbeng thawk thawk a, motor lam pan chuan ka kal ve leh mai a. Engmah nâ ka nei lova, Bandarban a ka Pi Lalzovi te in kan va thlen chuan ka Leptop chu ka han en nak chuan a lo keh vek mai a. Pawi ka tiin ka ui em em mai a, “Kei chuan engtikahmah Laptop thar chu ka lei leh thei dawn si lova, hotute hnenah pawh dil leh mah ila Laptop thar leina chu min pe leh dawn tawh si lova, hna thawh tur lah chu ka la ngah bawk si a,” ti in ka ngaihtuah a. Ka ngaihtuahna a buai zova, ka â muih hian ka inhria a, chaw ei nachang pawh ka hre lova.

Ka nupui leh ka fate chuan, “Mitam tak motor chung a ṭanga an tlakin natakin an inhliam a, ṭhenkhat chu an thi a, (kan line ah hian motor chung a ṭanga tla hi mi pathum lai an thi tawh a) nang chu i engmah hliam lovin Pathian in a veng che a, Laptop chu a pe leh em em ang che,” min han tih chuan ka harh huai hian ka hria a. Chuta ṭang chuan ka hlim ve leh in ka nunna Lalpa’n min zuahsak avang chuan lawm nachangte ka hre ve ta chauh a ni.

Mizoram kan thleng a, he ka lehkha bu, ‘Ka Hringnun leh Miria te Khawvel’ bu hi Mualchin Printing Press neitu M.C.Awia’n (Pu Awitea) kei in a chengkhat pawh in sengso lovin ama sumin abu min chhuah saka, kan Fuarlogth naah kan Relist nghal a, chu ka lehkhabu man pawh chu Pu Awitea chuan, “Chengkhat pawh ka la dawn lo, i mamawh lei nan i hmang dawn nia,” min ti a, chu ka lehkhabu man chuan ka nupui leh fate sawi ang ngei chuan Laptop thar leh Camera thar thatak ka lei thei ta a ni. Lalpa’n Laptop Secondhand hmang lovin Brandnew ngat min hman tir a lo duh a ni tih ka hre chhuak ta a ni. Kan sawi nawn leh teh ang, Lalpa hi amite tan hian a va han ṭha em, amite tan chuan thil ṭha engmah ui pawh a nei lo a ni. Lalpa chu fakin awm kumkhua rawh se.

Tin, Literature hmang a ka thil tum pakhat chu Miriate hi hnam hrang, ṭawng hrang hmang, Miria ni tho si hnam riat; 1. Anawk. 2. Süngmow, 3. Tamsa. 4. Dopreng, 5. Rengmitchowh. 6. Rengma. 7. Dawmrawng. 8. Uise te an awm a. Chung hnam riat zing a Kristian tam ber leh changkang deuh berte chu Anawk hi an ni a, tin an ṭawng hi aṭha in a mawi deuh ber bawk a vangin an hnam International Language atan hman sak chu ka thil tum ber pakhat a ni.

Anawk ṭawng hi Mire ṭawngpui a an hman theih chuan an tan inpawh a awl in Miria ṭheuh ṭheuh in enhran-na a bo ang a, an lo inpumkhat in kawng tam takin hma an sawn thei dawn a ni. Chuvang in zirlai bu leh lehkhabu zawng zawngah chuan Anawk ṭawng vek ka hmang a, tun hma a ṭawng inpawh lo tak tak kha tunah chuan Anawk ṭawng hmang in an inpawh deuh vek tawh a, Mire zingah Anawk ṭawng thiam lo an awm mang tawh lo a ni. Pathian thu hriltute tan pawh a zia tawh khawp mai.

2.1. Mire A Aw Zirtan bu siam : Tunhma NEIG hun lai khan Pastor H.Dala te’n Mizo a aw b hmangin Johana bu mal leh Hla 75 chu Mire ṭawngin an lo dah tawh a, mahse Mizo a aw b chuan Mire ṭawng a ziak fiah vek theih loh a vangin Pastor Chownglowka siam Mire a aw bu chu CFB Mission in bu tam tak a chhuah a, mahse a hawrawp siam danah duhthu a sam zan loh a vangin chu chu hman loh in hnawl vek a ni a, chumi hnuin keiman ka siam ve ta a, alem te chu keima kut ziak vek a la ni a (Computer ka la hman ve loh a vang in) Mire zirṭan bu ka siam chu Mire Kristiante chuan kan pawm tlangin ṭha kan ti tlang ta a, chu chu CFB Mission chu chhuah turin ka ngen a, CFB Mission chuan Copy 50 chiah min chhuah sak a.

Mire zirṭan bu chu kan mamawhna asan em a vangin Mizoramah ka kal a, BCM Head Quarter rem tihpuina in Makedonia Mission Board chuan bu 300-lai min siam sak a, chu chu Mire ramah ka hawn thla vek a, reiloteah a zawh leh vek a vangin Makedonia Mission Board-te ṭawngkamṭha umin Mire zirṭan bu min siamsak turin ka dil nawn leh a, Lalpa’n min ṭanpui a, ka dilna chu tih hlawhtlin in a awm leh ta a, Bu 500 lai min siam sak leh ta a. Makedonia Mission Board chungah leh Makedonia Mission Board hnen ui hauh lova thilpek petu zawng zawngte chungah Lalpa a vangin lawm thu ka sawi mawlh mawlh a ni e.

Chupawh chu azawh leh hnuah Aizawl a Mualchin Printing Press Copy 1000 ka chhu leh a, Mualchin Publication and Paper Works neitu Pu M.C.Awia (Pu Awitea) chuan cheng tam takin min ṭanpui leh a ni. Chupawh chu Mire ramah ka keng thla leh vek a. Chu pawh chu a zo leh ta a, Mire zirṭan bu chu siam leh a ngaih tak a vangin changtlung zawk leh mawi zawkin ka siam leh a, a bu a siamna tur pawisa chu Champhai khua Pu M.C. Sangkhuma leh Aizawl Ramhlun ‘N’ Kohhran BCM te’n min rawn tum sak leh a, chu chu Bangladesh ah page 45 Copy sanghnih in ka siam leh ta a ni. Lalpa’n a mawhphurhna chu a mite hmangin a hlen chiang khawp mai. Mire Zirṭan bu hi kan khua Empu a BCM School ah an zir a, School a zir bâkah Mire Kristian tawh phawt chuan eng Mission pawh in an zir vek bawk a ni.

2.2. Kristian Vanram Kawngzawh bu : Mire Kristian te’n lehkha zir chakna thinlung an neih theih nan leh Pathian an rinna kawnga an lo ngheh lehzual theih nan, Miriate hian milem en an peih bawk a; milem awm chi lehkhabu siam sak a ṭul hle in ka hria a, chutiang a tan chuan Kristian Vanram kawngzawh bu hi a ṭha in ringtute tan lehkhabu ropui leh chhiar nuam tak a ni tih ka hria a. A thu hi hriat a awl in chhandamna kawng zawh mekte tan puitu ṭha tak a nih ngei ka rin a vangin Kristian Vanram Kawngzawh bu chu Mire ṭawngin ka letling ta char char a.

Ka lehlin zawh hnu chuan ka ṭhian, ka rawngbawlpui nibawk Menlawnga Miria Sakrau khua a awm hnenah chuan ka han kal a, a nin dawhthei tak leh tlawmngai takin min lo endik sak vek a. Menlawnga hi a tette aṭang a Mizo hnam sipai MNF te lo awmna hmun a awm a nih a vangin Mizo ṭawng pawh a thiam ṭha hle a. a bul a ka awm hi chuan Mizoram a awm emawte ka inti lek lek ṭhin. Alem chu Mizo ṭawng bu-ah chuan a kim tawk loh avang leh duh ang a fiah tawk loh a vangin Bangla (Bengoli ṭawng) bu a mi ka hmang zawk a ni.

Mire ṭawng Kristian Vanram Kawngzawh bu page 252 chu a bu a chhuah theih a ka peih fel hnu chuan BCM Headquar lamah ka chhohpui leh a, kan hotute chu a bu a min chhuah sak turin ka ngen a, chu ka ngenna chu min tih hlawhtlin sak leh a, Mire ṭawng ngeiin Kristian Vanram Kawngzawh bu chu kum 1998 khan kan lo nei ve ta a ni. Hei hi tun a kan khua Empu a BCM School ah pawl nga (Class V) zirlai buah kan la hmang reng a ni.

Ka beisei ang ngeiin mi tam tak; Kristian ni kher lote pawhin a bu chhung a milem an han en chuan chu milem chuan sawi an nei a ni tih an hria a, mahse chu milem thusawi, a hnuai a inziak chu an chhiar thiam si loh a vangin A Aw zir duhna-ah ahruai lut a, A Aw bu an rawn lei a, ṭhenkhat chu Kristian Vanram kawngzawh bu an chhiar a ṭanga Kristian a rawn lutte pawh report ka dawng zauh zauh a ni. Kristian Vanram Kawngzawh bu chauh an chhiar thiam a nilova lehkhabu tam tak an lo chhiar thiam phah bawk a, a hlawk khawp mai, bakah chu leh khabu chuan A Aw zir chakna a siam sak bawk.

Mire ṭawng Kristian Vanram Kawng zawh bu hi ka chhuah hmasa kha a zawh tawh avangin abu chu ka ennawn leh a, a kawm pawh Color in mawi takin ka siam a, Center Church, Ramhlun ‘S’ leh Salom Kohhran Aizawl te’n abu siamna min pe a, a vawihnihna atan kan siam leh tawh bawk.

2.3. Mire ṭawng Grammar bu : Mire ṭawng hi anmahni Miria te ngei pawhin (Kei ni Mizo te pawhin kan ṭawng kan hmang diklo fo ang bawkin) an ṭawng hi an hmang dik lo ve thei hle ṭhin a. Ziak leh chhiar thiam tawhte pawhin ngaihthlak nuan taka chhiar an harsat hle ṭhin a, chhiar nuam taka ziak pawh an harsat hle ṭhin a. Aziak phei chu Grammar an thiam miau loh a vangin lehkha ziak dan leh chhinchhiahna hman dan (punctuation) an hriat loh a vangin a buai thlak ṭhin hle a, Literature lam a hma han la ve tur phei chuan anmahni Mire ṭawng Grammar an thiam ngei ngei a ngai a, chuvangin Miria te Literature lam a an ṭhan chhoh ve zel theih nan leh an hnam inpumkhatna a lo ṭhat zawk theih nan Mire ṭawng Grammar bu siam chu tihmakmawh ni in ka hria a.

Mire ṭawng Grammar bu a lo awm chuan Mire hnam zinga hnamdang (Miria ni lo) rawngbawl a awmte tan pawh Mire ṭawng zirna kawngah nasa takin a pui theih ngei ka ring bawk a ni. Mire ṭawng Grammar bu ka buatsaih chu kum 2009 khan Page 68 Copy 1000 in ka siam a ni. Tunah chuan a bu ka siam sa a zawh leh tawh a vangin kum 2020 khan Lunglei Ramzotlang BCM Kohhran ṭanpuina in Copy 2000 ka siam nawn leh tawh a ni.

2.4. Mire Kristian hla bu : Kum 1994 MCC khawmpui (MCC Annual Conferenve Galili khua) chuan Miriate hian hman a NEIG Mission in an lo buatsaih sak hla 75 awmna bâk kha chu hlabu kan neih loh a vangin Mizo hla a ṭanga Mire hla a let a Mire Kristian Hlabu changtlung zawka siam turin kan rel a, hla lettu a tan Pastor Chownglowk, Evan Singrau, Evan Menlawng leh Rosanglura Fanai (kei) te chu hla let tura tih kan ni a, hla lehlin chhung a senso chu Empu Unit CKP in tum turin an in huam bawk a.

Empu khua Biakin-ah hla lehlin hna chu kan han ṭan a, Evan Singrau chu engemaw harsatna a vangin arawn tel thei lova, Pastor Chownglowk, Evan Menlawng leh kei kan ni a. Hla kan han lehlin tirh phat aṭang chuan buaina kan nei ta tlat mai a, Pastor Chownglowka chuan, Evan Menlawnga chu rawn tel lo turin a ti a, “Kan tam chuan thu leh hla a tam e,” a ti a. Evan Menlawnga chuan mih haw san ta a.

Pastor Chownglowka nen chuan kan han bei dun ta a, hna kan ṭan dawn chauh tihah chuan buaina kan nei leh ta tlat mai a, hla pakhat, KHB No 493-na, “Aw Lalpa i malsawmna hlu kan engkim chungah a lang,” tih a chang hnihna, a tlar thum na, “Hlobet par thil nung tinreng in,” tih lai kan thlen chuan keini pahnih pawh chu kan lehlin duh dan a inang ta tlat lo mai a, Pastor Chownglowka chuan, “ ‘Hlobet par’ ti lovin, ‘Pangpar’ ti in dah mai ang, hlobet tih hla a aawm chuan ringlo te’n, ‘An hlaah chuan hlobet tihte a awm,’ an ti ang a min nuih dah a nge,” a ti ta tlat mai a.

Mahse kei chuan, “Nilove ka Pa, he hla phuahtu in ‘Hlobet’ kher a rawn tehkhin na hi a chhan a awm a lawm, hlobet chu par ve mahse tumahin, ‘He pangpar hi chu a mawi mang e,’ ti a ngaihsaktu an awm lova, chutia tih a hnêkin khawvel mihring te’n chu pangpar chu chabet chimawm takah an ngai zawk a, mihringte rah mai mai a ni a. Chutiang a mi tlawm leh hnuaihnung berte pawh chuan Lalpa malsawmna chu an dawng vek a ni tih rawn sawi lan atum a vanga ‘Hlobet par’ rawn hmang a ni, bâkah ringlo te’n rawn nuihsawh turin athu an rawn ngaithla chiang ve dawn chuang lo” ka ti a.

Mahse ka thil sawi chu a rilrem zawng a nih loh a vangin, “Nangpawh lo inthiarfihlim mai teh, lu a hai e, ka duh ang chiahin Mizo Tonic Solfa bu a mi chiah hi ka let dawn, hla bu dang a mi hlate chu Pathian Thlarau thianghlim a ṭanga phuah a ni ve lo,” a ti ta bur mai a. Kei pawh chuan ka kiansan ve leh ta a. Chu chu kan Kohhran leh Ṭhalai pawl te’n an hriat chuan Kohhran pui leh Ṭhalai pawlte chu Join Miting an kova, chutah chuan Mire hla lehlin hna leh hlabu siam hna chu ka kovah an nghat ta a.

Chutia Kohhran leh Ṭhalai te’n hla lehlin hna leh hla bu siam hna ka kova an nghah takah chuan Lalpa’n chu hna chu ka kova a dah a ngaiin tawngtai chungin fimkhur leh uluk takin Mizo Kristian hlabu pui a mi, Lengkhawm zai bu a mi leh hla lar bu a mite, ṭha ka tihte lawrkhawmin a lehlin hna chu ka thawk ta a, hla pakhat ringawt pawh vawi tam ka ennawn ṭhin a. Kum thum zet ka bei hnu chuan hla 280 chu a bu a chhuah theihin ka peih fel ta a.

Chumi hla bu chu mawi takin kum 1997 khan CFB Mission in Copy 1000 min chhuah sak ta a. Chu hla bu chu kum engemaw chen kan hman hnu in hla bu thar siam a lo ṭul leh ta a, hla thar 71 telh belh leh in hla 351 chu mawi tak in BCM in kum 2015 khan abu min siam sak leh ta a, chumi hnu chuan kum 2017 khan Mire Christian Literature Committee (MCLC) chuan Scripture Use Bangladesh (SP Bangla) pawisa pukin abu kan siam leh a, chutah chuan thu inchhangte pawh kan dah belh bawk. Tunah chuan Mire Kristian hla bu-ah hla zali (400) lai ka dah ve ta. Lalpa chu fakin awm rawh se.

Ka hla lehlin lai khan Lalpa’n min pui hle a ni tih ka hiat chian na em em chu Mire ram a ka awm a tanga kum li-na a ka hla lehlin kha kum sawmhnih hnu a kan han ennawn leh pawh khan hla thu siamṭhat ngai a lo tlem em em mai kha kei pawhin a mak ka ti khawp mai. Hla bu pawh a changkang thei ang ber in ka siam bawk a ni. Lalpa’n ka ṭawng lehlin chhung khan Miriate tan a ṭha tak a ṭawng ka leh theih nan min lo pui hle a ni. Tunah chuan hlabu a kan dah loh ka hla lehlin sa hlabute daih a awm lehtawh a, hlabu kan siam leh hunah chuan hla pawh kan dah belh ve zel in abu pawh kan ti changtlung ve zel dawn a ni.

2.5. Pathian thu zirna bu : Kum 2003 chuan keini Mire Kristian-te mamawh em em Mizoram BCM Baptisma thuzir bu chu Mire ṭawng in ka letling leh a, chupawh chu BCM Headquarter a abu a min siam sak leh tur a ka ngen-na min tih hlawhtlin sak leh in Mire tan chuan ‘Pathian thu zirna bu’ ti in ka dah a, Page 120 a chhah a ni. Mire Kristian te’n Pathian thu hriatna kawngah an ṭangkai pui khawp mai.

Hnahthial Bsazar Kohhrante tanpuina in a vawihnihna pawh chhuah a nil eh tawh bawk. Abu khhuah a nih theih nan a min tanpuitu te chungah kan lawm takmeuh a ni.

2.6. Kawng dik: Kan Kohhran hi hun rei tak lo kal ve tawh mah ila Pathian thu zirna bu siam zung zung kan harsat a vangin Sandei sikul zirlai bu kan nei lova, chuvangin Sandei sikul pawh kan nei thei lova. Kum 2004 khan keini tan a zir tawk lek Pi M.Thanzuali ziak, Mizoram BCM K.N.P. thuzir, ‘Kawngdik’ (page 118) tih chu Mire ṭawng a ka letlin chu BCM in a bu engemaw zat min siam sak a, chu chu kum hnih chhung Mire ram Kristian te’n kan zir ve a ni. Pathian thu zirna bu tih pawh khi Sande sikul-ah kan zir bawk.

2.7. Mihring thinlung (Heart of Man) : He lehkhabu hi Chhandamna kailawn pawimawh tak mai a ni a, mi mawl ber pawhin an hriatthiam theih turin a lem nen, mihring thinlung a sual bawlhhlawh chi hrang hrang awm leh chung sual chi hrang hrangte chhuah tir dan leh rawn luh leh an tum pawh a lo inven dante page 58 chu kum 2010 khan siam a ni.

2.8. Pastor manual (Inkhawm kaihhruai dan) : Mire ramah hian Lalpa ram a lo zau zel a, Kristian kan pung ve zela, mahse kan hruaitu neihte hi lohtheihloh a vanga hruaitu hna chelhte kan ni a, ziak leh chhiar thiam ngawr ngawrte, khaw tam tak leh Mission ṭhenkhatah phei chuan Kristian ni pawimawh pawh a hun hre lo leh a hman dan pawh hre lo a tam zawk an nih avangte, inkhawm kaihhruai dan takngial pawh hre lo chu atam zawk kan nih a vangin a pawimawh em em a ka hriat a vangin kum 2012 khan page 46 achhahin ka siam a, kan Mission chauh lo pawh Mire ram a Mission awm zawng zawng te’n an hmang ṭangkai em em vek a ni.

2.9. Baptist Church of Maruchah (BCM) Constitution and Rules : Mire ramah Baptist Church of Maruchah (BCM) Kohhran a lo din tak a vangin Kohhran inrelbawl dan fel zawk leh Kristiante Rinna (Confession and Faith) zirna bu kan mamawh a, kan Field Director Rev Lalhmunsanga nen Mire Kristiante mil turin 2014 kum khan page 73 a bu in kan siam a, kan Mission chauh lo pawh Mission hrang hrangin an hmang ve a, kan ṭangkaipui khawp mai. Tunah rih chuan Mire ram a Mission hrang hrang awmte hi Doctine dang la awm lovin Baptist Doctine vek an la nih a vangin heng ka lehkhabu siamte hi Mission hrang hrang pawhin ngaihngam takin kan hmang tlang vek thei hi a lawmawm khawp mai.

    1. Vanram : Hnam tin hian Vanram kan suangtuah dan leh Vanram thlen theihna tur kawng ni a kan hriat a in ang vek lo a, kan unau Miriate pawh hian Vanram an suangtuah dan a awm ve a, Vanram kailawn leh Vanram awmzia an hriat loh em avangin tam tak chuan Vanram kal ṭul tihna leh châkna an nei pha lova, chuvang in Kristiante zingah ngei ngei pawh Pathian/vanram ngaihsak lem lo, sakhuana zawngah chuan Kristian a ruh ve tak tak si an tam em a vangin he lehkhabu hi Vanram an hriat chianna atan leh Pathian/vanram an lo ngaihsak zawk nan a an hman beisei in kum 2015 khan page 131 a chhah Thuhriltu hmingthang DL. Moody-a ziak chu ka let a abu copy 2000 ka chhuah a. Mire Kristian te’n an ṭangkai pui khawp mai.
    2. Hremhmun leh Meidil : Hei pawh hi achung a kan sawi tawh ang khan, Vanram leh hremhmun chanchin an suangtuah dan a nep em a vang leh Miria te hi an pi leh pi a ṭanga pian nawn (Karma Background) a ṭanga Kristian a rawn inlet te an nih a vangin an tan Vanram, Hremhmun leh Meidil hian an nunah awmzia a nei tak tak thei ṭhin lova, achhan chu Vanram, Hremhmun leh Meidil hi a awm tak tak a an rin loh vangte leh Hremhmun leh meidil an hriat chian loh a vanga an suangtuah dan a hlauhawm loh em vangte pawh a nih ka ring a.

chuvangin Dr, PC.Biaksiama ziak, ‘Mihausa leh Lazara’ bu chu Mire ṭawngin ka letling a, Mire ṭawng lehkhabu hmingah chuan, ‘Hremhmun leh Meidil’ (Hremhmun chanchin ziakna bu a nih a vangin) ti in ka dah a ni. Hemi lehkhabu pahnih hi Mire Kristian te’n an chhiar a Vanram, Hremhmun leh Meidil chan chin an hriat chian chuan Pathian lam a hnaih tir ngei ka beisei tlat a ni.

    1. Leadership Treining & Seminer Bu : Mire Kristiante a ṭul leh mamawh angin ka ko khawm a ka zirtir reng theih loh a vangin mi inzirmi leh lehkha chhiar peih te’n anmahni awmna hmun a an lo chhiar a an lo zir atan leh midangte an lo zirtir ve a tan, a bu a siam a, a duh apiang neih theih a buatsaih chu thil ṭul ni a ka hriat a vangin a bu in ka siam a.

Chuta Subject ka dahte chu:

2.12.1. Kum 1919 – 1944 chhunga Mire ram a North Easth India General (NEIG) Mission chanchinte, Mire Kristian hmasate chanchin leh 1965 – 1978 chhunga Mizoram leh Bawm ram a ṭanga Mire ram a Voluntary Missionary te chanchin. Mire Kristiante hian an ram a Missionnary hmasate chanchin hi an hriat ṭul ka ti em em a, an ram a Missionary hmasate chanchin an hriat hian Mire hnam, Lalpa rawngbawltute tan ṭangkaina tam tak aneih ka ring tlat a ni.

1. 12. 2. Mission

1. 12. 3. Berampu

1. 12. 4. Thuhril

1. 12. 5. Baptist Church of Maruchah Confesson of Faith.

2.12. Bible lehlin leh chhut : Bung hmasa lam a ka sawi tawh ang khan Chanchinṭha Johana bu mal chu tunhma NEIG Mission hun lai khan Mizo a aw b hawrawp pangngai hmangin an lo chhu tawh a, mahse Mire ramah Kristian kan lo pun chhoh ve tak zel avangin Bible mamawhna a lo sang chho ve zel a, Pastor Chownglowka leh Pastor Nguntuara te’n Thuthlung thar chu an let a, tlangval Iowngrung-a chu Computer zirtir chawpin alettu te’n an lehlin zawh chuan a ni chuan a chhu nghal a, Mire Bible Thuthlung thar bu siamna sum zawngtu chu CFB President Rev RT Mawia a ni a, a ni hi duh aiin ahman hmawh mah mah a, alettu te chu letling zo thuai thuai turin a nawr sek a, hmanhmawh leh ngawrh tak an lehlin zawh hnu chuan an lehlinah chuan tihsual palh a awm leh awm loh pawh ennawnna nei miah lovin Iowngrung-a chu a chhut tir a.

40Mire Bible O.T ka Revew lai

A ni Iowngrunga pawh chu Computer chhu thiam sawlh sawlh niin hmanhmawh takin a chhut tir leh a, Ioungrung-a’n a han chhut zawh chuan a chhut sual palh a awm leh awm loh ennawn miah lovin Mire Bible Thuthlungthar bu chu kum 2007 khan asiam tawp mai a ni. Mire Bible Thuthlung thar chu Rev, RT Mawia hian a pawngsual hi a ni ringawt mai. Rev RT Mawia hian engvangin nge Pathian lehkhabu thiang hlim hi heti tak a hmanhmawh leh phuiluai tak mai a achhuah hi ka hrethiam phak lovin pawi ka ti tak zet a ni.

Tun a Thuthlung hlui kan leh danah chuan bu khat ringawt pawh kan lehlin zawhah aletlingtu te’n ngun takin an ennawn leh vek a, chumi hnu in keini MCLC Revew pawlin uluk takin kan ennawn leh hnuah London atangin Consultant in a lo endik leh vek a. Bible hi chu khawvel a Lehkhabu ṭha ber leh ropui ber a nih a vangin a Pathian thu bu, Pathian kan rinna a min kaihruaitu a nih a vangin lehlinah pawh uluk theih tawp a tih ngai a ni si a. Mahse, kha tih lai khan Mire Bible thuthlung thar kan han nei kha chu Mire Kristiante kan lawmna a sang em em a, abu a min chhuah saktu leh min lehlin saktute chungah pawh kan lawm tak meuh a ni.

Khami kum kha Mire hlabu puitling kan neih hmasak ber kum a lo ni leh zel bawk a, kan lawmna a sang takmeuh a, chuvangin Mire Bible lawmna hla ka phuah a, kan nula te’n Action in mawi takin Mire Bible Thuthlung thar lawm nan an sa in an lam a ni. Chu hla chu chutih lai chuan kan sa ning thei lo a ni ber mai. Tun thleng pawh hian kan ṭhalaite hla duh berte zing a mi a la ni reng a ni. Chu hla chu hei hi a ni (Mizo ṭawng in):

Baibul kan nei ta

1. Lalpa chanchin ziahna Baibul thianghlim hi,

A hlu in ava ropui em!

Pathian thawkkhum a ziak a ni,

A ropui lehkhabu zawng zingah.

Keini Maruchah te’n,

Nun kawng kan hriat theih nan;

Baibul kan nei ta,

He Baibul ngei mai hi a lo ni,

Nun kawng min hrilhtu.

2. Min hmangaih vang a ka ta na nun petu,

Chanchin ziahna a nih vangin;

Ka chhiar ang Baibul thianghlim hi,

Ṭawngṭai a Lalpa pawl chungin.

3. Lalpa, i Thlarau thianghlim in min pawl la,

Midangte i hnen a hruai thei turin;

Kan theih tawkte tlem hle mahse,

Kan theih tawkah mal min sawm ang che.

4. Kan lawm e, Aw Lalpa, lawm thu kan hrilh che,

Min hmangaihna thuk leh zau zia;

Kei ni misual nung tlak lote,

Nunna min pe leh ta, kan lawm e.

2.13. Thuthlung hlui lehlin : Mire ṭawng thuthlung thar kan neih hnu chuan Thuthlung hlui lehlin hna chu kan ṭan leh nghal a, Mire ṭawng ka thiam ve tawh a vangin Pastor Chownglowh chu ka pui ve ṭhin a, mahse Pastor chownglowka a chu a lo hrisel lovin alo tar ve tawh em a vangin a hna chu ka chhunzawm in amah nen a kan lehlin sa pawh chu uluk tak a ennawn leh in Computer-ah ka chhu lut zel bawk a. Pastor Chownglowka chuan ni 13 April 2013 chuan ropuina ramah min chawlh san ta a.

Bible lehlin hi mimal a kalpui chi niin ka hre lova, a chhan chu, mimal hming a lan chuan min duhtu tam tak an awm lai in min duh lo a min dodaltu tam tak an awm thei a ni tih chu ka hriat avangin Mire Christian Litteratur Committee (MCLC) din chu ṭulin ka hria a, Dt 14 Oct 2009 khan Mire ram a Kristian Mission hrang hrang a mi hruaitute ka Office-ah ka kokhawm a, Bible lehlin chungchang mai bakah Hla bu leh lehkhabu dang dang siam chungchangah pawh Mire Christian Litterature Committee din chu a ṭul zia ka han sawi chuan an ni pawh chuan ṭha an ti tlang a, hruaitute pawh kan inthlang nghal a. Chung kan hruaitu thlante chu :

Chairman : Pastor Sangchawnh BBC.

Secretary : Pastor Iowngrung BCM.

Tresurer : Meniawng BTABC.

Member’s 1. Pastor Rosanglura Fanai Translator BCM.

2. Menpungh BCM.

3. Menpawi CFDB.

4. Menpiaw BBC.

5. Evan Peklian ECC.

6. Mentui BBCS.

7. Pale BBC.

8. Kua niang MCC.

9. Evan Tuarthawn ECC.

10. Langsowm BCM.

11. Meniawng BCM.

Kan thiltum pawh kan siam fel nghal a, chu kan thiltum chu hei hi a ni:

MCLC THILTUM

1. Mire ṭawng humhalh.

2. Mire Scrip (a aw b) hman uar zel.

3. Mire Litterature tih changkan zel.

4. Mire Bible chhiar tam tur a mite zirtir.

5. Pathian fak hla mite zirtir.

6. Mire ṭawng a Pathian thu track/bu a tam thei ang ber siam.

7. Mire Kristian te rinna diklo (Doctrine diklo) lak a ven him.

8. Miriate Kristian dik tak a siam.

9. Kristian te thlarau lam a an puitlin theih nan a hma lak.

10. Mire ram a Mision hrang hrangte lungrual tak a an thawh ho zel theih nan a hma lak.

Mahse, kan Chairman hian min ngaihsak zui theih tak loh avangin hemi ṭum a Mire Chiristian Litterature Committee (MCLC) hi a zuzi ral leh ta mai a. Mahse beidawng mai lovin MCLC chu chutia zuzi mai tur a tan chuan ka phal lova, achhan chu Mire hnam tan nakin zelah an hnam Litterature lam a hma an sawn nan leh kawng engkimah a la ṭangkaipui dawn a vangin, ni 25 April 2012-ah Malumghat-ah America Baptist Mission BTABC Tribal Office-ah Mire ram a Mission hrang hrangte ka ko khawm leh a, MCLC chu kan in form ṭha leh ta a, hruaitu pawh kan thlang ṭha leh a, chuta kan hruaitu leh Committee Member-te chu hengte hi an ni :

Chairman : Pastor Iowungrung BCM.

Secretary : Pastor Menlawng BTABC.

Tresurer : Meniawng ERPC

Committee Member-te :

1. Rev, Rosanglura Fanai BCM

2. Rengtown BTABC.

3. Singlowk ERPC.

4. Mentang CFDB.

5. Mentui BBCS.

6. Singrau BFC.

7. Mensia ECC.

8. Pastor Rengkri BBF.

MCLC kan din a ṭang chuan Bible Thuthlung hlui lehlin hna chu keimah in thawk mah ila keima hmingin a ni ta lova, MCLC hming chuan kan ti ta zel a, Pastor Chownglowka lehlin sa Computer a siamṭha pah a ka chhut luh chu MCLC chuan kan Revew zel a, revew tur chu Committee Member’s dahin kan print chhuak a, mahni inah nguntakin an lo endik a, chu chu Revew Committee hunah rawn kengin kan Revew leh vek ṭhin a.

Hetiang a Revew Committee kohkhawm hi a hautak ve hle mai a, an ei leh in turte leh Revew tur Member’s daih bu khat print chhuah a sem leh vek a ngaih a vangin Malumghat a America Baptist Association Mission a an hotupa Pu Hearold a chu min pui turin ka ngen a, a ni chuan anmahni hmun a Mire Bible Revew kan neih chuan revew tur a rawn kalte ei in leh kan print chhuahna lehkhapuan man chu min tum sak tur thu min hrilh a, chuta ṭang chuan Malumghat anmahni hmun a Traibal Office ah deuh ngawt chuan Bible revew chu kan nei a a ni. Pu Hearold a hian min ngaina in min duhsak em em ṭhin a, achungah pawh ka lawm takmeuh a ni.

41MCLC Member ṭhenkhatte leh min puitu Korian ṭhian thenkhatte nen

Asia khawmual hmun hran hran a Kristian, mahni ṭawng Bible la nei lote Bible lehlin sak ṭhintute chu Bangladesh-ah an rawn lut a, chungmite chu America sap leh Koria mite an ni a. Bangladesh-ah chuan Scripture use Bangla (SP Bangla) an inti a, chumite chuan ka chanchin an hriatin min rawn pan nal nal a, anmahni nen chuan Mire Bible Thuthlung hlui lehlinah chuan thawk ho turin min rawn ngen a, kei chuan ngun taka ka ngaihtuahin; ahmingin kan Field-ah a mawhphurtu ber Field Incharge ka ni a, Field-ah hna ka ngahin Mire mamawh lehkhabu hrang hrang ka siam a ngai a, Field Meeting in rampawnah ka kal a ngai zauh zauh bawk si a, chuvangin Bible lehlin leh chhutah duh angin ka thawk sawt thei lo hle si a, chutia an nin min pui thei a nih chuan Bible lehlin hna pawh a sawt deuhin kema hna (Field a ka hna) pawh ka thawk sawt thei deuh ang tih ka ngaihtuah a.

Chuvang chuan anni nen a thawh ho chu ṭha ka ti in ka pawm ta a, anni pawh chu atir a Dhaka a awm chu MCLC in Bible kan revew-na ṭhin Malumghat ah chuan an rawn insawn ve a, Computer 3/4 rawn chhawpin Mire Bible thuthlung hlui lettu tur leh chhutu tur Mire Kristian Bangla English Mizo ṭawng thiamte kan la a, Bible lehlin dan Treiningte pe in a lehlinna bik Sofwore hman dante chung kan mi lâk tharte nen chuan min zirtir a, anni chuan hma an la ta a.

Keini MCLC chuan thla khat danahte a Revew hna chu kan thawk ta a, bu khat kan revew zawh chuan London a tangin Consultant-te rawn kal in min rawn endik sak leh vek a, tunah chuan kan lehlin a piang chu Moble Android set-ah Mire Bible Sofwore a voice nen kan dah nghal zel thei ta a ni. Abu pawh S.P.Bangla te hian min siam sak dawn a ni. Hna ka ngah leh ka buai theih em a vangin Mire Bible lehlin a min rawn ṭanpui turin Lalpa’n tuipui ral ram hla tak a mite a rawn tir leh ta a ni. Lalpa, ka lawm e.

    1. Thuthlung thar lehlin :

Bible Thuthlung thar chu letling ṭhat leh a chhu ṭha leh vek turin MCLC chuan a rel a, mahse SP Bangla te chuan, Thuthlung thar chu an buaipui theih tawh dawn loh thu an sawi a vangin MCLC Committee chuan Bible Thuthlung thar lehlin leh chhut hna chu ka kovah an nghat leh ta a, a endik hna chu MCLC Revew Committee in a en dik leh turin kan rel ta a ni. Mahse, Wycliffe Associations te ṭanpuina in MCYA te’n Mire N.T lehlin hna chu an thawk ta zawk a ni.

Thla thum chhung lekin Mire Bible Thuthlung thar chu Muru Christian Youth Association (MCYA) chuan Wycliffe Associations te ṭanpuina in an zo der mai a, bu pawh an chhuah nghal a, mahse a tir a ka thu an awi loh avangin Mire thalai; Pathian thu hriatna leh Bible thu engmah hre lo te’n an han letling a, hman tlak lohin an chhuah leh ta vek mai a, chu chu MCLC te chuan duh lovin tunah hian Mire Bible thuthlung thar lehlin hna chu MCLC te’n kum thum chhung a zo hman turin bul kan tan leh ta zawk a, Lalpa tanpuina a kan zawh theih hunah Thuthlung hlui nen bu khatah kan siam ang.

2.14. Pathian lehkhabu chanchin thu lehlin : Kan Field Director Rev Lalhmunsanga awm lai in khan Field Director chuan Mizo Kristian te’n Pathian thu hriatna kawng a kan ṭangkaipui em em, Mizo ṭawnga vawi kua (9) lai mai chhut nawn tawh, ‘Pathian lehkhabu chanchin thu’ a chhiar ngaihnawm tura thawnthu ang deuh a ziak, page 571 lai a chhah chu Miria te’n anmahni ṭawngin nei ve ngei se a duh a vangin Mire ṭawng a letling turin min ti a.

Chu hna ṭha chu ka thawk leh ta char char a, kan chhangchhiat lai a nih bawk a vang leh achang a Field fante ka ngaih a vangin kum khat dawn ka bei hnu chuan Mire ṭawngin ka let zo ve leh ta a. Chutih lai chuan Computer ka la hman loh avangin kut ngawtin ka ziak a, Computer ka neih hnu hian hna dang ka ngah em a vangin ka chhu lut hman lawk lova, mahse tunah chuan a bu a chhuah turin ka peih diam tawh a.

Mire ṭawng chuan phek 516 lai a chhah ani a, abu siam nan bu zanga chauh pawh nuai chuang fe anih avangin tumah ka dil ngam lova, mahse Pu Sangtea (Rev Lalhmunsanga) nen a kan duh leh kan beisei chu Lalpa’n min remtihpui a ni ngei ang; Mire Holy Bible kan neih hma ngei-in, kan beisei leh kan rin lohna lam aṭangin bu zanga (500) siamna tur sum BCM Falkland Aizawl in min lo pe hlauh mai a, chu chuan ni 5/7/2025 chuan abu kan siam ta ani. A vahan lawmawm tehlul em. He lehkhabu Mire ṭawng kan siam theihna tur a sum min thawh saktu BCM Falkland Aizawl-te chungah lawm thu kan sawi takmeuh e.

42Cyclostyle a chanchinbu ka her lai

2.15. Magazine lam : Mire Kristian te hian a tam thei ang ber lehkha an chhiar hi ka duhsak em em ṭhin a, an chhiartur ngaihtuah sak chu ka mawhphurh ni in ka hre bawk a, an chhiar duhzawng awmte ka ngaihtuah a, chutiang tur chuan lehkha chhutna khawl (Typwriter) chu ka nei tawh a; mahse Cyclostyle ka mamawh a ni tih ka inhria a. Aneih dantur ka ngaihtuah ta a. Mizoramah ka chhova U Zova (U Nuengi pasal) chu thing in Cyclostyle ka siamtir a, chu chu Mire ramah ka hawn thla a.

Chu Cyclostyle hmang chuan Magazine ang ve deuh hian ka chhuah ve ta a, chuta ka thu chhuah chu; Chanchin thar tlem, Hriselna lam, Pathian thu tlem leh Bible chang zawnawlna thupui nei in. Ka Magazine hmingah chuan ‘KRISTIAN NI CHHUAK’ (KRISTIAN SAT LAWT) ka ti a, tlanga nichhuak lai lem Ceel in ka siam a, a chhutna awl ka zuahah chuan chu chu ka chhu kalh zel bawk a.

Ka Cyclostyle chu thing a siam a nih a vangin arei hnu chuan achàng a, anawr kâi kim hleithei tawh lova, mahse Lalpa’n mite thinlungah hna a thawk a, Lunglei Chanmari Kohhran BMP-te chuan ka dil ni miah lovin Cyclostyle ṭha leh man tam tak mai chu a thlawn in min pe leh ta a. Chu chuan ka hna chu ka chhunzawm leh thei ta a ni.

Chu khawl Lalpa’n min pek, ka kut a hlantu Lunglei Chanmari Kohhran BMP-te chuan chutiang khawl lian leh rit tak mai ramdang Bangladesh a ka keng thla tur chu ramriah buaina ka tawh palh min hlauhthawn pui em em mai a. Mahse kei chuan, Lalpa hruaina in tluang takin Bangladesh Mire ram chu ka phur thleng a ni. Ka khawl thar chu ka hmang ṭangkai em em mai a. Magazine pawh fel fai leh ṭha takin ka chhuah thei ta a ni. Weekly, Monthly leh Quarterly pawh ni lem lovin ‘Hman chang changly’ in ka chhuah ve ṭhin a. Mire Kristian te’n chhiar nuan an ti ve khawp mai. Chu ka Cyclostiyle chu kan khawmpui nikhuate hian kan hmang tangkai thei ṭhin khawp mai.

2.16. Nitin ka ngai che (Chhung inkhawm bu) : Rev. Vanlalzuata ziak hi Mire Kristian ten an thlarau chawm nan leh Pathian thu sawi an zir nan an mamawh em a vanbgin Mire tawngin ka letling bawk.

3. Audio leh Music Vedio hmang a rawngbawlna :

3.1. Pathian thu Cassattee hmangin : Kum 1997 khan Golbal Recordings Network-Bangladesh in Bible thawnthu Thuthlung hlui leh thuthlung thar bu 12 Mire ṭawng letling turin min rawn ngen a, chu lehkhabu bu 12 chu Mire ṭawnga ka lehlin zawh vek hnu chuan chung ka lehlin sa chu Record leh turin Dhaka ah min ko leh a, chutih lai chuan ka fanu Mazuali chu kum thum mi lek a la ni a, Hmeichhe aw nen an duh a vangin kan nu nen Dhaka ah chuan kan record leh ta ngat ngat a.
