Amilem en tur number indawtin, a karah Music an dah zel bawk a, Cassette 12 kan Record zo vek a, chu chu Cassette 12 a siamin Mire khua a Pathian thu sawitu te’n an hman turin Milem nen, a Ply na tur Type Battery tel lo pawh a aher a her a ply theih chi Australia siam nen chuan mi tam takin kan nupa a kan aw hmang chuan Mire ramah rawngbawl nan an hmang a, Pathian leh Golbal Recordings Network-Bangladesh te zarah kan aw hmangin Pathian thu an ngaithla thei a ni. Tunlaiah chuan Taperecord a awm tawh loh avangin Memory a dah theihin Mobile a ngaihthlak theihin an siam leh tawh a ni. Mire hote’n milem en an peih bawk si a, aṭangkai khawp mai.

3.2. Hla Cassette hmangin :

43 Mahmingi pasal fanaute leh ka fanu Mazuali nen

3.2.1. Lunglei Rahsi Veng Moria Kohhran ṭhalaite Mire hla Cassette siam : Kum 1997 December thla khan khan Lunglei Rahsi veng Moria Kohhran zaimi te’n hun chep tak karah Mire hla in hla sawmsarih chuang Cassette 5 lai min siam sak a, chu chu Copy tam tak a siamin Mire ram-ah ka hawn thla a, Mire Kristiante an lawm tak meuh a ni. He Cassette siamna a senso zawng zawng hi BCM in min tum sak vek a ni. Pu Chalbuanga AGS lai in a ni. Chuta rimawi min tumsaktute leh min zaisaktu te chu – Lawmkima Kawlni, Lalhmingsangi, Mahlimi, Zothanpuia (Puia), Zaithanmawia (Zaitea), Ramthana (R.T-a) leh Sanga te an ni.

Anni chu Office kal lai leh zirlaite an nih a vangin hmanrua an hawh khawm a, an Kohhran thil dahkhawmna-ah zan khuain Mire hla Record hna chu kan thawk a ni. Nula Lalhmingsangi (Mahmingi) chuan engemaw changa zai pahin kan eitur a lo buaipui reng bawk. Pathian in zaimite a awmpui a, zan a rei tulh tulh a an aw lah aṭha tulh tulh mai bawk

Chumi zan chuan mawitak leh ṭhatakin Mire hla, lam har tak tak chu Cassette 5 ngawt kan thun khat vek nia! Hla zir chawp kan la ni mah mah. Hla record-ah chuan World Record chu kan khum chiang kher ang. Khami zan kha a tu a te mah khan kan dam chhung hian kan theihnghilh leh theih tawh hi ka ring lo, kan hah viau na khan kan va han hlim si em.

Chuta ṭang chuan ka ṭhiante ho nen chuan ṭhian ni mai lovin UNAU-ah Lalpa’n min siam a, Lawmkima Kawlni leh a farnu fa, Lalhmingsangi (Mahmingi) te phei chu Lalpa’n chhungkhatah min siam a, tun thleng hian Lungleiah chuan Mahmingite in chu ka inpui berah ka hmang ta hial a ni. Lalhmingsangi (Mahmingi) phei chuan ka fanu Lalhmangaihzualzeli (Mazuali) leh ka fapa Mika Lalmuanawma (Avala) te chu an sikul kal theih tirh a tangin a fa ang mai in a enkawlin a buaipui a ni.

Apasal neih hnu pawhin an enkawl chhunzawm zel a, apasal neih zan chuan ka fanu Mazuali chuan a ni hnen a mut a ngen tlat mai a, a pi te’n amuthilh hnuah an pawm hrang thei hram a, khami zan kha chu buaithlak tak a ni. Mahmingi chu a nulat lai aṭangin ka fate avangin chhangchhe nu ang maiin a awm phah a, a pasal neih hnu pawh chuan kan pafa thum chuan min la chhawm ta zel a ni. Apasalte chhung hi miṭha tak chhung an lo ni hlauh mai a, keini pafa ho pawh in (Mizoram a ka chhoh changin) kan in ang main ka fate Hostel aṭang a an rawn chhuah chuan kan awm a ni.

Ka fanu Mazuali leh ka fapa Avala chu pawl sawm an nih thleng chu Chawngfianga Memoprial School (CMS) neitu U Hmingtea’n (F.Rohmingliana) an Hostel a dah in Monthly fee min awl vek a, U Hmingte a chungah hian lawm thu sawi dan pawh ka thiam lo a ni. Lalpa’n kawng engkimin kan ṭhatna tur hlirin min kaihruai a, ka fate an têt lai a ṭha tak a sikul an kal theihna turin hmangaih tak a lo enkawl turte min pe zel hi ka va han lawm ṭhin tak em.

Hmun dang dang a Kristian-te hla ka zirtir hman lohna hmun a mite pawh in he Cassette hmang hian anmahni in hla an lo zir thiam thei a, Kohhran kan phuisui phah hle a ni. Tlaivar thak a hah tak a min zai saktute leh sum tam tak min sen saktu BCM chungah Mire Kristiante hmingin lawmthu ka sawi mawlh mawlh e.

3.2.2. Lalmuanpuii’n (Puitei) Mire hla Cassette a siam : Kum 2004 khan nau nei turin Mizoram ah kan rawn chhova, nau kan neih zawh chuan Bangladesh a Mire ramah kan rawn haw thla leh a, Office ah leh Field ka buai theih em a vangin ka nau Lalmuanpuii (Puitei) chu nau min awmpui turin ka hruai thla a, ka nau Puitei hian ka Nu a chhun a, zai amisa riau mai a. Ka Nu hi a vanglai chuan Fanai tlang dungah nà ná nâ chuan zai thiam leh aw ṭha a hmingthang ve kha a ni a.

44S.Lalmuanpuii (Puitei)

Puitei chu nauawm pahin a zai ṭhin a, chutih lai a kan in chu kawngpui hnuai chiah a awm hi a ni a, chutia Puitei zai chu kawngpuia kalte chuan an hriat in Radio a zai emaw ti in Rdio ngaih thlak tum chuan an rawn kal ṭhin a, Puitei nauawm zai mai a lo ni ṭhin si a. Kum tawp lam MCC khawmpui chuan Puitei chu solo turin an ngen nasa ta mai a, a ni lah chuan, “Mire hla ka sa thiam lo, Biakin a zai chu ka duh lo,” a ti bur mai bawk si a.

Kan thlem kan thlem fe hnu chuan inkhawmpui tawp lam chuan a Solo ve ta nge nge a, chutia a zai chuan Mire upa ho leh ṭhalai ho chuan, “I Tapy ah khan Puitei zai kha min Record sak rawh,” an ti a, kei chuan, “Hla Record natur Cassette ruak pawh ka nei lo,” ka tih pawh chuan, Battery leina tur pawisa min pe a, min nawr lui ta tlat mai a.

Chutia hnial ngaihna awm lo khawp a min ngen tak a vang chuan kan ṭhenawm pa in sak,(Tun a kan thenawm) a sak zawh tawh si, an la luah hma, in ruakah ka tingtang-te leh kan Keyboard te, tawngkhat pawh tling manglo chuan Mire hla Cassette khat chu kan thun ta a. Kum thar 2005 kumtir lam chuan ka nau Puitei chu a haw a lo hun tawh si a, a haw dawn chuan Empu khua ṭhalaite chuan, “Mizoram inthlen hunah ṭhatakin hla Cassette min siamsak ngei ngei dawn nia,” an ti a.

Kum 2005 January thla chuan Mizoram lam pa nin Puitei te nen chuan Mizoram-ah kan chhova, Chittagong kan thlen chuan Puitei chu a hritlang hle mai a, Tlabung kan thlen chuan a khua a sik titih deuh tawh a, Lunglei kan thlen chhoh phei chuan a khua a sik hluah mai a. Kei chu Mire hla Cassatte siamna a sum min thawh sakturin ka ngamtlak Pu R.Thanmawia Venghlun te nupa ka bia a, an nin a sum senso min tum sak thei dawn a, Sound treck min siam sak turin Pu C.Lalzarmawia kan be leh a, Pu C.Lalzarmawia chuan Sound treck 5 min siam sak hnu chuan Sound treck chu ka la a, Clucose te ka lei a, ka farnu Lalmuanpuii (Puitei) damlo tlun hluah hluah mai chu ka ṭawngṭai a, a khawsik pawh chu chawplehchihin a reh a, “Puite, tho la Clucose kha in la chaw ei bawk la intiharh in hla chu zir rawh le,” ka ti a.

Puitei chuan, “A-u, ka la chak lo in ka tha ala khur a sin, bâkah Mire hla ka sa ngai bawk si lova, an ṭawng a har bawk si” a ti a, kei chuan, “Puite, Lalpa’n Mire hla sa turin a ti dam tawh che a, ṭan lak chu i tih ve tur a ni,” ka ti a, Clucose te a in a chaw a ei zawh chuan hla chu a zir ve ta nghal a. A hla sak ngai loh Mire hla sak chu harsa a ti hle mai a, kei chuan a sak dik loh laite chu ka lo hrilh in a sa ṭha leh zel a, kar khat chhung lek chuan Mire hla 14 lai mai chu kan Record thei ta a, Chu chu Copy tam tak a siamin Mire ramah chuan ka keng thla ta a.

45Empu khua a Puitei Mire Cassatte Relist lai

Mire ram ka thlen chuan Mire ṭhalaite chu an lawm hle a, ropui takin kan Relist a, chumi Cassatte chu Mizoram a chhohpui leh in Pu R.Thanmawia (Pu Mawia) te nupa ṭanpuina bawk in Music Vedio kan siam leh ta a, Puitei chu Bualpui ‘H’ ah a awm daih a vangin ka han ko hman tawh si lova Lunglei a Moria ka unau nu Lalhlimpuii (Mahlimi) chu hla sawm lai ka shooting tir a, Lunglei zaithiam; Pency B.Lalthanglia ni, Bethsy Lalrinsangi, K.Lalthangzela, Jenet Remsangpuii leh Pi Mamua ni (Pu C.Lalzarmawia nupui) te’n hla pakhat ṭheuh min sak sak bawk a. Heta an hla sak hi tunlai hla ka thlan khawm a ni.

Ahnuah ka nau Lalmuanpuii (Puitei) zai bawk Mire hla bawkin Chrismas hla leh lengkhawm zai kan Record leh in Music Vedio kan siam leh a, a vaiin Mire hla Music Vedio hla 42 mawi tak takin kan siam a ni. Hetiang a kan unau Miriate’n Pathian fakna hla lam a hma an sawn theih nan a Pathian fak hla Cassatte leh Music Vedio siam nan a an aw mawi tak mai min lo thawh saktu;

Lalmuanpuii (Puitei), Pency B.Lalthanglia ni, Bethsy Lalrinsangi, K.Lalthangzela, Jenet Remsangpuii leh Pi Mamua ni (Pu C.Lalzarmawia nupui) Lalhlimpuii (Mahlimi) te leh an sum lehpai thahnem tak min thawh saktu Pu R.Thanmawia te nupa, Lunglei Venghlun, Pu C.Hmingliana Lunglei Bazar Veng leh a ṭhiante leh Pu C.Lalzarmawia leh Pu Saidingliana (Bethsy Lalrinsangi pa) te’n an Recording Stradio ah Lalpa rawngbawlna a ngai a tlawm tak a min Record sak avangte, (Pu Saidingliana hian athlawn in Bethsy Lalrinsangi zai hi min record sakin Sound Treck min siam sak) Pu, Johana, Pu Lalduhawma Chhakchhuak leh Pu H. Vanlawma (Pu Lawmtea) te’n tlawmngai takin Vedio thla min lak sak bawk a, an chungah Miria te aiawh in lawmthu ka sawi tak meuh meuh a ni.

3.2.3. Elizabeth Tumpowng Music Vedio : Lalpa’n Mire hnam zinga kan rawngbawlna nasa takin mal a sawm zel a, kan unau Mire Kristian te’n zai lam a hma an lo sawn theih nan Mizo zaimite mi engemaw zatin ka ngenna te Lalpa rawngbawlna a ngai a min tih hlawhtlin sakin Mire hla a Pathian fakna Audio leh Musice Vedio engemawzat kan siam tawh a.

Tunah chuan anmahni Mire ṭhalai a ṭang ngei a zai thiam Pathian fak hla ngaihnawm leh mawi tak a sa thei tur kum tam tak Lalpa ka lo dil tawh ṭhin chu Lalpa’n min tih hlawhtlin sak ta a, Rengrui-a fanu Elizabeth Tumpowng chu a aw a mawi in zai athiam em em mai a, azai thiam mai nilovin a zai nung riau zel hian ka hria a. Amah hi mi piangthar tha leh la naupang tak mah ni se a thlarau mi reuh riau va, A ni chu Mizoram a zai zir turin ka theih ang tawk a ka thlem bakah anu leh pa ka dil a.

Atawpah chuan a nu leh pate phalna leh amah ngei pawhin a duh tak a vangin kum 2022 khan Mizoramah zai zir a Musice Vedio te siam turin ka hruai a, Lunglei Bazar veng a Pu C. Hminga te inah Pu Nunpuia hnen a zai a zirtir turin ka dah a, mahse Pu Nunpuia hian zai a lo zirtir mumal hman loh a vangin puan thuite a zir pah bawk a, keiman zai chu ka zirtir leh ta zawk a ni.

Kum 2023 khan Musice Vedio chu siam tawh tur kan nih lain ka hman lova, kum 2024 January ni 15 chuan Mire hla a Pathian fakna Music Vedio siam turin Mizoramah ka chho ve a. Mizoram a ka chhoh hma ni ni 14 January 2024 chuan ka tunu (ka farnu fa) Mambawihi’n ka Nu achauh riau avangin kan khua Bualpui a ṭanga Lunglei a an phurh thlak thu leh Doctor-in ka Nu chu thisen Cancer a nih thu ahrilh thute min rawn hrilh a.

Ka Nu chu a upa ve tawh si a, adam rei tawh dawn lo a ni tih ka hriat chuan ka rilru a na hle mai a, Mizoram ka va thlen chuan ka Nu chu a lo chau em em mai a, mahse ka Nu’n min han hmuh chuan a harh huai hian ka hria a, Elizabeth Tumpowng-i nen Musice Vedio kan siam chhung thla thum deuh thaw chu a dam ṭha angrengin chak pawh a chak hle mai a, hmun danga ka tih tur ka tih zawh chuan ka Nu chu ka awmpui tlat thin a. Zan rei tak tak thlengte kan meng a kan hlim thei hle thin a.

Elizabeth Tumpowng-i nen a kan Musice Vedio siam tawp lamah chuan ka Nu chuan zual lam a pan tlat mai a, kan unau ho a kan han inrawn chuan arang lam a kan khaw lam a chhohpui chu ṭha a kan hriat a vangin ni 11 March 2024 chuan kan khua Bualpui ‘H’ ah chuan kan inphur chho ta a, khua thlen dawnah ka Nu chuan chatuan ram chu min lo pan san ve ta a ni.

Lalpa remruat dan hi a mak ka ti in ka lawm khawp mai. Lalpa hian ka Nu nen hian min hmangaih takmeuh a ni. Kum tam tak kan awm tlang thei lova, mahse a thih dawnah ka Nu nen a thla hnih ai rei mah (thla thum dawn) hlim takin min awm dun tir hi amak ka ti a ni. Ka Nu hun tawp lamah amah awmpui turin chhuti dil ila ka hmu dawn miah silova.

Kohhran leh mimal thahnemngaihna in Mire ṭawnga Pathian fakna hla Music Vedio 40 lai kan siam leh ta a ni. Miss Elizabeth Tumpowngi’n Pathian fakna hla 2024 January a tanga March thla chhung a Music Vedio 40 lai kan siam theihna tura sum leh pai leh tha leh zung sengtu zawng zawngte chungah kan lawm takmeuh a ni.

3.2.4. Musice leh Solfa hmangin : Kum 2012 a Prenchü khua a MCF khawmpui kan neih ṭum khan Miria te’n Musice leh Solfa thiam châkna nasa tak mai an nei a, tunhma angin Mission khat a kan awm tawh loh a vang leh keima hna a ka buai ve tak em a vanga duh ang a khaw dang a hla ka zir tir theih tawh loh a vangin kan unau Mire Kristian te chuan, “Musice leh Solfa min zittirtu tur Mizo min ngaihtuah sak rawh, a hlawh tur pawh kan tum mai ang, Mission hrang hrang a ṭhalaite Hla, Musice leh Solfa min zirtir tur kan duh a ni,” an ti a.

46J.Vanlalsanga te chhungkua

Chu tianga Mire Kristian te’n min ngen nasat em a vang chuan Bualpui ‘H’ a ka nau, (ka nu chhang chiah ka Pu Lalduha fapa) zaipawl Coductor ni lai, Tlangval J.Vanlalsanga (Sangtea) chu ka sawm a, a ni chuan Mire ram a Lalpa rawng bawl a kal chu a lo remti a, a pa (ka Pu) pawh chuan a lo remti ve bawk a, a ni ka nau Sangtea chu Mire ramah chuan ka hruai thla a, BCM a ṭangin a hlawhturte ka siam sak a, a ni chuan Mire naupang leh ṭhalaite chu hla, music leh solfa te chu a zirtir a, Bangladesh a Laizo khua a mi Pang nula aw ṭha tak mai, Duhawmi nupuiah a nei a, Lalpa’n nupui ṭha tak a pek bâkah fanau malsawmna fapa duhawm tak pahnih leh fanu ape tawh bawk.

A ni hi Mistiri a ni bawk a, insak, Furnature siam leh kut themthiamna hrang hrang talen ṭha tak tak a nei bawk a. Mire ram a kan rawngbawlna kawng engkimah a ṭangkai takzet a ni. A aw pawh a ṭha hle bawk a, tunah chuan Mire ramah zaipawlte pawh kan nei thei tawh a, naupangte pawh in Keyboard tum pawh an thiam nual tawh nghe nghe a ni. Kawng engkimah ka nau Sangtea chu kan Field in a phuisui phah hle a ni. Themthiam lamah ka nau Sangtea hian ka Pu kha a chhun khawp mai.

4. School leh Hostel hmangin:

Ramthim rawngbawlnaah hian zirna hmang a rawngbawl hi a pawimawh em em mai a, Christian Felloship of Bangladesh (CFB) pawhin Mire ram a Lalpa rawngbawlna a lo ṭan tih aṭang khan Miria te’n an ngen nasa bawk a, School chu a lo siam sak tawh a, a chawlhsan changte a awm ṭhin a, kum 2000 aṭang phei kha chuan a chawlhsan hlen ta nghe nghe a, chutia CFB Mission in a chawlhsan pawh chuan Empu khua nu leh pate ṭangrual chuan kan buh leh buhfai te thawh khawmin harsa tak chungin kan chhunzawm ve hram hram zel a.

47Empu khua a BCM School

Mizoram Baptist (BCM) in Mire ram a Lalpa rawngbawlna a lo ṭan dawn khan Mission Board Committee hmaah, “Mire ram a in rawn thawh dawn chuan keimah chauh min Suport lovin Field angin la ula, School leh Hostel te kan mamawh a, Clenic te pawh kan mamawh a ni,” ti a ka sawi kha kan hotu te’n min ngaihpawimawh sak in a ram mi Evangelit Teacher tam zawk min rawih sak a, School Building chu N.G.O World Vision in min sak sak a, chutah chuan kan School naupangte an len loh avangin BCM in School sakna tur sum tlem min pek hmangin kan thawktu te’n a sak hna kan thawk a, tunah chuan Sorkar in that akin min sak sak bawk. Hostel chu Bangladesh Sorkar in min rawn sak sak bawk an

48Empu khua a kan Hostel

Kum tin School naupang zahnih dawn kan nei ṭhin a, Hostel naupang pawh za leh sawmnga ai tlem lo kan nei bawk thin. Class V thleng chauh kan la nei thei a, Bangla Medium a ni a, kan Hostel naupangte hi Mizoram aṭangin Kohhran, pawl leh mimalte pawh in min rawn chawm sak nual bawk ṭhin a, kan lawm tak meuh a ni.

Khawvel finna lehkha an thiam mai bâkah kan naupangte hian Pathian thu, hla leh Music te kan zirtir a, kan School aṭang a Primary zir chhuak Kristian ṭha tak tak leh rinna a nghet tak tak an awm ve nual tawh hi kan lawmna a ni. Kan School hi Mire hnam hmakhua a ni tak meuh a ni.

5. Damdawi hmanga tihdamna rawngbawlna in : BCM in Mire ram a rawngbawlna hma arawn lak hian achung a ka sawi tawh ang khian Clinic chu kan din a, chuta thawk tur chuan Nurs zir chhuak kan neih loh a vangin kan Evangelist zinga pakhat mi inzirmi tak Evan Kainguai-a chu Mizaram a BCM rawngbawlna peng pakhat R&D ah thisen Exzam-te kan zirtir a, chumi hnu in kan District khawpui Bandarban Civil Hospetalah kum khat leh thla ruk Practical in damlo enkawl leh damdawi kan zirtir leh bawk a.

49Empu khua a kan Clinic

Amah hi mi inzirmi tak a nih a vangin kan ṭangkaipui khawp mai, Thanchi Aria-ah pawh Clinic kan mamawh ve leh a vangin kan Thanchi Aria Field Supervisor Pastor Lawmtlinh nupui Pi Lalnunzir (Tezir) pawh Bandarban Civil Hospetal-ah kum khat leh thla ruk Practical in damlo enkawl leh damdawi kan zirtir leh bawk a, Thanchi Aria a Dingte khua a anmahni awmna ah Village Nurs in a thawk ve mek bawk.

Tin hengmite bâkah hian kan khuia Empu kharbari fabu Ruipau chu Chittagong ah Certificate in Paramedical Technology (CPMT) kum hnih BCM in a zirna tum sak a, a zir zawh hnuah Lunglei a BCM Hospital Serkawn-ah kum thum Nurs a zir leh bawk a, chu chu tun a Empu khua a kan Clinic-ah hian a thawk mek bawk a ni.

Pathian leh Kohhran-te ṭhahnemngaihna in Mire ram a tihdam rawngbawl hna kan thawhna hi a hlawk hle a, a ṭhan chhoh zel pawh kan beisei tlat a ni. Abiktak in heta thawktute hian kan Field-ah damdawi hmang a rawngbawl hna mai nilovin thianghlimna leh inchhungkhur enkawl dan pawh kan zirtir bawk ṭhin a ni.

6. An eizawnna siamsak(Aconomy) lam : Kan unau Miria te hi lo nei a eizawng an ni a, eizawnna kawng a an lo changkan ve theihna turin ka theih ang angin hma kan la in kan zirtir ṭhin a, mahse a sawt mawh em em mai a, “Kan pi leh pu-te aṭang tawh a chempui a eizawng ṭhin kan ni a, tun thlengin chaw kan la nghei bik hlei nem. Thil dang dang kan fa te’n an zir a nih chuan hnathawh an thatchhe mai mai,” an ti tlat zel a.

Tunhma NEIG Mission hun lai tawh aṭang khan Mizo Missionary te’n huan thlai neih an lo zirtir tawh a, mahse zir ve chu sawi loh, Pastor Chownglowka min hrilh dan chuan, “Missionary te serthlum, thei hai leh te’ngtere phunte chu, ‘Hei chu Lusei thing phun,’ an ti a, an sat chum hmiah hmiah zel a, tun a Chimbuk tlang Ngaringchah (Puro bangla) bul a theihai kung, te’ngtere leh laui kung tar tawh tak tak te hi Mizo Missionary te thing phun Mire hovin an sahchum bangte a ni,” a ti.

Kan awmna velah chuan Banhla te hi phun nachang chu an hre ve na in a hmuna siam lovin kawng kamah leh an duh duhna laiah an phun ngawt zel a, atuk hunah aleitu vai an tuk tir a, atuktu vai lah chuan aneitu zawk Banhla man pe lova midang a pek changte a lo awm ṭhin a, banhla bu ru a inpuh reng rengin an buai ṭhin a, a hmun siam tura ka tih lah chuan tumahin min bengkhawn duh bar pawh an awm si lova, keiman ahmun chu ka siam ta a, chuta ṭang chuan zawi zawi in a hmun siam nachang an hre tan ve ta a ni.

Mire ramah chuan rawng hi a man a ṭha em em mai a, 1 KG ah Tk 100 leh a ai tam a nih chang pawh a awm ṭhin a, rawng lah chu a ṭha duh em em mai a, a kung chu mihring aia sang awrh chauh hi a ni a, a buk laih mai a, kung upa tawhah chuan kung khatah KG 10 lai a thar theih a, chu pawh chu chiseh lam nan in bulah tlem an ching ringawt zel a. Ram a bua tawh em avangin lo siam a hlawk tawh si lova, rawng chu ching uar turin kan sawi ngial a, mahse min ngaithla lem hlei lova, chu vang chuan keiman tihhmuh nan tin 3 hmun a zauah rawng ka ching leh ta a.

Mahse ka rawng chin kum chuan Bangladesh-ah rawng chu an band ta hlauh mai a, achhan chu Vai (Bengali) hovin puan rawng tih sen nan mai a hmang lovin thingpui rawng tih mawi nante an lo hmang lehpek a, chu chu mihring tan a ṭhat loh vanga rawng chu band an ni. Ka rawng chin pawh chuan awmzia a neih leh tak loh avangin ka rawng china hmunah chuan Theihai thachi ka phun ta chiam a, Banhla hmun pawh ahra nin anmahni tihhmuh nan ka siam a, tunah chuan thlai huan siam nachang an hre ve tawh khawp mai.

50Mire nula-te

Ṭum khat chu amak khawp mai; Norway ho hi ka hnenah an rawn kal a, “Kan ram aṭangin i chanchin hi kan lo hria a, ṭanpui che kan duh, engtin nge ṭanpui che ila i duh,” min lo tih hlawl mai a, kei chuan, “Min ṭanpui thei dawn a nih chuan ka mite hian thawmhnaw hak nachang an hre ve tawh a, an thawmhnaw hak tur hi vai ho an ṭhui tir ṭhin a, vai ho chuan an duh dan da nin an ṭhui sak a, an ni lah chuan lungawi takin vai ho ṭhui ang ang chuan an ha ve zel mai bawk a, bâkah; kum khat chung a an kawr ṭhui man hi vai ho hnenah cheng tam tak tak a lut ṭhin a, anmahni hian puanṭhui thiam se chuan an duh angin an ṭhui anga, ṭhui man pawisa pawh anmahni hnenah a lut tawh ang a, chuvangin ka mite hi puan ṭhui zirtir ula, an ṭhui thiam chuan puanṭhui khawl in pe ang a, an dawr siamna tur a bulṭanna sum in tum sak bawk dawn nia, chutiang a min ṭanpui theih chuan ka lawm hle ang,” ka ti a.

51Mire nu la her lai leh la rawng sen a a thlak lai

“Mi pali lo thlang la Dhaka-ah kan lo zirtir ange,” an ti a, mi pali ka ka thlang a, chung ka mi thlante chuan Dhaka-ah chuan puan ṭhui chu an zir ta a, an zir zawh chuan an hnen a ka sawi ang ngei chuan min tih sak ta a. Norway sap ho hnenah chuan Mire pawnfen tawi (fenphel) an siam chhuah dan; lo a an la chin ngei aṭanga puan tah an nih ziate, an la tih dum dan leh an tih sen dante leh chung an hmanrua chu anmahni thar chhuah ṭing ngei aṭangin a nih ziate leh azeh nan vawk hmul an hmang a, a chhung lamah chuan azehna hnuhma engmah a lan loh zia leh an puan chu a Natural ziate ka sawi chuan sap ho chuan an lo ngai hlu phian mai a.

Mire hmeichhiate chuan an fenphel (azung cheh chah lohvin an ti pum a, mahse an ven chuan an thlep a, azeh chu an mawng zawnah an dah a, an kawnghrenin an tãiah an hreng bet a, an khel veilam lang rengin an feng ṭhin) chu an tah khawl ṭeuh ṭhin a, an mahni fen bâkah, pasal an neih hun a an chhawm tur atan a ni. Mahse tunah chuan mawk ho lawnggi a fual leh Mizo puan te an ven tawh a vangin an fenphel chu an feng tawh ngai lova, an dah chhe mai mai dawn a, chu chu sap ho hnenah chuan a len leh a tet dan a zir in pakhat zali, zanga leh zaruk leh a ai a tam te in ka lei tir a.

Dah mai mai ai chuan an sum hmuhna ṭha tak a lo ni a, atah thiam leh atah peih tan chuan sum hmuhna ṭha tak a ni chho ta zel a, sap ho chuan chung Mire fenphelte chu an lo Design a, Camera bag, dawhkan phah leh thil dang tam takah an lo siam leh a, kan puan ṭhui thiamte pawh chu Design an zirtir bawk a. Chung kan puan ṭhui thiamte zing a mi Dawnram-i phei chu a kut themthiam avangin United Nation Development Program (UNDP) a ṭangin lawmman tam tak a dawng tawh in Japan ram te pawh a han thleng hial tawh nghe nghe a ni.

Heng mite bâkah pawh hian Mizoramah puan thui zir in kan nula pahnih ka tir a, an ni hian Mizoramah kum hnih puan ṭhui an zir a, puan thui thiam tak leh puan ṭhui khawl nen an rawn haw a, tunah chuan heng kan puan ṭhui thiamte hian mi dangte zirtir chhawng ve in dawrte pawh an siam a, chhung kaw eizawn nan an hmang in Mire hnam kawr ṭhuina pawisa tam tak chu anmahni Mire hnenah ngei a lut ta a ni. Kawr pawh Design hrang hrangin an ṭhui thiam in mawi takin an inchei ve thei ta.

7, Mire hnam ngei hruaitu puitling a chher chhuah : Mission rawngbawlna chauhah lo pawh, pawl ho leh chhungkua pawh ni se, a kal zel dawn chuan hruaitu inthlak hun a awm ngei ngei ṭhin a, hruaitu ngai in a hruai reng thei lova, a hruai reng pawh a ṭha kher lo thei bawk. Chuvangin Mire hnam zinga BCM in Lalpa rawngbawl hna kan thawhna pawh hi kum emawmaw zat a lo ni tawh a, ka thawh ṭan-na aṭang phei chuan kum sawmthum panga ral a lo kai ve der tawh mai.

52Solomon Chownglowk M.Div

Hruaitu ṭha, rin tlak tak erawh kan la inchher chhuak hlei thei lo hi pawi ka ti a, a chhan pawh sawi dawn chuan engemaw zat sawi tur a awm thei ang. A eng a pawh chu ni se Mire hnam zing aṭang ngei a taksa leh thlarau lam a hruaitu ṭha chher chhuah hi kan tihmakmawh a ni tih erawh kan pawm angai ngei ang.

Chutia an hnam hruaitu ṭha kan chher chhuah dawn chuan chung chherchhuah kan tum a chu mi ṭha leh rinawm, mi dik leh thiamna lamah pawh an hnam pawhin a an chhuan tham, kan thlan chhuah a kan chher chhuah a ngai a, chutiang a hruaitu a tan a ṭha leh tling ni a ka ngaih, an hnam leh Lalpa tan a inpe mi, an chhungte pawhin a Lalpa tan a an serh hran mi pahnih Da niala leh Solomona te ka thlang chhuak a.

Solomona chu Pastor Chownglowka tupa a ni a, Bangladesh-ah harsa takin Class VII a pass ve hram a, chumi hnuin Mizoram-ah ka hruai a, Class VIII a ṭangin azir a, tunah chuan Collage a chhuak ve tawh a, Aizawl-ah BCM Sponsor-in AICS-ah M.Div a zir zo tawh a, Da niala pawh Bangladesh-ah Class 12 apass hnu in, Mizoram ah Collage chu a zo a, BCM Sponsor in AICS-ah B.D a zir zo ve tawh.

53Danial (Danu) B.D

Mire Field chu Field dang nen han khaikhin chi a ni lova, Field dangah chuan thawktu Missionary aṭul da nin a dah theih a, aṭul da nin a inthlak theih bawk a, Mizoram aṭangin aduhte’n an tlawh thei reng bawk a, Mire Field ah hi chuan chutiang chu a theih ve loh a ni. Field thenkhatah chuan thlarau lamah kan ṭanpui an ngaih laiin taksa lamah chuan keini BCM-in kan thawh hma pawh a lo changtlung/changkang tawh sâte an ni a, Mire Field-ah erawh chuan ka awmtirh te kha chuan Kristian pawh sawitham la awm mang lo leh lo awm sate pawh an khawsak danah Kristian lo te nen a lo la inang deuh reng mai, thawmhnaw pawh la inbel mumal mang lo te an ni a. An Literature pawh keiman buaipui in ka din chhoh sakte an ni a, heng an hnam taksa leh thlarau a hruaitu atan a kan chherte pahnih hi an puitlin lam, zirna atan a hun tam tak an hman na chu Mizoramah a nih avangin Mire Kristiante mahni kut leh ke a an din theih hma chu anmahni hringtu Mizo Kristian te, a biktakin BCM min bel tlat lothei dawn lo a ni.

Tun a ka thachhang dal tu ber leh kawng engkim a ka rinpui ber chu tun a Baptist Church of Maruchah (BCM) a kan GS Pastor Iowngrung hi a ni a, a ni hi kawng engkimah ka kut leh ke ber a ni bawk a, amah hi mi inngaitlawm leh thin nel tak mai a ni a, Missionary te kan chhiat kan ṭhat pawh a min ngaihven bertu a ni bawk. Hetiang a Mire Field a Missionary te’n a ram mi, mi ṭha kan nei hi kan vannei tak meuh a ni.

Aw Lalpa, Miria te hi taksa leh thlarauva hruaitu ṭha, anmahni Mire hman zing ami ngei, an hnam hmangaih tak taktu pe hram ang che aw, Aw Lalpa, chu mawlh chu ka dil leh ṭhin ang che, Amen.

8. Anmahni ke a ding thei tura buatsaih : Ramthim a Lalpa rawng kan bawlna reng rengah hian Mission in a tum ber chu kan thawhna hnamte anmahni ke a ding thei tura buatsaih hi a ni a, amârawh chu an ke a dingthei tura kan beihnaah hian Field a dang ang bawk in an ke a ding thei tur pawhin an mamawh a dang ṭheuh ngei ang. Mahni ke a ding thei tura hun duh rei zawng pawh a inang lo viau ngei ang. Kan enkawl dan azir pawh a ni thei bawk.

Kan unau Miriate hi tunhma aṭanga lal nei lova khaw te tak te te a, a hnam hnam a mi tlem te te a lo awm ṭhin an nih a vangin Kristian Vanram Kawngzawh a, “Mitin mahni thu thu a awm tur,” tih ang deuh kha an ni a, mitin mai hian khuahkhirhna hi an ngithei lo em em mai a, chuvang chuan Kristiante pawh rinna kawnga puitlin lam pan an harsat phah hle a ni. Chubakah khawsak harsa tak takte an ni a, chumai ala ni lo, changkanna lamah hma an sawn mawh em em mai bawk a, an nunphungah thil tih ho dial dial peih lo mi an ni a, khaw khatah pawh in tam an awm thei lova, khaw te tak te te in an awm ṭhin a, khawkhat hotu Kharbari an nei ve takna in chung an khaw hotu kharbarite pawh chuan khaw chhung enkawl leh rorelna-ah awmzia an nei em em hran chuang lem lo.

An hnam zingah hian ‘Mithiam’ ti a han sawi tur an awm meuh rih lova, sorkar leh Politic lamah pawh hruaitu fel leh rintlak an la awm meuh lo bawk, Kristian-te zingah lekphei chuan kan Lal Isua’n tehkhin thu a a sawi, Buhchi theh thu ang khan chanchinṭha a theh a theh phuar a, a ṭo chhunte pawh enkawl zui leh si lova kalsan leh ta te, ṭhen khat chu sum siam nan a hmangtu chanchinṭha hriltu der ho te’n an lo ti khawbaw zo tawh bawk nen, Pathian thu sawi hawt si lova, “Kristian a in awm chuan mi pakhatah cheng sanghnih ṭheuh kan pe ang che u/sikul,tuikhur kan pe ang che u,” ti a lo thlem tawk lah bo lo.

An hnam kalphung leh miziaah pawh chanchinṭha hril a harsat tawh tehlul nen, heng chanchinṭha hriltu derte avang pawh hian Mire ramah chanchinṭha hril a hautak takmeuh a ni. Chu bakah Bangladesh Mosolman ram a awm an nih a vangin Mizo Kristian te’n duh angin kan luhchilh tei bawk si lo va, kan unau Mire Kristian-te mahni ke a ding thei tur chuan hun kan la duh rei deuh hmel khawp mai.

Mahse, Lal Isuan Luka 19:40-ah, “A ni erawh chuan, “Ka hrilh a che u, hengte hi an ngawih reng chuan lungte tal an au chhuak tur a ni,” a ti a, eng ang pawhin har mahse, Lalpa rinchhan a beidawng mai lova kan beih zel chuan lungte auchhuah hun nghak kher lova keini hi Mire hnam zinga chanchinṭha hril a kan au chhuah zel chuan kan thawhrimnate chu Lalpa’n mal a sawm ngei ka beisei tlat a ni. Mire Kristian te mahni ke a ding thei tura buatsaih tur chuan beidawng mai lova kawng thui tak kan kal a la ngai ngei dawn a, kei ni thawktu leh Mission pawh Mire hnam tan hian hma kan lo lak tawh laklawh a vangin an tan a uikawm viau a rem dawn lo vin anmahni ke a an din theih nan kan inhuam thui viau pawh a ngai ngei dawn a ni.

Hetiang hi an dinhmun a la nih miau avangin anmahni ke a ding thei tura buahsaih tur chuan anmahni hnam zinga mi ngei hruaitu ṭha chher chhuah sak a ni lothei lo a ni. Field dang angin Mire hnam zingah hian Missionary kan in tir lut zung zung thei lova, achhan chu Bangladesh Muslim County a awm an nih a vangin Missionary a in tirh luh theih loh hrim hrim a ni. A luh dan kawng chu arammi nihna neih leh Bangla (Bengali ṭawng) thiam a ni.

Heng zawng zawngte avang hian Mire Kristiate hi mahni ke a ding thei turin kan pui thei lo tihna a ni lova, Lalpa rinchhan a Mission in hma kan lâk a, an kut leh ke a ding thei tura aṭul anga tih sak kan inhuam chuan hun duh rei deuh mahse, engtihah emaw chuan anmahni kut leh ke in an la ding ngei ang. Mahse, kan beidawn san emaw, Mire hnam tan a kan uikawm viau emaw, an hnamah hruaitu chher chhuah kan hlau/duh lo tlat emaw a nih chuan kan unau Mire hnam hi engtik khawtikah mah taksa leh thlarauah an ding chhuak ve ngai dawn lo a ni, chuan an thisen mawh kan phur ngei bawk ang.

Tunah hian Baptist Church of Maruchah hian Assembly kan nei tawh a, Centralization System kan hmang ve bawk a, kum 2013 Assembly aṭang phei kha chuan thilpek lamah kan harh ve hle in ka hria a, kan khua Empu a kan Mission in 32 lek, thingtlang lo nei a eizawng, rethei te te te’n tunhma chuan kum khatah sing ruk/sing sarih te kan sawma pakhat a tlin chuan kan lawm ve em em ṭhin kha a ni a, kum 2013 hnu lam kha chuan Biakin ṭha leh keimahni tawk a ropui ve tak kan sak mek lai pawh in kan sawma pakhat tling khawm chu nuai chuang fe a ni ve thei tawh a ni. Baptist Church of Maruchah hmun atan Baptist Church of Mizoram in Dingte khaw bulah ram tha tak mai leh tui pawh thatna Ekar 5-lai a zau kan lei sak tawh bawk, hemi thla kan lakna lai hi a ni.

Kan unau Mire Kristian te hi mahni ke a ding thei tura buatsaih tur chuan keini Mire ram a Lalpa rawngbawl a hma la mekte hian kan sawi tak ang khian, Hruaitu ṭha chher chhuah sakte, Kohhran kalphung mumal taka kaihhruaite, Treining chi hrang hrang pekte, School Upgrade sakte, Clinic tih phusui zelte, Rinna kawng a hma an sawn ve theihna a tan a an mamawh hrang hrang phuhruk sakte, sawi tur a tam mai; kan tihsak an la ngai a ni. Galatia 3:3 ah chuan, “Heti emin in â maw? Thlarauva tan tawh siin tisain in zo dawn em ni?” a ti a, kei ni pawh Thlarauvin kan tan tawh a, tisa chuan tawpsan mai i tum lo ang u aw.

54Kum 2024 a Mire Field a BCM Staff-te
